    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun setHasProviders(has: Boolean) {\n        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n            binding.hasProviders = has\n        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun showAbout(versionName: String, coreVersion: String) {\n        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n            val binding = DesignAboutBinding.inflate(context.layoutInflater).apply {\n                this.versionName = versionName\n                this.coreVersion = coreVersion\n            }\n\n            AlertDialog.Builder(context)\n                .setView(binding.root)\n                .show()\n        }\n    }\n\n    init {\n        binding.self = this\n\n        binding.colorClashStarted = context.resolveThemedColor(com.google.android.material.R.attr.colorPrimary)\n        binding.colorClashStopped = context.resolveThemedColor(R.attr.colorClashStopped)\n    }\n\n    fun request(request: Request) {\n        requests.trySend(request)\n    }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.design.util\n\nimport android.content.Context\nimport android.graphics.drawable.Drawable\nimport android.util.AttributeSet\nimport android.util.TypedValue\nimport androidx.annotation.AttrRes\nimport androidx.annotation.StyleRes\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.compat.getDrawableCompat\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.R\n\ninterface ClickableScope {\n    fun focusable(defaultValue: Boolean): Boolean\n    fun clickable(defaultValue: Boolean): Boolean\n    fun background(): Drawable?\n    fun foreground(): Drawable?\n}\n\nval Context.selectableItemBackground: Drawable?\n    get() {\n        return getDrawableCompat(resolveThemedResourceId(android.R.attr.selectableItemBackground))\n    }\n\nfun Context.resolveClickableAttrs(\n    attributeSet: AttributeSet?,\n    @AttrRes defaultAttrRes: Int = 0,\n    @StyleRes defaultStyleRes: Int = 0,\n    block: ClickableScope.() -\u003e Unit,\n) {\n    theme.obtainStyledAttributes(\n        attributeSet,\n        R.styleable.Clickable,\n        defaultAttrRes,\n        defaultStyleRes\n    ).apply {\n        val impl = object : ClickableScope {\n            override fun focusable(defaultValue: Boolean): Boolean {\n                return getBoolean(R.styleable.Clickable_android_focusable, defaultValue)\n            }\n\n            override fun clickable(defaultValue: Boolean): Boolean {\n                return getBoolean(R.styleable.Clickable_android_clickable, defaultValue)\n            }\n\n            override fun background(): Drawable? {\n                return getDrawable(R.styleable.Clickable_android_background)\n            }\n\n            override fun foreground(): Drawable? {\n                return getDrawable(R.styleable.Clickable_android_focusable)\n            }\n\n        }\n\n        impl.apply(block)\n\n        recycle()\n    }\n}\n\nfun Context.resolveThemedColor(@AttrRes resId: Int): Int {\n    return TypedValue().apply {\n        theme.resolveAttribute(resId, this, true)\n    }.data\n}\n\nfun Context.resolveThemedBoolean(@AttrRes resId: Int): Boolean {\n    return TypedValue().apply {\n        theme.resolveAttribute(resId, this, true)",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    override fun onStopped(cause: String?) {\n        events.trySend(Event.ClashStop)\n\n        if (cause != null \u0026\u0026 activityStarted) {\n            launch {\n                design?.showExceptionToast(ClashException(cause))\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private fun queryDayNight(config: Configuration = resources.configuration): DayNight {\n        return when (uiStore.darkMode) {\n            DarkMode.Auto -\u003e if (config.uiMode and Configuration.UI_MODE_NIGHT_MASK == Configuration.UI_MODE_NIGHT_YES) DayNight.Night else DayNight.Day\n            DarkMode.ForceLight -\u003e DayNight.Day\n            DarkMode.ForceDark -\u003e DayNight.Night\n        }\n    }\n\n    private fun applyDayNight(config: Configuration = resources.configuration) {\n        val dayNight = queryDayNight(config)\n        when (dayNight) {\n            DayNight.Night -\u003e theme.applyStyle(R.style.AppThemeDark, true)\n            DayNight.Day -\u003e theme.applyStyle(R.style.AppThemeLight, true)\n        }\n\n        window.isAllowForceDarkCompat = false\n        window.isSystemBarsTranslucentCompat = true\n        \n        window.statusBarColor = resolveThemedColor(android.R.attr.statusBarColor)\n        window.navigationBarColor = resolveThemedColor(android.R.attr.navigationBarColor)\n\n        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT \u003e= 23) {\n            window.isLightStatusBarsCompat = resolveThemedBoolean(android.R.attr.windowLightStatusBar)\n        }\n\n        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT \u003e= 27) {\n            window.isLightNavigationBarCompat = resolveThemedBoolean(android.R.attr.windowLightNavigationBar)\n        }\n\n        this.dayNight = dayNight\n    }\n\n    enum class Event {\n        ServiceRecreated,\n        ActivityStart,\n        ActivityStop,\n        ClashStop,\n        ClashStart,\n        ProfileLoaded,\n        ProfileChanged,\n        ProfileUpdateCompleted,\n        ProfileUpdateFailed,\n    }\n}",
        "detailedLines": [

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.service.clash.module\n\nimport android.app.PendingIntent\nimport android.app.Service\nimport android.content.Intent\nimport androidx.core.app.NotificationChannelCompat\nimport androidx.core.app.NotificationCompat\nimport androidx.core.app.NotificationManagerCompat\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.compat.getColorCompat\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.compat.pendingIntentFlags\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.compat.startForegroundCompat\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.constants.Components\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.constants.Intents\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.R\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.StatusProvider\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.channels.Channel\n\nclass StaticNotificationModule(service: Service) : Module\u003cUnit\u003e(service) {\n    private val builder = NotificationCompat.Builder(service, CHANNEL_ID)\n        .setSmallIcon(R.drawable.ic_logo_service)\n        .setOngoing(true)\n        .setColor(service.getColorCompat(R.color.color_clash))\n        .setOnlyAlertOnce(true)\n        .setShowWhen(false)\n        .setForegroundServiceBehavior(NotificationCompat.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_IMMEDIATE)\n        .setContentIntent(\n            PendingIntent.getActivity(\n                service,\n                R.id.nf_clash_status,\n                Intent().setComponent(Components.MAIN_ACTIVITY)\n                    .setFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_SINGLE_TOP or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP),\n                pendingIntentFlags(PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT)\n            )\n        )\n\n    override suspend fun run() {\n        val loaded = receiveBroadcast(capacity = Channel.CONFLATED) {\n            ",

        "contents": "\u003c?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"utf-8\"?\u003e\n\u003clayout xmlns:android=\"http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android\"\n    xmlns:app=\"http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto\"\u003e\n    \u003cdata\u003e\n        \u003cvariable\n            name=\"self\"\n            type=\"com.github.kr328.clash.design.MainDesign\" /\u003e\n        \u003cvariable\n            name=\"clashRunning\"\n            type=\"boolean\" /\u003e\n        \u003cvariable\n            name=\"forwarded\"\n            type=\"String\" /\u003e\n        \u003cvariable\n            name=\"mode\"\n            type=\"String\" /\u003e\n        \u003cvariable\n            name=\"profileName\"\n            type=\"String\" /\u003e\n        \u003cvariable\n            name=\"colorClashStarted\"\n            type=\"int\" /\u003e\n        \u003cvariable\n            name=\"colorClashStopped\"\n            type=\"int\" /\u003e\n        \u003cvariable\n            name=\"hasProviders\"\n            type=\"boolean\" /\u003e\n\n        \u003cimport type=\"android.view.View\" /\u003e\n        \u003cimport type=\"com.github.kr328.clash.design.MainDesign.Request\" /\u003e\n    \u003c/data\u003e\n\n    \u003candroidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout\n        android:layout_width=\"match_parent\"\n        android:layout_height=\"match_parent\"",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package constant\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"os\"\n\tP \"path\"\n\t\"path/filepath\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/utils\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant/features\"\n)\n\nconst Name = \"mihomo\"\n\nvar (\n\tGeositeName = \"GeoSite.dat\"\n\tGeoipName   = \"GeoIP.dat\"\n\tASNName     = \"ASN.mmdb\"\n)\n\n// Path is used to get the configuration path\n//\n// on Unix systems, &#96;$HOME/.config/mihomo&#96;.\n// on Windows, &#96;%USERPROFILE%/.config/mihomo&#96;.\nvar Path = func() *path {\n\thomeDir, err := os.UserHomeDir()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\thomeDir, _ = os.Getwd()\n\t}\n\tallowUnsafePath, _ := strconv.ParseBool(os.Getenv(\"SKIP_SAFE_PATH_CHECK\"))\n\thomeDir = P.Join(homeDir, \".config\", Name)\n\n\tif _, err = os.Stat(homeDir); err != nil {\n\t\tif configHome, ok := os.LookupEnv(\"XDG_CONFIG_HOME\"); ok {\n\t\t\thomeDir = P.Join(configHome, Name)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar safePaths []string\n\tfor _, safePath := range filepath.SplitList(os.Getenv(\"SAFE_PATHS\")) {\n\t\tsafePath = strings.TrimSpace(safePath)\n\t\tif len(safePath) == 0 {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tsafePaths = append(safePaths, safePath)\n\t}\n\n\treturn \u0026path{homeDir: homeDir, configFile: \"config.yaml\", allowUnsafePath: allowUnsafePath, safePaths: safePaths}\n}()\n\ntype path struct {\n\thomeDir         string\n\tconfigFile      string\n\tallowUnsafePath bool\n\tsafePaths       []string\n}\n\n// SetHomeDir is used to set the configuration path\nfunc SetHomeDir(root string) {\n\tPath.homeDir = root\n}\n\n// SetConfig is used to set the configuration file\nfunc SetConfig(file string) {\n\tPath.configFile = file\n}\n\nfunc (p *path) HomeDir() string {\n\treturn p.homeDir\n}\n\nfunc (p *path) Config() string {\n\treturn p.configFile\n}\n\n// Resolve return a absolute path or a relative path with homedir\nfunc (p *path) Resolve(path string) string {\n\tif !filepath.IsAbs(path) {\n\t\treturn filepath.Join(p.HomeDir(), path)\n\t}\n\treturn path\n}\n\n// IsSafePath return true if path is a subpath of homedir (or in the SAFE_PATHS environment variable)\nfunc (p *path) IsSafePath(path string) bool {\n\tif p.allowUnsafePath || features.CMFA {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "## Clash Meta for Android\n\nA Graphical user interface of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta) for Android\n\n### Feature\n\nFeature of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta)\n\n[\u003cimg src=\"https://fdroid.gitlab.io/artwork/badge/get-it-on.png\"\n     alt=\"Get it on F-Droid\"\n     height=\"80\"\u003e](https://f-droid.org/packages/com.github.metacubex.clash.meta/)\n\n### Requirement\n\n- Android 5.0+ (minimum)\n- Android 7.0+ (recommend)\n- &#96;armeabi-v7a&#96; , &#96;arm64-v8a&#96;, &#96;x86&#96; or &#96;x86_64&#96; Architecture\n\n### Build\n\n1. Update submodules\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n   git submodule update --init --recursive\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n2. Install **OpenJDK 11**, **Android SDK**, **CMake** and **Golang**\n\n3. Create &#96;local.properties&#96; in project root with\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   sdk.dir=/path/to/android-sdk\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n4. (Optional) Custom app package name. Add the following configuration to &#96;local.properties&#96;.\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   # config your ownn applicationId, or it will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash'\n   custom.application.id=com.my.compile.clash\n   # remove application id suffix, or the applicaion id will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash.alpha'\n   remove.suffix=true\n\n5. Create &#96;signing.properties&#96; in project root with\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   keystore.path=/path/to/keystore/file\n   keystore.password=\u003ckey store password\u003e\n   key.alias=\u003ckey alias\u003e\n   key.password=\u003ckey password\u003e\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n6. Build\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n   ./gradlew app:assembleAlphaRelease\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Automation\n\nAPP package name is &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta&#96;\n\n- Toggle Clash.Meta service status\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.TOGGLE_CLASH&#96;\n- Start Clash.Meta service\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.START_CLASH&#96;\n- Stop Clash.Meta service\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.STOP_CLASH&#96;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "## Clash Meta for Android"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "A Graphical user interface of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta) for Android"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "### Feature"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "Feature of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "[\u003cimg src=\"https://fdroid.gitlab.io/artwork/badge/get-it-on.png\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "     alt=\"Get it on F-Droid\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "     height=\"80\"\u003e](https://f-droid.org/packages/com.github.metacubex.clash.meta/)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "### Requirement"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "- Android 5.0+ (minimum)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "- Android 7.0+ (recommend)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- &#96;armeabi-v7a&#96; , &#96;arm64-v8a&#96;, &#96;x86&#96; or &#96;x86_64&#96; Architecture"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "### Build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "1. Update submodules"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "   git submodule update --init --recursive"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "2. Install **OpenJDK 11**, **Android SDK**, **CMake** and **Golang**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "3. Create &#96;local.properties&#96; in project root with"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "   sdk.dir=/path/to/android-sdk"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "4. (Optional) Custom app package name. Add the following configuration to &#96;local.properties&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "   # config your ownn applicationId, or it will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "   custom.application.id=com.my.compile.clash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "   # remove application id suffix, or the applicaion id will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash.alpha'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "   remove.suffix=true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "5. Create &#96;signing.properties&#96; in project root with"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "   keystore.path=/path/to/keystore/file"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "   keystore.password=\u003ckey store password\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "   key.alias=\u003ckey alias\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "   key.password=\u003ckey password\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "6. Build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "   ./gradlew app:assembleAlphaRelease"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "### Automation"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "APP package name is &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "- Toggle Clash.Meta service status"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.TOGGLE_CLASH&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "- Start Clash.Meta service"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.START_CLASH&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "- Stop Clash.Meta service"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.STOP_CLASH&#96;"
          }
        ],

      "score": 0.20805099606513977

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.design.adapter\n\nimport android.content.Context\nimport android.graphics.Color\nimport android.view.View\nimport android.view.ViewGroup\nimport android.widget.BaseAdapter\nimport android.widget.TextView\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.R\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.layoutInflater\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.resolveThemedColor\n\nclass PopupListAdapter(\n    private val context: Context,\n    private val texts: List\u003cCharSequence\u003e,\n    private val selected: Int,\n) : BaseAdapter() {\n    private val colorPrimary = context.resolveThemedColor(com.google.android.material.R.attr.colorPrimary)\n    private val colorOnPrimary = context.resolveThemedColor(com.google.android.material.R.attr.colorOnPrimary)\n    private val colorControlNormal = context.resolveThemedColor(com.google.android.material.R.attr.colorControlNormal)\n\n    override fun getCount(): Int {\n        return texts.size\n    }\n\n    override fun getItem(position: Int): Any {\n        return texts[position]\n    }\n\n    override fun getItemId(position: Int): Long {\n        return texts[position].hashCode().toLong()\n    }\n\n    override fun getView(position: Int, convertView: View?, parent: ViewGroup?): View {\n        val view = convertView ?: context.layoutInflater\n            .inflate(android.R.layout.simple_list_item_1, parent, false)\n\n        val text: TextView = view.findViewById(android.R.id.text1)\n\n        text.text = texts[position]\n\n        if (position == selected) {\n            text.setBackgroundColor(\n                Color.argb(\n                    200,\n                    Color.red(colorPrimary),\n                    Color.green(colorPrimary),\n                    Color.blue(colorPrimary)\n                )\n            )\n            text.setTextColor(colorOnPrimary)\n        } else {\n            text.setBackgroundColor(Color.TRANSPARENT)\n            text.setTextColor(colorControlNormal)\n        }\n\n        return view\n    }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func init() {\n\tflag.StringVar(\u0026homeDir, \"d\", os.Getenv(\"CLASH_HOME_DIR\"), \"set configuration directory\")\n\tflag.StringVar(\u0026configFile, \"f\", os.Getenv(\"CLASH_CONFIG_FILE\"), \"specify configuration file\")\n\tflag.StringVar(\u0026configString, \"config\", os.Getenv(\"CLASH_CONFIG_STRING\"), \"specify base64-encoded configuration string\")\n\tflag.StringVar(\u0026externalUI, \"ext-ui\", os.Getenv(\"CLASH_OVERRIDE_EXTERNAL_UI_DIR\"), \"override external ui directory\")\n\tflag.StringVar(\u0026externalController, \"ext-ctl\", os.Getenv(\"CLASH_OVERRIDE_EXTERNAL_CONTROLLER\"), \"override external controller address\")\n\tflag.StringVar(\u0026externalControllerUnix, \"ext-ctl-unix\", os.Getenv(\"CLASH_OVERRIDE_EXTERNAL_CONTROLLER_UNIX\"), \"override external controller unix address\")\n\tflag.StringVar(\u0026externalControllerPipe, \"ext-ctl-pipe\", os.Getenv(\"CLASH_OVERRIDE_EXTERNAL_CONTROLLER_PIPE\"), \"override external controller pipe address\")\n\tflag.StringVar(\u0026secret, \"secret\", os.Getenv(\"CLASH_OVERRIDE_SECRET\"), \"override secret for RESTful API\")\n\tflag.BoolVar(\u0026geodataMode, \"m\", false, \"set geodata mode\")\n\tflag.BoolVar(\u0026version, \"v\", false, \"show current version of mihomo\")\n\tflag.BoolVar(\u0026testConfig, \"t\", false, \"test configuration and exit\")\n\tflag.Parse()\n}\n\nfunc main() {\n\t// Defensive programming: panic when code mistakenly calls net.DefaultResolver",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class DynamicNotificationModule(service: Service) : Module\u003cUnit\u003e(service) {\n    private val builder = NotificationCompat.Builder(service, StaticNotificationModule.CHANNEL_ID)\n        .setSmallIcon(R.drawable.ic_logo_service)\n        .setOngoing(true)\n        .setColor(service.getColorCompat(R.color.color_clash))\n        .setOnlyAlertOnce(true)\n        .setShowWhen(false)\n        .setContentTitle(\"Not Selected\")\n        .setForegroundServiceBehavior(NotificationCompat.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_IMMEDIATE)\n        .setContentIntent(\n            PendingIntent.getActivity(\n                service,\n                R.id.nf_clash_status,\n                Intent().setComponent(Components.MAIN_ACTIVITY)\n                    .setFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_SINGLE_TOP or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP),\n                pendingIntentFlags(PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT)\n            )\n        )\n\n    private val notificationManager = NotificationManagerCompat.from(service)\n\n    private fun update() {\n        val now = Clash.queryTrafficNow()\n        val total = Clash.queryTrafficTotal()\n\n        val uploading = now.trafficUpload()\n        val downloading = now.trafficDownload()\n        val uploaded = total.trafficUpload()\n        val downloaded = total.trafficDownload()\n\n        val notification = builder\n            .setContentText(\n                service.getString(\n                    R.string.clash_notification_content,\n                    \"$uploading/s\", \"$downloading/s\"\n                )\n            )\n            .setSubText(\n                service.getString(\n                    R.string.clash_notification_content,\n                    uploaded, downloaded\n                )\n            )\n            .build()\n\n        notificationManager.notify(R.id.nf_clash_status, notification)\n    }\n\n    override suspend fun run() = coroutineScope {\n        var shouldUpdate = service.getSystemService\u003cPowerManager\u003e()?.isInteractive ?: true",

        "contents": "    \u003c/style\u003e\n\n    \u003cstyle name=\"AppBottomSheetDialogLightBase\" parent=\"Theme.MaterialComponents.Light.BottomSheetDialog\"\u003e\n        \u003citem name=\"android:windowIsFloating\"\u003efalse\u003c/item\u003e\n        \u003citem name=\"paddingRightSystemWindowInsets\"\u003efalse\u003c/item\u003e\n        \u003citem name=\"paddingBottomSystemWindowInsets\"\u003efalse\u003c/item\u003e\n        \u003citem name=\"paddingLeftSystemWindowInsets\"\u003efalse\u003c/item\u003e\n\n        \u003citem name=\"colorPrimary\"\u003e@color/color_clash_light\u003c/item\u003e\n        \u003citem name=\"colorOnPrimary\"\u003e@android:color/white\u003c/item\u003e\n        \u003citem name=\"colorControlNormal\"\u003e@android:color/black\u003c/item\u003e\n        \u003citem name=\"colorClashStopped\"\u003e@color/color_light_clash_stopped\u003c/item\u003e\n        \u003citem name=\"colorControlDisabled\"\u003e@color/color_light_control_disabled\u003c/item\u003e\n\n        \u003citem name=\"colorPrimaryDark\"\u003e?attr/colorPrimary\u003c/item\u003e\n        \u003citem name=\"colorSecondary\"\u003e?attr/colorPrimary\u003c/item\u003e\n        \u003citem name=\"colorOnSecondary\"\u003e?attr/colorOnPrimary\u003c/item\u003e\n        \u003citem name=\"colorControlActivated\"\u003e?attr/colorPrimary\u003c/item\u003e\n        \u003citem name=\"android:textColor\"\u003e?attr/colorControlNormal\u003c/item\u003e\n\n        \u003citem name=\"bottomSheetStyle\"\u003e@style/AppBottomSheetStyle\u003c/item\u003e\n    \u003c/style\u003e\n\n    \u003cstyle name=\"AppBottomSheetDialogDarkBase\" parent=\"Theme.MaterialComponents.BottomSheetDialog\"\u003e\n        \u003citem name=\"android:windowIsFloating\"\u003efalse\u003c/item\u003e",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "private var reason: String? = null\n\n    private val runtime = clashRuntime {\n        val store = ServiceStore(self)\n\n        val close = install(CloseModule(self))\n        val config = install(ConfigurationModule(self))\n        val network = install(NetworkObserveModule(self))\n\n        if (store.dynamicNotification)\n            install(DynamicNotificationModule(self))\n        else\n            install(StaticNotificationModule(self))\n\n        install(AppListCacheModule(self))\n        install(TimeZoneModule(self))\n        install(SuspendModule(self))\n        install(HealthCheckNotificationModule(self))\n\n        try {\n            while (isActive) {\n                val quit = select\u003cBoolean\u003e {\n                    close.onEvent {\n                        true\n                    }\n                    config.onEvent {\n                        reason = it.message\n\n                        true\n                    }\n                    network.onEvent {\n                        false\n                    }\n                }\n\n                if (quit) break\n            }\n        } catch (e: Exception) {\n            Log.e(\"Create clash runtime: ${e.message}\", e)\n\n            reason = e.message\n        } finally {\n            withContext(NonCancellable) {\n                stopSelf()\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    override fun onCreate() {\n        super.onCreate()\n\n        if (StatusProvider.serviceRunning)\n            return stopSelf()\n\n        StatusProvider.serviceRunning = true\n\n        StaticNotificationModule.createNotificationChannel(this)\n        StaticNotificationModule.notifyLoadingNotification(this)\n        HealthCheckNotificationModule.createNotificationChannel(this)\n\n        runtime.launch()\n    }\n\n    override fun onStartCommand(intent: Intent?, flags: Int, startId: Int): Int {\n        sendClashStarted()\n\n        return START_STICKY\n    }\n\n    override fun onBind(intent: Intent?): IBinder {\n        return Binder()\n    }\n\n    override fun onDestroy() {\n        StatusProvider.serviceRunning = false\n\n        sendClashStopped(reason)",

\u003caction android:name=\"android.intent.action.VIEW\" /\u003e\n\n                \u003ccategory android:name=\"android.intent.category.DEFAULT\" /\u003e\n                \u003ccategory android:name=\"android.intent.category.BROWSABLE\" /\u003e\n\n                \u003cdata android:scheme=\"clash\"/\u003e\n                \u003cdata android:scheme=\"clashmeta\"/\u003e\n                \u003cdata android:host=\"install-config\"/\u003e\n            \u003c/intent-filter\u003e\n            \u003cintent-filter\u003e\n                \u003caction       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.design\n\nimport android.content.Context\nimport android.view.View\nimport androidx.appcompat.app.AlertDialog\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.model.TunnelState\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.util.trafficTotal\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.databinding.DesignAboutBinding\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.databinding.DesignMainBinding\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.layoutInflater\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.resolveThemedColor\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.root\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.withContext\n\nclass MainDesign(context: Context) : Design\u003cMainDesign.Request\u003e(context) {\n    enum class Request {\n        ToggleStatus,\n        OpenProxy,\n        OpenProfiles,\n        OpenProviders,\n        OpenLogs,\n        OpenSettings,\n        OpenHelp,\n        OpenAbout,\n    }\n\n    private val binding = DesignMainBinding\n        .inflate(context.layoutInflater, context.root, false)\n\n    override val root: View\n        get() = binding.root\n\n    suspend fun setProfileName(name: String?) {\n        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n            binding.profileName = name\n        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun setClashRunning(running: Boolean) {\n        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n            binding.clashRunning = running\n        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun setForwarded(value: Long) {\n        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n            binding.forwarded = value.trafficTotal()\n        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun setMode(mode: TunnelState.Mode) {\n        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n            binding.mode = when (mode) {\n                TunnelState.Mode.Direct -\u003e context.getString(R.string.direct_mode)\n                TunnelState.Mode.Global -\u003e context.getString(R.string.global_mode)\n                TunnelState.Mode.Rule -\u003e context.getString(R.string.rule_mode)\n                else -\u003e context.getString(R.string.rule_mode)\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun setHasProviders(has: Boolean) {\n        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n            binding.hasProviders = has\n        ",

_**Agent (default)**_


`StaticNotificationModule.kt` uses `R.color.color_clash` from the service module's R class, but `HealthCheckNotificationModule.kt` incorrectly references the design module's R class. Updating it to use the service module's `R.color.color_clash`.


_**Agent (default)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file_v2">

_**Agent (default)**_


Fixed the issue. The code referenced `com.github.kr328.clash.design.R.color.color_clash`, but the `service` module doesn't depend on `design` and already defines `color_clash` in its own resources.

Changed line 60 to use `R.color.color_clash` (the service module's R class), matching `StaticNotificationModule.kt`. This should resolve the compilation error.

The build should now succeed. The `service` module uses its own `color_clash` resource, which is already defined in `service/src/main/res/values/colors.xml`.

_**Agent (default)**_


已修复类型不匹配。`packageManager.getPackageInfo(packageName, 0).versionName` 返回可空 `String?`，但函数要求非空 `String`。

已在第 142 行添加 `?: ""`，当 `versionName` 为 null 时返回空字符串，满足非空返回类型。

现在应可成功编译。

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "      # If any change found, commit it and push\n      - name: Commit and push if changes\n        run: |\n          changes=$(git diff --name-only origin/main | wc -l)\n          if [ $changes -gt 0 ]\n          then\n            newVersionName=${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonName }}\n            newVersionCode=${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonCode }}\n            git config --global user.name 'GitHub Action'\n            git config --global user.email 'action@github.com'\n            git add build.gradle.kts\n            git commit -am \"Bump version to $newVersionName ($newVersionCode)\"\n            git tag \"v$newVersionName\"\n            git push --follow-tags\n          fi\n\n      - name: Update CA\n        run: |\n          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n          sudo update-ca-certificates\n          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n      - name: Signing properties\n        env:\n          SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}\n        run: |\n          touch signing.properties\n          echo keystore.password=\"$SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD\" \u003e signing.properties\n          echo key.alias=\"$SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n          echo key.password=\"$SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n            \n          echo \"cat signing.properties\"\n          cat signing.properties\n\n      - name: Release Build\n        if: success()\n        run: ./gradlew --no-daemon app:assembleMetaRelease\n\n      - name: Tag Repo\n        uses: richardsimko/update-tag@v1",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "      # If any change found, commit it and push"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Build Pre-Release\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n  push:\n    branches:\n      - main\n\njobs:\n  BuildPreRelease:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n      \n      - name: Checkout submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --remote --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Gradle\n        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n\n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n\n      - name: Cache debug keystore\n        id: cache-keystore\n        uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: ~/.android/debug.keystore\n          key: debug-keystore-${{ runner.os }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            debug-keystore-${{ runner.os }}\n\n      - name: Generate debug keystore if not exists\n        if: steps.cache-keystore.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'\n        run: |\n          mkdir -p ~/.android\n          keytool -genkey -v -keystore ~/.android/debug.keystore -storepass android -alias androiddebugkey -keypass android -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000 -dname \"CN=Android Debug,O=Android,C=US\"\n\n      - name: Update CA\n        run: |\n          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n          sudo update-ca-certificates\n          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n      # - name: Signing properties\n      #   env:\n      #     SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD }}\n      #     SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}\n      #     SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}",
        "detailedLines": [

        "contents": "name: Build Debug\non:\n  pull_request:\n    types: [opened, reopened, synchronize]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\njobs:\n  BuildDebug:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n      \n      - name: Checkout submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Gradle\n        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n\n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n\n      - name: Update CA\n        run: |\n          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n          sudo update-ca-certificates\n          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n      # - name: Signing properties\n      #   env:\n      #     SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD }}\n      #     SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}\n      #     SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}\n      #   run: |\n      #     touch signing.properties\n      #     echo keystore.password=\"$SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD\" \u003e signing.properties\n      #     echo key.alias=\"$SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n      #     echo key.password=\"$SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n            \n      #     echo \"cat signing.properties\"\n      #     cat signing.properties\n\n      - name: Build\n        if: success()",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    extensions.configure\u003cBaseExtension\u003e {\n        buildFeatures.buildConfig = true\n        defaultConfig {\n            if (isApp) {\n                val customApplicationId = queryConfigProperty(\"custom.application.id\") as? String?\n                applicationId = customApplicationId.takeIf { it?.isNotBlank() == true } ?: \"com.github.metacubex.clash\"\n            }\n\n            project.name.let { name -\u003e\n                namespace = if (name == \"app\") \"com.github.kr328.clash\"\n                else \"com.github.kr328.clash.$name\"\n            }\n\n            minSdk = 21\n            targetSdk = 35\n\n            versionName = \"2.11.22\"\n            versionCode = 211022\n\n            resValue(\"string\", \"release_name\", \"v$versionName\")\n            resValue(\"integer\", \"release_code\", \"$versionCode\")\n\n            externalNativeBuild {\n                cmake {\n                    abiFilters(\"arm64-v8a\")\n                }\n            }\n\n            if (!isApp) {\n                consumerProguardFiles(\"consumer-rules.pro\")\n            } else {\n                setProperty(\"archivesBaseName\", \"cmfa-$versionName\")\n            }\n        }\n\n        ndkVersion = \"27.2.12479018\"\n\n        compileSdkVersion(defaultConfig.targetSdk!!)\n\n        if (isApp) {\n            packagingOptions {\n                resources {\n                    excludes.add(\"DebugProbesKt.bin\")\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        productFlavors {\n            flavorDimensions(\"feature\")",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "      #     SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}\n      #     SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}\n      #   run: |\n      #     touch signing.properties\n      #     echo keystore.password=\"$SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD\" \u003e signing.properties\n      #     echo key.alias=\"$SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n      #     echo key.password=\"$SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n      #       \n      #     echo \"cat signing.properties\"\n      #     cat signing.properties\n\n      - name: Pre-release Build\n        if: success()\n        run: ./gradlew --no-daemon app:assembleAlphaRelease\n\n      # Delete old Prerelease-alpha\n      - uses: dev-drprasad/delete-tag-and-release@v1.1\n        with:\n          tag_name: Prerelease-alpha\n          github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n          delete_release: true\n\n      - name: Tag Repo\n        uses: richardsimko/update-tag@v1\n        with:\n          tag_name: Prerelease-alpha\n        env:\n          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n      - name: Upload Alpha\n        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2\n        if: ${{  success() }}\n        with:\n          tag_name: Prerelease-alpha\n          files: app/build/outputs/apk/alpha/release/*\n          prerelease: true\n          generate_release_notes: true\n\n      - name: Release Changelog Builder\n        uses: mikepenz/release-changelog-builder-action@v4\n        continue-on-error: true",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": ".gradle\nbuild/\n/app/foss/release\n/app/premium/release\n/captures\n\n# Ignore Gradle GUI config\ngradle-app.setting\n\n# Avoid ignoring Gradle wrapper jar targetFile (.jar files are usually ignored)\n!gradle-wrapper.jar\n\n# Cache of project\n.gradletasknamecache\n\n# # Work around https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/IDEA-116898\n# gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties\n\n# Ignore IDEA config\n*.iml\n/.idea/*\n!/.idea/codeStyles\n/core/src/main/golang/.idea/*\n!/core/src/main/golang/.idea/codeStyles\n/core/src/foss/golang/.idea/*\n!/core/src/foss/golang/.idea/codeStyles\n/core/src/premium/golang/.idea/*\n!/core/src/premium/golang/.idea/codeStyles\n\n# Ignore builtin geofiles\napp/src/main/assets\n\n# KeyStore\nsigning.properties\n*.keystore\n*.jks\n\n# clion cmake build\ncmake-build-*\n\n# local.properties\nlocal.properties\n\n\n# tracker\ntracker.properties\n\n# vscode\n.vscode\n\n# cxx\n.cxx\n\n*.hprof\n\n# firebase\ngoogle-services.json\n\n# Dolphin\n.directory\n\n# logs\n*.log\n\n# MacOS\n.DS_Store",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Build Release\n\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      release-tag:\n        description: 'Release Tag (v2.x.x)'\n        required: true\n\njobs:\n  BuildRelease:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n        with:\n          fetch-depth: 0\n      \n      - name: Checkout submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Gradle\n        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n\n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n      \n      - name: Convert and set version env\n        id: process-version\n        run: |\n          VERSION_TAG=${{ inputs.release-tag }}\n          VERSION_TAG=${VERSION_TAG#v}                              # remove the 'v' prefix\n          IFS='.' read -ra VERSION_PARTS \u003c\u003c\u003c \"$VERSION_TAG\"         # split into array\n          VERSION_CODE=$(printf \"%1d%02d%03d\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[0]}\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[1]}\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[2]}\")\n          \n          echo \"versonName=$VERSION_TAG\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_OUTPUT          # \"1.2.3\"\n          echo \"versonCode=$VERSION_CODE\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_OUTPUT         # \"102003\"\n      \n      # Re-write version in build.gradle.kts\n      - name: Re-write version\n        uses: Devofure/advance-android-version-actions@v1.5\n        with:\n          gradlePath: build.gradle.kts\n          versionCode: ${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonCode }}\n          versionName: ${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonName }}\n      \n      # If any change found, commit it and push\n      - name: Commit and push if changes\n        ",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "name: Build Release"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "on:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "  workflow_dispatch:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "    inputs:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "      release-tag:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "        description: 'Release Tag (v2.x.x)'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "        required: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "jobs:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "  BuildRelease:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    runs-on: ubuntu-latest"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "    steps:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "      - name: Checkout Repository"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "        uses: actions/checkout@v4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "          fetch-depth: 0"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "      "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "      - name: Checkout submodules"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --force"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "      - name: Setup Java"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "        uses: actions/setup-java@v4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "          distribution: \"temurin\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "          java-version: 21"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "      - name: Setup Gradle"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "      - name: Setup Go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "        uses: actions/setup-go@v6"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "          go-version: \"1.25\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "      - uses: actions/cache@v4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "          path: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "            ~/.cache/go-build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "            ~/go/pkg/mod"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "          restore-keys: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "            ${{ runner.os }}-go-"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "      "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "      - name: Convert and set version env"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "        id: process-version"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "        run: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "          VERSION_TAG=${{ inputs.release-tag }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "          VERSION_TAG=${VERSION_TAG#v}                              # remove the 'v' prefix"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "          IFS='.' read -ra VERSION_PARTS \u003c\u003c\u003c \"$VERSION_TAG\"         # split into array"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "          VERSION_CODE=$(printf \"%1d%02d%03d\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[0]}\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[1]}\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[2]}\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "          "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "          echo \"versonName=$VERSION_TAG\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_OUTPUT          # \"1.2.3\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "          echo \"versonCode=$VERSION_CODE\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_OUTPUT         # \"102003\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "      "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "      # Re-write version in build.gradle.kts"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "      - name: Re-write version"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "        uses: Devofure/advance-android-version-actions@v1.5"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "          gradlePath: build.gradle.kts"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "          versionCode: ${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonCode }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "          versionName: ${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonName }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "      "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "      # If any change found, commit it and push"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "      - name: Commit and push if changes"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "        "
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 8,
            "line": 66
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\.github\\workflows\\build-release.yaml",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.34064245223999023
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "      - name: Tag Repo\n        uses: richardsimko/update-tag@v1\n        with:\n          tag_name: ${{ inputs.release-tag }}\n        env:\n          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n      - name: Upload Release\n        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1\n        if: ${{ success() }}\n        with:\n          tag_name: ${{ inputs.release-tag }}\n          files: app/build/outputs/apk/meta/release/*\n          generate_release_notes: true\n\n      - name: Release Changelog Builder\n        uses: mikepenz/release-changelog-builder-action@v4.1.1\n        with:\n          configurationJson: |\n            {\n              \"ignore_labels\": [\n                \"Update\"\n              ],\n            }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "      - name: Tag Repo"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "        uses: richardsimko/update-tag@v1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "          tag_name: ${{ inputs.release-tag }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "        env:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "      - name: Upload Release"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "        if: ${{ success() }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "          tag_name: ${{ inputs.release-tag }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "          files: app/build/outputs/apk/meta/release/*"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "          generate_release_notes: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "      - name: Release Changelog Builder"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "        uses: mikepenz/release-changelog-builder-action@v4.1.1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "          configurationJson: |"

          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "            {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "              \"ignore_labels\": ["
          },

            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "                \"Update\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "              ],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "            }"
          }
        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "## Clash Meta for Android\n\nA Graphical user interface of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta) for Android\n\n### Feature\n\nFeature of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta)\n\n[\u003cimg src=\"https://fdroid.gitlab.io/artwork/badge/get-it-on.png\"\n     alt=\"Get it on F-Droid\"\n     height=\"80\"\u003e](https://f-droid.org/packages/com.github.metacubex.clash.meta/)\n\n### Requirement\n\n- Android 5.0+ (minimum)\n- Android 7.0+ (recommend)\n- &#96;armeabi-v7a&#96; , &#96;arm64-v8a&#96;, &#96;x86&#96; or &#96;x86_64&#96; Architecture\n\n### Build\n\n1. Update submodules\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n   git submodule update --init --recursive\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n2. Install **OpenJDK 11**, **Android SDK**, **CMake** and **Golang**\n\n3. Create &#96;local.properties&#96; in project root with\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   sdk.dir=/path/to/android-sdk\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n4. (Optional) Custom app package name. Add the following configuration to &#96;local.properties&#96;.\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   # config your ownn applicationId, or it will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash'\n   custom.application.id=com.my.compile.clash\n   # remove application id suffix, or the applicaion id will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash.alpha'\n   remove.suffix=true\n\n5. Create &#96;signing.properties&#96; in project root with\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   keystore.path=/path/to/keystore/file\n   keystore.password=\u003ckey store password\u003e\n   key.alias=\u003ckey alias\u003e\n   key.password=\u003ckey password\u003e\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n6. Build\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n   ./gradlew app:assembleAlphaRelease\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Automation\n\nAPP package name is &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta&#96;\n\n- Toggle Clash.Meta service status\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.TOGGLE_CLASH&#96;\n- Start Clash.Meta service\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.START_CLASH&#96;\n- Stop Clash.Meta service\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.STOP_CLASH&#96;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "## Clash Meta for Android"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "A Graphical user interface of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta) for Android"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "### Feature"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "Feature of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "[\u003cimg src=\"https://fdroid.gitlab.io/artwork/badge/get-it-on.png\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "     alt=\"Get it on F-Droid\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "     height=\"80\"\u003e](https://f-droid.org/packages/com.github.metacubex.clash.meta/)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "### Requirement"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "- Android 5.0+ (minimum)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "- Android 7.0+ (recommend)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- &#96;armeabi-v7a&#96; , &#96;arm64-v8a&#96;, &#96;x86&#96; or &#96;x86_64&#96; Architecture"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "### Build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "1. Update submodules"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "   git submodule update --init --recursive"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "2. Install **OpenJDK 11**, **Android SDK**, **CMake** and **Golang**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "3. Create &#96;local.properties&#96; in project root with"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "   sdk.dir=/path/to/android-sdk"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "4. (Optional) Custom app package name. Add the following configuration to &#96;local.properties&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "   # config your ownn applicationId, or it will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "   custom.application.id=com.my.compile.clash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "   # remove application id suffix, or the applicaion id will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash.alpha'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "   remove.suffix=true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "5. Create &#96;signing.properties&#96; in project root with"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "   keystore.path=/path/to/keystore/file"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "   keystore.password=\u003ckey store password\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "   key.alias=\u003ckey alias\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "   key.password=\u003ckey password\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "6. Build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "   ./gradlew app:assembleAlphaRelease"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "### Automation"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "APP package name is &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "- Toggle Clash.Meta service status"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.TOGGLE_CLASH&#96;"
          },
          {

        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "@file:Suppress(\"UNUSED_VARIABLE\")\n\nimport com.android.build.gradle.AppExtension\nimport com.android.build.gradle.BaseExtension\nimport java.net.URL\nimport java.util.*\n\nbuildscript {\n    repositories {\n        mavenCentral()\n        google()\n        maven(\"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MetaCubeX/maven-backup/main/releases\")\n    }\n    dependencies {\n        classpath(libs.build.android)\n        classpath(libs.build.kotlin.common)\n        classpath(libs.build.kotlin.serialization)\n        classpath(libs.build.ksp)\n        classpath(libs.build.golang)\n    }\n}\n\nsubprojects {\n    repositories {\n        mavenCentral()\n        google()\n        maven(\"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MetaCubeX/maven-backup/main/releases\")\n    }\n\n    val isApp = name == \"app\"\n\n    apply(plugin = if (isApp) \"com.android.application\" else \"com.android.library\")\n\n    fun queryConfigProperty(key: String): Any? {\n        val localProperties = Properties()\n        val localPropertiesFile = rootProject.file(\"local.properties\")\n        if (localPropertiesFile.exists()) {\n            localProperties.load(localPropertiesFile.inputStream())\n        } else {\n            return null\n        }\n        return localProperties.getProperty(key)\n    }\n\n    extensions.configure\u003cBaseExtension\u003e {\n        buildFeatures.buildConfig = true\n        defaultConfig {\n            ",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "      with:\n        go-version: '1.25'\n        check-latest: true\n\n    - name: Set variables\n      run: |\n        # Generate version with date and build time (YYMMDD-HHMM) using Asia/Shanghai timezone\n        BUILD_DATE=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date +%y%m%d)\n        BUILD_TIME=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date +%H%M)\n        \n        if [ -n \"${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\" ]; then\n          # Manual release: use provided version\n          VERSION=${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\n          PackageVersion=\"${VERSION#v}\"\n        elif [[ \"${{ github.ref }}\" == refs/tags/* ]]; then\n          # Tag build: use tag name\n          VERSION=\"${GITHUB_REF_NAME}\"\n          PackageVersion=\"${VERSION#v}\"\n        else\n          # Branch build: use date-time format (YYYYMMDD-HHMM)\n          VERSION=\"${BUILD_DATE}-${BUILD_TIME}\"\n          PackageVersion=\"$(curl -s \"https://api.github.com/repos/MetaCubeX/mihomo/releases/latest\" | jq -r '.tag_name' | sed 's/v//g' | awk -F '.' '{$NF = $NF + 1; print}' OFS='.').${VERSION/-/.}\"\n        fi\n        \n        echo \"VERSION=${VERSION}\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"PackageVersion=${PackageVersion}\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n      \n        echo \"BUILDTIME=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date)\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"CGO_ENABLED=0\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"BUILDTAG=-extldflags --static\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"GOTOOLCHAIN=local\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n\n    - name: Update CA\n      run: |\n        sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n        sudo update-ca-certificates\n        cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n    - name: Build core\n      env:\n        GOOS: ${{matrix.jobs.goos}}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import android.databinding.tool.ext.capitalizeUS\nimport com.github.kr328.golang.GolangBuildTask\nimport com.github.kr328.golang.GolangPlugin\n\nplugins {\n    kotlin(\"android\")\n    id(\"com.android.library\")\n    id(\"kotlinx-serialization\")\n    id(\"golang-android\")\n}\n\nval golangSource = file(\"src/main/golang/native\")\n\ngolang {\n    sourceSets {\n        create(\"alpha\") {\n            tags.set(listOf(\"foss\",\"with_gvisor\",\"cmfa\"))\n            srcDir.set(file(\"src/foss/golang\"))\n        }\n        create(\"meta\") {\n            tags.set(listOf(\"foss\",\"with_gvisor\",\"cmfa\"))\n            srcDir.set(file(\"src/foss/golang\"))\n        }\n        all {\n            fileName.set(\"libclash.so\")\n            packageName.set(\"cfa/native\")\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nandroid {\n    productFlavors {\n        all {\n            externalNativeBuild {\n                cmake {\n                    arguments(\"-DGO_SOURCE:STRING=${golangSource}\")\n                    arguments(\"-DGO_OUTPUT:STRING=${GolangPlugin.outputDirOf(project, null, null)}\")\n                    arguments(\"-DFLAVOR_NAME:STRING=$name\")\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    externalNativeBuild {\n        cmake {\n            path = file(\"src/main/cpp/CMakeLists.txt\")\n        }\n    }\n}\n\ndependencies {\n    implementation(project(\":common\"))\n\n    implementation(libs.androidx.core)\n    implementation(libs.kotlin.coroutine)\n    implementation(libs.kotlin.serialization.json)\n}\n\nafterEvaluate {\n    tasks.withType(GolangBuildTask::class.java).forEach {\n        it.inputs.dir(golangSource)\n    }\n}\n\nval abis = listOf(\"arm64-v8a\" to \"Arm64V8a\")\n\nandroidComponents.onVariants { variant -\u003e\n    val cmakeName = if (variant.buildType == \"debug\") \"Debug\" else \"RelWithDebInfo\"",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    - name: Build core\n      env:\n        GOOS: ${{matrix.jobs.goos}}\n        GOARCH: ${{matrix.jobs.goarch}}\n        GOAMD64: ${{matrix.jobs.goamd64}}\n        GO386: ${{matrix.jobs.go386}}\n        GOARM: ${{matrix.jobs.goarm}}\n        GOMIPS: ${{matrix.jobs.gomips}}\n      run: |\n        go env\n        go build -v -tags \"with_gvisor\" -trimpath -ldflags \"${BUILDTAG} -X 'github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant.Version=${VERSION}' -X 'github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant.BuildTime=${BUILDTIME}' -w -s -buildid=\"\n        if [ \"${{matrix.jobs.goos}}\" = \"windows\" ]; then\n          cp mihomo.exe mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}.exe\n          zip -r mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}-${VERSION}.zip mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}.exe\n        else\n          cp mihomo mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}\n          gzip -c mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}} \u003e mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}-${VERSION}.gz\n          rm mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}\n        fi\n\n    - name: Save version\n      run: |\n        echo ${VERSION} \u003e version.txt\n      shell: bash\n\n    - name: Archive production artifacts\n      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4\n      with:\n        name: \"${{ matrix.jobs.goos }}-${{ matrix.jobs.output }}\"\n        path: |\n          mihomo*.gz\n          mihomo*.zip\n          version.txt\n\n  Upload-Prerelease:\n    permissions: write-all\n    if: ${{ github.event_name != 'workflow_dispatch' \u0026\u0026 github.ref_type == 'branch' \u0026\u0026 !startsWith(github.event_name, 'pull_request') }}\n    needs: [build]\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n    - name: Download all workflow run artifacts\n      uses: actions/download-artifact@v4\n      with:\n        path: bin/\n        merge-multiple: true\n\n    - name: Calculate checksums",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "      - name: Build\n        if: success()\n        run: ./gradlew --no-daemon app:assembleAlphaRelease\n          \n      - name: Upload Aritfact (arm64-v8a)\n        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4\n        if: ${{  success() }}\n        with:\n          name: CMFA Debug Unsigned APK (arm64-v8a)\n          path: |\n            app/build/outputs/apk/alpha/release/*-arm64-v8a-*.apk",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "      - name: Build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "        if: success()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "        run: ./gradlew --no-daemon app:assembleAlphaRelease"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "          "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "      - name: Upload Aritfact (arm64-v8a)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "        if: ${{  success() }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "          name: CMFA Debug Unsigned APK (arm64-v8a)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "          path: |"
          },
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        productFlavors {\n            flavorDimensions(\"feature\")\n\n            val removeSuffix = (queryConfigProperty(\"remove.suffix\") as? String)?.toBoolean() == true\n\n            create(\"alpha\") {\n                isDefault = true\n                dimension = flavorDimensionList[0]\n                if (!removeSuffix) {\n                    versionNameSuffix = \".Alpha\"\n                }\n\n\n                buildConfigField(\"boolean\", \"PREMIUM\", \"Boolean.parseBoolean(\\\"false\\\")\")\n\n                resValue(\"string\", \"launch_name\", \"@string/launch_name_alpha\")\n                resValue(\"string\", \"application_name\", \"@string/application_name_alpha\")\n\n                if (isApp \u0026\u0026 !removeSuffix) {\n                    applicationIdSuffix = \".alpha\"\n                }\n            }\n\n            create(\"meta\") {\n\n                dimension = flavorDimensionList[0]\n                if (!removeSuffix) {\n                    versionNameSuffix = \".Meta\"\n                }\n\n                buildConfigField(\"boolean\", \"PREMIUM\", \"Boolean.parseBoolean(\\\"false\\\")\")\n\n                resValue(\"string\", \"launch_name\", \"@string/launch_name_meta\")\n                resValue(\"string\", \"application_name\", \"@string/application_name_meta\")\n\n                if (isApp \u0026\u0026 !removeSuffix) {\n                    applicationIdSuffix = \".meta\"\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        sourceSets {\n            getByName(\"meta\") {\n                java.srcDirs(\"src/foss/java\")\n            }\n            getByName(\"alpha\") {\n                java.srcDirs(\"src/foss/java\")\n            }\n        }\n\n        signingConfigs {\n            val keystore = rootProject.file(\"signing.properties\")",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import java.net.URL\nimport java.nio.file.Files\nimport java.nio.file.StandardCopyOption\n\nplugins {\n    kotlin(\"android\")\n    kotlin(\"kapt\")\n    id(\"com.android.application\")\n}\n\ndependencies {\n    compileOnly(project(\":hideapi\"))\n\n    implementation(project(\":core\"))\n    implementation(project(\":service\"))\n    implementation(project(\":design\"))\n    implementation(project(\":common\"))\n\n    implementation(libs.kotlin.coroutine)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.core)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.activity)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.fragment)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.appcompat)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.coordinator)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.recyclerview)\n    implementation(libs.google.material)\n    implementation(libs.quickie.bundled)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.activity.ktx)\n}\n\ntasks.getByName(\"clean\", type = Delete::class) {\n    delete(file(\"release\"))\n}\n\nval geoFilesDownloadDir = \"src/main/assets\"\n\ntask(\"downloadGeoFiles\") {\n\n    val geoFilesUrls = mapOf(\n        \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/meta-rules-dat/releases/download/latest/geoip.metadb\" to \"geoip.metadb\",\n        \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/meta-rules-dat/releases/download/latest/geosite.dat\" to \"geosite.dat\",\n        // \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/meta-rules-dat/releases/download/latest/country.mmdb\" to \"country.mmdb\",\n        \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/meta-rules-dat/releases/download/latest/GeoLite2-ASN.mmdb\" to \"ASN.mmdb\",\n    )\n\n    doLast {\n        geoFilesUrls.forEach { (downloadUrl, outputFileName) -\u003e\n            val url = URL(downloadUrl)\n            val outputPath = file(\"$geoFilesDownloadDir/$outputFileName\")\n            outputPath.parentFile.mkdirs()\n            url.openStream().use { input -\u003e\n                Files.copy(input, outputPath.toPath(), StandardCopyOption.REPLACE_EXISTING)\n                println(\"$outputFileName downloaded to $outputPath\")\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nafterEvaluate {\n    val downloadGeoFilesTask = tasks[\"downloadGeoFiles\"]",
        "detailedLines": [
