    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.0)\n\n# 获取git hash\n\nmessage(STATUS \"CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR= ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}\")\nexecute_process(\n  COMMAND git submodule foreach git log -1 --format=%H   \n  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} \n  OUTPUT_VARIABLE COMMIT_HASH\n)\nstring(REPLACE \"\\n\" \";\" COMMIT_HASH \"${COMMIT_HASH}\")\nlist(GET COMMIT_HASH 1 COMMIT_HASH)\nstring (REGEX REPLACE \"[\\n\\t\\r]\" \"\" COMMIT_HASH ${COMMIT_HASH})\nstring(SUBSTRING ${COMMIT_HASH} 0 7 COMMIT_HASH)\nmessage(STATUS \"git hash= ${COMMIT_HASH}\")\n\n# 获取分支名称\nexecute_process(\n  COMMAND git submodule foreach git branch -r --contains ${COMMIT_HASH}\n  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} \n  OUTPUT_VARIABLE CURRENT_BRANCH\n)\nstring(REPLACE \"\\n\" \";\" CURRENT_BRANCH \"${CURRENT_BRANCH}\")\nlist(GET CURRENT_BRANCH 1 CURRENT_BRANCH)\nstring (REGEX REPLACE \"origin/\" \"\" CURRENT_BRANCH ${CURRENT_BRANCH})\nstring (REGEX REPLACE \"[\\n\\t\\r]\" \"\" CURRENT_BRANCH ${CURRENT_BRANCH})\n#string(SUBSTRING ${CURRENT_BRANCH} 0 8 CURRENT_BRANCH)\nmessage(STATUS \"git current branch = ${CURRENT_BRANCH}\")\n\n# 获取生成时间\nstring(TIMESTAMP COMPILE_TIME \"%y%m%d\")\nstring (REGEX REPLACE \"[\\n\\t\\r]\" \"\" COMPILE_TIME ${COMPILE_TIME})\nstring(REGEX REPLACE \"\\\"\" \"\" COMPILE_TIME ${COMPILE_TIME})\n\n# 生成版本信息\nset(GIT_VERSION \"${CURRENT_BRANCH}_${COMMIT_HASH}_${COMPILE_TIME}\")\nmessage(STATUS \"version info = ${GIT_VERSION}\")\n\n# 去除空格\nstring(REGEX REPLACE \"[ ]+\" \"\" GIT_VERSION \"${GIT_VERSION}\")\n\n# 保存变量到文件\nconfigure_file(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/version.h.in ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/version.h @ONLY)\n\nproject(clash-bridge C)\n\n\nset(CMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE on)\nset(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE \"${CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE} -O3\")\n\nset(GO_OUTPUT_BASE ${GO_OUTPUT}/${FLAVOR_NAME})\n\nif (\"${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\" STREQUAL \"Debug\")\n    set(GO_OUTPUT_BASE \"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}Debug\")\nelseif (\"${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\" STREQUAL \"Release\")\n    set(GO_OUTPUT_BASE \"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}Release\")\nelseif (\"${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\" STREQUAL \"RelWithDebInfo\")\n    set(GO_OUTPUT_BASE \"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}Release\")",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        merge-multiple: true\n\n    - name: Calculate checksums\n      run: |\n        cd bin/\n        find . -type f -not -name \"checksums.*\" -not -name \"version.txt\" | sort | xargs sha256sum \u003e checksums.txt\n        cat checksums.txt\n      shell: bash\n\n    - name: Delete current release assets\n      uses: 8Mi-Tech/delete-release-assets-action@main\n      with:\n        github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n        tag: Prerelease-${{ github.ref_name }}\n        deleteOnlyFromDrafts: false\n    - name: Set Env\n      run: |\n        echo \"BUILDTIME=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date)\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n      shell: bash\n\n    - name: Tag Repo\n      uses: richardsimko/update-tag@v1\n      with:\n        tag_name: Prerelease-${{ github.ref_name }}\n      env:\n        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n      \n    - run: |\n        cat \u003e release.txt \u003c\u003c 'EOF'\n        Release created at  ${{ env.BUILDTIME }}\n        Synchronize ${{ github.ref_name }} branch code updates, keeping only the latest version\n        \u003cbr\u003e\n        [我应该下载哪个文件? / Which file should I download?](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/wiki/FAQ)\n        [二进制文件筛选 / Binary file selector](https://metacubex.github.io/Meta-Docs/startup/#_1)\n        [查看文档 / Docs](https://metacubex.github.io/Meta-Docs/)\n        EOF\n\n    - name: Upload Prerelease\n      uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1\n      if: ${{  success() }}\n      with:\n        tag_name: Prerelease-${{ github.ref_name }}\n        files: |\n          bin/*\n        prerelease: true\n        generate_release_notes: true\n        body_path: release.txt\n\n  Upload-Release:\n    permissions: write-all\n    if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' \u0026\u0026 github.event.inputs.version != '' }}\n    needs: [build]\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout\n        uses: actions/checkout@v5\n        with:\n          ref: Meta\n          fetch-depth: '0'\n          fetch-tags: 'true'\n\n      - name: Get tags",
        "detailedLines": [

            "text": "        cat checksums.txt"
          },

            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "      shell: bash"

            "lineNumber": 130
          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "          fetch-tags: 'true'\n\n      - name: Get tags\n        run: |\n          echo \"CURRENTVERSION=${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n          git fetch --tags\n          echo \"PREVERSION=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 HEAD)\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n\n      - name: Force push Alpha branch to Meta\n        run: |\n          git config --global user.email \"github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com\"\n          git config --global user.name \"github-actions[bot]\"\n          git fetch origin Alpha:Alpha\n          git push origin Alpha:Meta --force\n        env:\n          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n      - name: Tag the commit on Alpha\n        run: |\n          git checkout Alpha \n          git tag ${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\n          git push origin ${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\n        env:\n          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n      - name: Generate release notes\n        run: |\n            cp ./.github/genReleaseNote.sh ./\n            bash ./genReleaseNote.sh -v ${PREVERSION}...${CURRENTVERSION}\n            rm ./genReleaseNote.sh\n  \n      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v4\n        with:\n          path: bin/\n          merge-multiple: true\n  \n      - name: Display structure of downloaded files\n        run: ls -R\n        working-directory: bin\n  \n      - name: Upload Release\n        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2\n        if: ${{ success() }}\n        with:\n          tag_name: ${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\n          files: bin/*\n          body_path: release.md",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    \u003capplication\n        android:name=\".MainApplication\"\n        android:allowBackup=\"true\"\n        android:banner=\"@mipmap/ic_banner\"\n        android:fullBackupContent=\"@xml/full_backup_content\"\n        android:icon=\"@mipmap/ic_launcher\"\n        android:label=\"@string/application_name\"\n        android:networkSecurityConfig=\"@xml/network_security_config\"\n        android:roundIcon=\"@mipmap/ic_launcher_round\"\n        android:supportsRtl=\"true\"\n        android:theme=\"@style/BootstrapTheme\"\n        tools:ignore=\"GoogleAppIndexingWarning\"\n        tools:targetApi=\"N\"\u003e\n        \u003cmeta-data\n            android:name=\"releaseName\"\n            android:value=\"@string/release_name\" /\u003e\n        \u003cmeta-data\n            android:name=\"releaseCode\"\n            android:value=\"@integer/release_code\" /\u003e\n\n        \u003cactivity\n            android:name=\".MainActivity\"\n            android:configChanges=\"uiMode\"\n            android:exported=\"true\"\n            android:label=\"@string/launch_name\"\n            android:launchMode=\"singleTop\"\u003e\n            \u003cintent-filter\u003e\n                \u003caction android:name=\"android.intent.action.APPLICATION_PREFERENCES\" /\u003e\n                \u003caction android:name=\"android.intent.action.MAIN\" /\u003e\n            \u003c/intent-filter\u003e\n            \u003cintent-filter\u003e\n                \u003caction android:name=\"android.service.quicksettings.action.QS_TILE_PREFERENCES\" /\u003e\n            \u003c/intent-filter\u003e\n        \u003c/activity\u003e\n        \u003cactivity-alias\n            android:name=\".MainActivityAlias\"\n            android:exported=\"true\"\n            android:targetActivity=\".MainActivity\"\u003e\n            \u003cintent-filter\u003e\n                \u003caction android:name=\"android.intent.action.MAIN\" /\u003e\n                \u003ccategory android:name=\"android.intent.category.LAUNCHER\" /\u003e\n                \u003ccategory android:name=\"android.intent.category.LEANBACK_LAUNCHER\" /\u003e\n                \u003ccategory android:name=\"android.intent.category.DEFAULT\" /\u003e\n            \u003c/intent-filter\u003e\n     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "- Stop Clash.Meta service\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.STOP_CLASH&#96;\n- Import a profile\n  - URL Scheme &#96;clash://install-config?url=\u003cencoded URI\u003e&#96; or &#96;clashmeta://install-config?url=\u003cencoded URI\u003e&#96;\n\n### Contribution and Project Maintenance\n\n#### Meta Kernel\n\n- CMFA uses the kernel from &#96;android-real&#96; branch under &#96;MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta&#96;, which is a merge of the main &#96;Alpha&#96; branch and &#96;android-open&#96;.\n  - If you want to contribute to the kernel, make PRs to &#96;Alpha&#96; branch of the Meta kernel repository.\n  - If you want to contribute Android-specific patches to the kernel, make PRs to  &#96;android-open&#96; branch of the Meta kernel repository.\n\n#### Maintenance\n\n- When &#96;MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta&#96; kernel is updated to a new version, the &#96;Update Dependencies&#96; actions in this repo will be triggered automatically.\n  - It will pull the new version of the meta kernel, update all the golang dependencies, and create a PR without manual intervention.\n  - If there is any compile error in PR, you need to fix it before merging. Alternatively, you may merge the PR directly.\n- Manually triggering &#96;Build Pre-Release&#96; actions will compile and publish a &#96;PreRelease&#96; version.\n- Manually triggering &#96;Build Release&#96; actions will compile, tag and publish a &#96;Release&#96; version.\n  - You must fill the blank &#96;Release Tag&#96; with the tag you want to release in the format of &#96;v1.2.3&#96;.\n  - &#96;versionName&#96; and &#96;versionCode&#96; in &#96;build.gradle.kts&#96; will be automatically bumped to the tag you filled above.",

_**Agent (default)**_


已更新配置。签名不一致的原因和解决方案如下：

**问题原因：**
- 如果之前安装的 APK 使用 release 签名（有 `signing.properties`），而新构建的 APK 使用 debug 签名（没有 `signing.properties`），签名会不一致，无法直接升级。

**解决方案：**
1. 保持签名一致：
   - 如果之前安装的 APK 使用 release 签名，新构建时确保存在 `signing.properties` 和 `release.keystore`
   - 如果之前安装的 APK 使用 debug 签名，新构建时不要有 `signing.properties`，让 release 构建使用 debug 签名

2. 当前配置行为：
   - 有 `signing.properties` → 使用 release 签名
   - 没有 `signing.properties` → 使用 debug 签名

**建议：**
- 开发/测试：统一使用 debug 签名（删除或重命名 `signing.properties`）
- 正式发布：统一使用 release 签名（确保 `signing.properties` 和 `release.keystore` 存在）

这样可确保同一场景下签名一致，避免升级时出现签名不匹配。

---

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "      # If any change found, commit it and push\n      - name: Commit and push if changes\n        run: |\n          changes=$(git diff --name-only origin/main | wc -l)\n          if [ $changes -gt 0 ]\n          then\n            newVersionName=${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonName }}\n            newVersionCode=${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonCode }}\n            git config --global user.name 'GitHub Action'\n            git config --global user.email 'action@github.com'\n            git add build.gradle.kts\n            git commit -am \"Bump version to $newVersionName ($newVersionCode)\"\n            git tag \"v$newVersionName\"\n            git push --follow-tags\n          fi\n\n      - name: Update CA\n        run: |\n          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n          sudo update-ca-certificates\n          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n      - name: Signing properties\n        env:\n          SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}\n        run: |\n          touch signing.properties\n          echo keystore.password=\"$SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD\" \u003e signing.properties\n          echo key.alias=\"$SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n          echo key.password=\"$SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n            \n          echo \"cat signing.properties\"\n          cat signing.properties\n\n      - name: Release Build\n        if: success()\n        run: ./gradlew --no-daemon app:assembleMetaRelease\n\n      - name: Tag Repo\n        uses: richardsimko/update-tag@v1",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Build Pre-Release\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n  push:\n    branches:\n      - main\n\njobs:\n  BuildPreRelease:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n      \n      - name: Checkout submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --remote --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Gradle\n        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n\n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n\n      - name: Cache debug keystore\n        id: cache-keystore\n        uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: ~/.android/debug.keystore\n          key: debug-keystore-${{ runner.os }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            debug-keystore-${{ runner.os }}\n\n      - name: Generate debug keystore if not exists\n        if: steps.cache-keystore.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'\n        run: |\n          mkdir -p ~/.android\n          keytool -genkey -v -keystore ~/.android/debug.keystore -storepass android -alias androiddebugkey -keypass android -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000 -dname \"CN=Android Debug,O=Android,C=US\"\n\n      - name: Update CA\n        run: |\n          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n          sudo update-ca-certificates\n          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n      - name: Signing properties\n        env:\n          SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "          SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}\n        run: |\n          touch signing.properties\n          echo keystore.password=\"$SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD\" \u003e signing.properties\n          echo key.alias=\"$SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n          echo key.password=\"$SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n              \n          echo \"cat signing.properties\"\n          cat signing.properties\n\n      - name: Pre-release Build\n        if: success()\n        run: ./gradlew --no-daemon app:assembleAlphaRelease\n\n      # Delete old Prerelease-alpha\n      - uses: dev-drprasad/delete-tag-and-release@v1.1\n        with:\n          tag_name: Prerelease-alpha\n          github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n          delete_release: true\n\n      - name: Tag Repo\n        uses: richardsimko/update-tag@v1\n        with:\n          tag_name: Prerelease-alpha\n        env:\n          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n      - name: Upload Alpha\n        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2\n        if: ${{  success() }}\n        with:\n          tag_name: Prerelease-alpha\n          files: app/build/outputs/apk/alpha/release/*\n          prerelease: true\n          generate_release_notes: true\n\n      - name: Release Changelog Builder\n        uses: mikepenz/release-changelog-builder-action@v4\n        continue-on-error: true",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "      - name: Tag Repo\n        uses: richardsimko/update-tag@v1\n        with:\n          tag_name: ${{ inputs.release-tag }}\n        env:\n          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n      - name: Upload Release\n        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1\n        if: ${{ success() }}\n        with:\n          tag_name: ${{ inputs.release-tag }}\n          files: app/build/outputs/apk/meta/release/*\n          generate_release_notes: true\n\n      - name: Release Changelog Builder\n        uses: mikepenz/release-changelog-builder-action@v4.1.1\n        with:\n          configurationJson: |\n            {\n              \"ignore_labels\": [\n                \"Update\"\n              ],\n            }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Build Release\n\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      release-tag:\n        description: 'Release Tag (v2.x.x)'\n        required: true\n\njobs:\n  BuildRelease:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n        with:\n          fetch-depth: 0\n      \n      - name: Checkout submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Gradle\n        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n\n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n      \n      - name: Convert and set version env\n        id: process-version\n        run: |\n          VERSION_TAG=${{ inputs.release-tag }}\n          VERSION_TAG=${VERSION_TAG#v}                              # remove the 'v' prefix\n          IFS='.' read -ra VERSION_PARTS \u003c\u003c\u003c \"$VERSION_TAG\"         # split into array\n          VERSION_CODE=$(printf \"%1d%02d%03d\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[0]}\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[1]}\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[2]}\")\n          \n          echo \"versonName=$VERSION_TAG\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_OUTPUT          # \"1.2.3\"\n          echo \"versonCode=$VERSION_CODE\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_OUTPUT         # \"102003\"\n      \n      # Re-write version in build.gradle.kts\n      - name: Re-write version\n        uses: Devofure/advance-android-version-actions@v1.5\n        with:\n          gradlePath: build.gradle.kts\n          versionCode: ${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonCode }}\n          versionName: ${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonName }}\n      \n      # If any change found, commit it and push\n      - name: Commit and push if changes\n        ",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        merge-multiple: true\n\n    - name: Calculate checksums\n      run: |\n        cd bin/\n        find . -type f -not -name \"checksums.*\" -not -name \"version.txt\" | sort | xargs sha256sum \u003e checksums.txt\n        cat checksums.txt\n      shell: bash\n\n    - name: Delete current release assets\n      uses: 8Mi-Tech/delete-release-assets-action@main\n      with:\n        github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n        tag: Prerelease-${{ github.ref_name }}\n        deleteOnlyFromDrafts: false\n    - name: Set Env\n      run: |\n        echo \"BUILDTIME=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date)\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n      shell: bash\n\n    - name: Tag Repo\n      uses: richardsimko/update-tag@v1\n      with:\n        tag_name: Prerelease-${{ github.ref_name }}\n      env:\n        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n      \n    - run: |\n        cat \u003e release.txt \u003c\u003c 'EOF'\n        Release created at  ${{ env.BUILDTIME }}\n        Synchronize ${{ github.ref_name }} branch code updates, keeping only the latest version\n        \u003cbr\u003e\n        [我应该下载哪个文件? / Which file should I download?](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/wiki/FAQ)\n        [二进制文件筛选 / Binary file selector](https://metacubex.github.io/Meta-Docs/startup/#_1)\n        [查看文档 / Docs](https://metacubex.github.io/Meta-Docs/)\n        EOF\n\n    - name: Upload Prerelease\n      uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1\n      if: ${{  success() }}\n      with:\n        tag_name: Prerelease-${{ github.ref_name }}\n        files: |\n          bin/*\n        prerelease: true\n        generate_release_notes: true\n        body_path: release.txt\n\n  Upload-Release:\n    permissions: write-all\n    if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' \u0026\u0026 github.event.inputs.version != '' }}\n    needs: [build]\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout\n        uses: actions/checkout@v5\n        with:\n          ref: Meta\n          fetch-depth: '0'\n          fetch-tags: 'true'\n\n      - name: Get tags",

            "text": "        cat checksums.txt"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "          fetch-tags: 'true'\n\n      - name: Get tags\n        run: |\n          echo \"CURRENTVERSION=${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n          git fetch --tags\n          echo \"PREVERSION=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 HEAD)\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n\n      - name: Force push Alpha branch to Meta\n        run: |\n          git config --global user.email \"github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com\"\n          git config --global user.name \"github-actions[bot]\"\n          git fetch origin Alpha:Alpha\n          git push origin Alpha:Meta --force\n        env:\n          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n      - name: Tag the commit on Alpha\n        run: |\n          git checkout Alpha \n          git tag ${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\n          git push origin ${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\n        env:\n          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n      - name: Generate release notes\n        run: |\n            cp ./.github/genReleaseNote.sh ./\n            bash ./genReleaseNote.sh -v ${PREVERSION}...${CURRENTVERSION}\n            rm ./genReleaseNote.sh\n  \n      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v4\n        with:\n          path: bin/\n          merge-multiple: true\n  \n      - name: Display structure of downloaded files\n        run: ls -R\n        working-directory: bin\n  \n      - name: Upload Release\n        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2\n        if: ${{ success() }}\n        with:\n          tag_name: ${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\n          files: bin/*\n          body_path: release.md",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Build Debug\non:\n  pull_request:\n    types: [opened, reopened, synchronize]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\njobs:\n  BuildDebug:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n      \n      - name: Checkout submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Gradle\n        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n\n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n\n      - name: Update CA\n        run: |\n          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n          sudo update-ca-certificates\n          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n      # - name: Signing properties\n      #   env:\n      #     SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD }}\n      #     SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}\n      #     SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}\n      #   run: |\n      #     touch signing.properties\n      #     echo keystore.password=\"$SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD\" \u003e signing.properties\n      #     echo key.alias=\"$SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n      #     echo key.password=\"$SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n            \n      #     echo \"cat signing.properties\"\n      #     cat signing.properties\n\n      - name: Build\n        if: success()",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    - name: Build core\n      env:\n        GOOS: ${{matrix.jobs.goos}}\n        GOARCH: ${{matrix.jobs.goarch}}\n        GOAMD64: ${{matrix.jobs.goamd64}}\n        GO386: ${{matrix.jobs.go386}}\n        GOARM: ${{matrix.jobs.goarm}}\n        GOMIPS: ${{matrix.jobs.gomips}}\n      run: |\n        go env\n        go build -v -tags \"with_gvisor\" -trimpath -ldflags \"${BUILDTAG} -X 'github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant.Version=${VERSION}' -X 'github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant.BuildTime=${BUILDTIME}' -w -s -buildid=\"\n        if [ \"${{matrix.jobs.goos}}\" = \"windows\" ]; then\n          cp mihomo.exe mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}.exe\n          zip -r mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}-${VERSION}.zip mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}.exe\n        else\n          cp mihomo mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}\n          gzip -c mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}} \u003e mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}-${VERSION}.gz\n          rm mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}\n        fi\n\n    - name: Save version\n      run: |\n        echo ${VERSION} \u003e version.txt\n      shell: bash\n\n    - name: Archive production artifacts\n      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4\n      with:\n        name: \"${{ matrix.jobs.goos }}-${{ matrix.jobs.output }}\"\n        path: |\n          mihomo*.gz\n          mihomo*.zip\n          version.txt\n\n  Upload-Prerelease:\n    permissions: write-all\n    if: ${{ github.event_name != 'workflow_dispatch' \u0026\u0026 github.ref_type == 'branch' \u0026\u0026 !startsWith(github.event_name, 'pull_request') }}\n    needs: [build]\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n    - name: Download all workflow run artifacts\n      uses: actions/download-artifact@v4\n      with:\n        path: bin/\n        merge-multiple: true\n\n    - name: Calculate checksums",
        "detailedLines": [

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "            }\n        }\n\n        signingConfigs {\n            val keystore = rootProject.file(\"signing.properties\")\n            if (keystore.exists()) {\n                create(\"release\") {\n                    val prop = Properties().apply {\n                        keystore.inputStream().use(this::load)\n                    }\n\n                    storeFile = rootProject.file(\"release.keystore\")\n                    storePassword = prop.getProperty(\"keystore.password\")!!\n                    keyAlias = prop.getProperty(\"key.alias\")!!\n                    keyPassword = prop.getProperty(\"key.password\")!!\n                }\n            }\n            // 如果没有signing.properties，release构建会使用debug签名配置\n            // 这样可以确保release构建始终使用相同的签名，避免签名不匹配的问题\n            // 注意：为了保持签名一致，建议始终使用相同的签名配置（要么都有signing.properties，要么都没有）\n        }\n\n        buildTypes {\n            named(\"release\") {\n                isMinifyEnabled = isApp\n                isShrinkResources = isApp\n                // 如果存在release签名配置就使用它，否则使用debug签名配置\n                // 这样可以确保即使没有signing.properties，release构建也使用一致的签名\n                signingConfig = signingConfigs.findByName(\"release\") ?: signingConfigs[\"debug\"]\n                proguardFiles(\n                    getDefaultProguardFile(\"proguard-android-optimize.txt\"),\n                    \"proguard-rules.pro\"\n                )\n            }\n            named(\"debug\") {\n                versionNameSuffix = \".debug\"\n            }\n        }\n\n        buildFeatures.apply {\n            dataBinding {\n                isEnabled = name != \"hideapi\"\n            }\n        }\n\n        if (isApp) {\n            this as AppExtension\n\n            splits {\n                abi {\n                    isEnable = true\n                    isUniversalApk = false\n                    reset()\n                    include(\"arm64-v8a\")\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        compileOptions {\n            sourceCompatibility = JavaVersion.VERSION_21\n            targetCompatibility = JavaVersion.VERSION_21\n        }\n    }\n}\n\ntask(\"clean\", type = Delete::class) {\n    delete(rootProject.buildDir)\n}",

        "contents": ".gradle\nbuild/\n/app/foss/release\n/app/premium/release\n/captures\n\n# Ignore Gradle GUI config\ngradle-app.setting\n\n# Avoid ignoring Gradle wrapper jar targetFile (.jar files are usually ignored)\n!gradle-wrapper.jar\n\n# Cache of project\n.gradletasknamecache\n\n# # Work around https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/IDEA-116898\n# gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties\n\n# Ignore IDEA config\n*.iml\n/.idea/*\n!/.idea/codeStyles\n/core/src/main/golang/.idea/*\n!/core/src/main/golang/.idea/codeStyles\n/core/src/foss/golang/.idea/*\n!/core/src/foss/golang/.idea/codeStyles\n/core/src/premium/golang/.idea/*\n!/core/src/premium/golang/.idea/codeStyles\n\n# Ignore builtin geofiles\napp/src/main/assets\n\n# KeyStore\nsigning.properties\n*.keystore\n*.jks\n\n# clion cmake build\ncmake-build-*\n\n# local.properties\nlocal.properties\n\n\n# tracker\ntracker.properties\n\n# vscode\n.vscode\n\n# cxx\n.cxx\n\n*.hprof\n\n# firebase\ngoogle-services.json\n\n# Dolphin\n.directory\n\n# logs\n*.log\n\n# MacOS\n.DS_Store",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "      - name: Build\n        if: success()\n        run: ./gradlew --no-daemon app:assembleAlphaRelease\n          \n      - name: Upload Aritfact (arm64-v8a)\n        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4\n        if: ${{  success() }}\n        with:\n          name: CMFA Debug Unsigned APK (arm64-v8a)\n          path: |\n            app/build/outputs/apk/alpha/release/*-arm64-v8a-*.apk",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,

            "lineNumber": 64,

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "        if: ${{  success() }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "          name: CMFA Debug Unsigned APK (arm64-v8a)"
          },
          {

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "      with:\n        go-version: '1.25'\n        check-latest: true\n\n    - name: Set variables\n      run: |\n        # Generate version with date and build time (YYMMDD-HHMM) using Asia/Shanghai timezone\n        BUILD_DATE=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date +%y%m%d)\n        BUILD_TIME=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date +%H%M)\n        \n        if [ -n \"${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\" ]; then\n          # Manual release: use provided version\n          VERSION=${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\n          PackageVersion=\"${VERSION#v}\"\n        elif [[ \"${{ github.ref }}\" == refs/tags/* ]]; then\n          # Tag build: use tag name\n          VERSION=\"${GITHUB_REF_NAME}\"\n          PackageVersion=\"${VERSION#v}\"\n        else\n          # Branch build: use date-time format (YYYYMMDD-HHMM)\n          VERSION=\"${BUILD_DATE}-${BUILD_TIME}\"\n          PackageVersion=\"$(curl -s \"https://api.github.com/repos/MetaCubeX/mihomo/releases/latest\" | jq -r '.tag_name' | sed 's/v//g' | awk -F '.' '{$NF = $NF + 1; print}' OFS='.').${VERSION/-/.}\"\n        fi\n        \n        echo \"VERSION=${VERSION}\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"PackageVersion=${PackageVersion}\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n      \n        echo \"BUILDTIME=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date)\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"CGO_ENABLED=0\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"BUILDTAG=-extldflags --static\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"GOTOOLCHAIN=local\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n\n    - name: Update CA\n      run: |\n        sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n        sudo update-ca-certificates\n        cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n    - name: Build core\n      env:\n        GOOS: ${{matrix.jobs.goos}}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Update Clash-Core and Go Modules\non:\n  repository_dispatch:\n    types:\n      - core-updated\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\njobs:\n  update-dependencies:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n      \n      - name: Checkout and Update submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --remote --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n      \n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n\n      - name: Install update-go-mod-replace\n        run: |\n          go install github.com/metacubex/update-go-mod-replace@latest\n\n      - name: Update Foss Gomod\n        run: |\n          cd ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/foss/golang/\n          update-go-mod-replace ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/foss/golang/clash/go.mod $(pwd)/go.mod\n          go mod tidy\n\n      - name: Update Main Gomod\n        run: |\n          cd ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/main/golang/\n          update-go-mod-replace ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/foss/golang/clash/go.mod $(pwd)/go.mod\n          go mod tidy\n\n      - uses: tibdex/github-app-token@v2\n        id: generate-token\n        with:\n          app_id: ${{ secrets.MAINTAINER_APPID }}\n          private_key: ${{ secrets.MAINTAINER_APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}\n\n      - name: Create Pull Request\n        id: cpr\n        uses: peter-evans/create-pull-request@v6\n        with:\n          token: ${{ steps.generate-token.outputs.token }}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "name: Update Clash-Core and Go Modules"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "on:"

            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "  repository_dispatch:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "    types:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "      - core-updated"

          },

            "text": "jobs:"

          },

            "text": "      - name: Setup Java"

            "text": "          token: ${{ steps.generate-token.outputs.token }}"

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Build\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      version:\n        description: \"Tag version to release\"\n        required: true\n  push:\n    paths-ignore:\n      - \"docs/**\"\n      - \"README.md\"\n      - \".github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/**\"\n    branches:\n      - Alpha\n    tags:\n      - \"v*\"\n  pull_request:\n    branches:\n      - Alpha\nconcurrency:\n  group: \"${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}\"\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n  \nenv:\n  REGISTRY: docker.io\njobs:\n  build:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    strategy:\n      matrix:\n        jobs:\n          # Windows 11 等现代 PC：64 位、Go 1.25、AMD64 v3\n          - { goos: windows, goarch: amd64, goamd64: v3, output: amd64 }\n\n    steps:\n    - uses: actions/checkout@v5\n\n    - name: Set up Go\n      uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n      with:\n        go-version: '1.25'\n        check-latest: true\n\n    - name: Set variables\n      run: |\n        ",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "-s dir\n--name mihomo\n--category net\n--license GPL-3.0-or-later\n--description \"The universal proxy platform.\"\n--url \"https://wiki.metacubex.one/\"\n--maintainer \"MetaCubeX \u003cnone@example.com\u003e\"\n--deb-field \"Bug: https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/issues\"\n--no-deb-generate-changes\n--config-files /etc/mihomo/config.yaml\n\n.github/release/config.yaml=/etc/mihomo/config.yaml\n\n.github/release/mihomo.service=/usr/lib/systemd/system/mihomo.service\n.github/release/mihomo@.service=/usr/lib/systemd/system/mihomo@.service\n\n\nLICENSE=/usr/share/licenses/mihomo/LICENSE",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "## Clash Meta for Android\n\nA Graphical user interface of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta) for Android\n\n### Feature\n\nFeature of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta)\n\n[\u003cimg src=\"https://fdroid.gitlab.io/artwork/badge/get-it-on.png\"\n     alt=\"Get it on F-Droid\"\n     height=\"80\"\u003e](https://f-droid.org/packages/com.github.metacubex.clash.meta/)\n\n### Requirement\n\n- Android 5.0+ (minimum)\n- Android 7.0+ (recommend)\n- &#96;armeabi-v7a&#96; , &#96;arm64-v8a&#96;, &#96;x86&#96; or &#96;x86_64&#96; Architecture\n\n### Build\n\n1. Update submodules\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n   git submodule update --init --recursive\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n2. Install **OpenJDK 11**, **Android SDK**, **CMake** and **Golang**\n\n3. Create &#96;local.properties&#96; in project root with\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   sdk.dir=/path/to/android-sdk\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n4. (Optional) Custom app package name. Add the following configuration to &#96;local.properties&#96;.\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   # config your ownn applicationId, or it will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash'\n   custom.application.id=com.my.compile.clash\n   # remove application id suffix, or the applicaion id will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash.alpha'\n   remove.suffix=true\n\n5. Create &#96;signing.properties&#96; in project root with\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   keystore.path=/path/to/keystore/file\n   keystore.password=\u003ckey store password\u003e\n   key.alias=\u003ckey alias\u003e\n   key.password=\u003ckey password\u003e\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n6. Build\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n   ./gradlew app:assembleAlphaRelease\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Automation\n\nAPP package name is &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta&#96;\n\n- Toggle Clash.Meta service status\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.TOGGLE_CLASH&#96;\n- Start Clash.Meta service\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.START_CLASH&#96;\n- Stop Clash.Meta service\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.STOP_CLASH&#96;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "## Clash Meta for Android"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "A Graphical user interface of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta) for Android"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "### Feature"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "Feature of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "[\u003cimg src=\"https://fdroid.gitlab.io/artwork/badge/get-it-on.png\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "     alt=\"Get it on F-Droid\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "     height=\"80\"\u003e](https://f-droid.org/packages/com.github.metacubex.clash.meta/)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "### Requirement"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "- Android 5.0+ (minimum)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "- Android 7.0+ (recommend)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- &#96;armeabi-v7a&#96; , &#96;arm64-v8a&#96;, &#96;x86&#96; or &#96;x86_64&#96; Architecture"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "### Build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "1. Update submodules"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "   git submodule update --init --recursive"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "2. Install **OpenJDK 11**, **Android SDK**, **CMake** and **Golang**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "3. Create &#96;local.properties&#96; in project root with"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "   sdk.dir=/path/to/android-sdk"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "4. (Optional) Custom app package name. Add the following configuration to &#96;local.properties&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "   # config your ownn applicationId, or it will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "   custom.application.id=com.my.compile.clash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "   # remove application id suffix, or the applicaion id will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash.alpha'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "   remove.suffix=true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "5. Create &#96;signing.properties&#96; in project root with"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "   keystore.path=/path/to/keystore/file"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "   keystore.password=\u003ckey store password\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "   key.alias=\u003ckey alias\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "   key.password=\u003ckey password\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "6. Build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "   ./gradlew app:assembleAlphaRelease"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "### Automation"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "APP package name is &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "- Toggle Clash.Meta service status"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.TOGGLE_CLASH&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "- Start Clash.Meta service"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.START_CLASH&#96;"

            "lineNumber": 67,

          }
        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "#!/bin/bash\n\nFILENAMES=$(ls)\nfor FILENAME in $FILENAMES\ndo\n    if [[ ! ($FILENAME =~ \".exe\" || $FILENAME =~ \".sh\")]];then\n        gzip -S \".gz\" $FILENAME\n    elif [[ $FILENAME =~ \".exe\" ]];then\n        zip -m ${FILENAME%.*}.zip $FILENAME\n    else echo \"skip $FILENAME\"\n    fi\ndone\n\nFILENAMES=$(ls)\nfor FILENAME in $FILENAMES\ndo\n    if [[ $FILENAME =~ \".zip\" ]];then\n        echo \"rename $FILENAME\"\n        mv $FILENAME ${FILENAME%.*}-${VERSION}.zip\n    elif [[ $FILENAME =~ \".gz\" ]];then\n        echo \"rename $FILENAME\"\n        mv $FILENAME ${FILENAME%.*}-${VERSION}.gz\n    else\n        echo \"skip $FILENAME\"\n    fi\ndone",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "#!/bin/bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "FILENAMES=$(ls)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "for FILENAME in $FILENAMES"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "do"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "    if [[ ! ($FILENAME =~ \".exe\" || $FILENAME =~ \".sh\")]];then"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "        gzip -S \".gz\" $FILENAME"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "    elif [[ $FILENAME =~ \".exe\" ]];then"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "        zip -m ${FILENAME%.*}.zip $FILENAME"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    else echo \"skip $FILENAME\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    fi"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "done"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "FILENAMES=$(ls)"
          },

            "lineNumber": 15,

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "- Stop Clash.Meta service\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.STOP_CLASH&#96;\n- Import a profile\n  - URL Scheme &#96;clash://install-config?url=\u003cencoded URI\u003e&#96; or &#96;clashmeta://install-config?url=\u003cencoded URI\u003e&#96;\n\n### Contribution and Project Maintenance\n\n#### Meta Kernel\n\n- CMFA uses the kernel from &#96;android-real&#96; branch under &#96;MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta&#96;, which is a merge of the main &#96;Alpha&#96; branch and &#96;android-open&#96;.\n  - If you want to contribute to the kernel, make PRs to &#96;Alpha&#96; branch of the Meta kernel repository.\n  - If you want to contribute Android-specific patches to the kernel, make PRs to  &#96;android-open&#96; branch of the Meta kernel repository.\n\n#### Maintenance\n\n- When &#96;MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta&#96; kernel is updated to a new version, the &#96;Update Dependencies&#96; actions in this repo will be triggered automatically.\n  - It will pull the new version of the meta kernel, update all the golang dependencies, and create a PR without manual intervention.\n  - If there is any compile error in PR, you need to fix it before merging. Alternatively, you may merge the PR directly.\n- Manually triggering &#96;Build Pre-Release&#96; actions will compile and publish a &#96;PreRelease&#96; version.\n- Manually triggering &#96;Build Release&#96; actions will compile, tag and publish a &#96;Release&#96; version.\n  - You must fill the blank &#96;Release Tag&#96; with the tag you want to release in the format of &#96;v1.2.3&#96;.\n  - &#96;versionName&#96; and &#96;versionCode&#96; in &#96;build.gradle.kts&#96; will be automatically bumped to the tag you filled above.",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "- Stop Clash.Meta service"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.STOP_CLASH&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "- Import a profile"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "  - URL Scheme &#96;clash://install-config?url=\u003cencoded URI\u003e&#96; or &#96;clashmeta://install-config?url=\u003cencoded URI\u003e&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "### Contribution and Project Maintenance"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "#### Meta Kernel"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "- CMFA uses the kernel from &#96;android-real&#96; branch under &#96;MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta&#96;, which is a merge of the main &#96;Alpha&#96; branch and &#96;android-open&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "  - If you want to contribute to the kernel, make PRs to &#96;Alpha&#96; branch of the Meta kernel repository."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "  - If you want to contribute Android-specific patches to the kernel, make PRs to  &#96;android-open&#96; branch of the Meta kernel repository."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "#### Maintenance"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "- When &#96;MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta&#96; kernel is updated to a new version, the &#96;Update Dependencies&#96; actions in this repo will be triggered automatically."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "  - It will pull the new version of the meta kernel, update all the golang dependencies, and create a PR without manual intervention."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "  - If there is any compile error in PR, you need to fix it before merging. Alternatively, you may merge the PR directly."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "- Manually triggering &#96;Build Pre-Release&#96; actions will compile and publish a &#96;PreRelease&#96; version."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "- Manually triggering &#96;Build Release&#96; actions will compile, tag and publish a &#96;Release&#96; version."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "  - You must fill the blank &#96;Release Tag&#96; with the tag you want to release in the format of &#96;v1.2.3&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "  - &#96;versionName&#96; and &#96;versionCode&#96; in &#96;build.gradle.kts&#96; will be automatically bumped to the tag you filled above."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 87
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 65
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\README.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.2794038653373718
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.0)\n\n# 获取git hash\n\nmessage(STATUS \"CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR= ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}\")\nexecute_process(\n  COMMAND git submodule foreach git log -1 --format=%H   \n  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} \n  OUTPUT_VARIABLE COMMIT_HASH\n)\nstring(REPLACE \"\\n\" \";\" COMMIT_HASH \"${COMMIT_HASH}\")\nlist(GET COMMIT_HASH 1 COMMIT_HASH)\nstring (REGEX REPLACE \"[\\n\\t\\r]\" \"\" COMMIT_HASH ${COMMIT_HASH})\nstring(SUBSTRING ${COMMIT_HASH} 0 7 COMMIT_HASH)\nmessage(STATUS \"git hash= ${COMMIT_HASH}\")\n\n# 获取分支名称\nexecute_process(\n  COMMAND git submodule foreach git branch -r --contains ${COMMIT_HASH}\n  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} \n  OUTPUT_VARIABLE CURRENT_BRANCH\n)\nstring(REPLACE \"\\n\" \";\" CURRENT_BRANCH \"${CURRENT_BRANCH}\")\nlist(GET CURRENT_BRANCH 1 CURRENT_BRANCH)\nstring (REGEX REPLACE \"origin/\" \"\" CURRENT_BRANCH ${CURRENT_BRANCH})\nstring (REGEX REPLACE \"[\\n\\t\\r]\" \"\" CURRENT_BRANCH ${CURRENT_BRANCH})\n#string(SUBSTRING ${CURRENT_BRANCH} 0 8 CURRENT_BRANCH)\nmessage(STATUS \"git current branch = ${CURRENT_BRANCH}\")\n\n# 获取生成时间\nstring(TIMESTAMP COMPILE_TIME \"%y%m%d\")\nstring (REGEX REPLACE \"[\\n\\t\\r]\" \"\" COMPILE_TIME ${COMPILE_TIME})\nstring(REGEX REPLACE \"\\\"\" \"\" COMPILE_TIME ${COMPILE_TIME})\n\n# 生成版本信息\nset(GIT_VERSION \"${CURRENT_BRANCH}_${COMMIT_HASH}_${COMPILE_TIME}\")\nmessage(STATUS \"version info = ${GIT_VERSION}\")\n\n# 去除空格\nstring(REGEX REPLACE \"[ ]+\" \"\" GIT_VERSION \"${GIT_VERSION}\")\n\n# 保存变量到文件\nconfigure_file(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/version.h.in ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/version.h @ONLY)\n\nproject(clash-bridge C)\n\n\nset(CMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE on)\nset(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE \"${CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE} -O3\")\n\nset(GO_OUTPUT_BASE ${GO_OUTPUT}/${FLAVOR_NAME})\n\nif (\"${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\" STREQUAL \"Debug\")\n    set(GO_OUTPUT_BASE \"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}Debug\")\nelseif (\"${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\" STREQUAL \"Release\")\n    set(GO_OUTPUT_BASE \"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}Release\")\nelseif (\"${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\" STREQUAL \"RelWithDebInfo\")\n    set(GO_OUTPUT_BASE \"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}Release\")",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import java.net.URL\nimport java.nio.file.Files\nimport java.nio.file.StandardCopyOption\n\nplugins {\n    kotlin(\"android\")\n    kotlin(\"kapt\")\n    id(\"com.android.application\")\n}\n\ndependencies {\n    compileOnly(project(\":hideapi\"))\n\n    implementation(project(\":core\"))\n    implementation(project(\":service\"))\n    implementation(project(\":design\"))\n    implementation(project(\":common\"))\n\n    implementation(libs.kotlin.coroutine)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.core)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.activity)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.fragment)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.appcompat)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.coordinator)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.recyclerview)\n    implementation(libs.google.material)\n    implementation(libs.quickie.bundled)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.activity.ktx)\n}\n\ntasks.getByName(\"clean\", type = Delete::class) {\n    delete(file(\"release\"))\n}\n\nval geoFilesDownloadDir = \"src/main/assets\"\n\ntask(\"downloadGeoFiles\") {\n\n    val geoFilesUrls = mapOf(\n        \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/meta-rules-dat/releases/download/latest/geoip.metadb\" to \"geoip.metadb\",\n        \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/meta-rules-dat/releases/download/latest/geosite.dat\" to \"geosite.dat\",\n        // \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/meta-rules-dat/releases/download/latest/country.mmdb\" to \"country.mmdb\",\n        \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/meta-rules-dat/releases/download/latest/GeoLite2-ASN.mmdb\" to \"ASN.mmdb\",\n    )\n\n    doLast {\n        geoFilesUrls.forEach { (downloadUrl, outputFileName) -\u003e\n            val url = URL(downloadUrl)\n            val outputPath = file(\"$geoFilesDownloadDir/$outputFileName\")\n            outputPath.parentFile.mkdirs()\n            url.openStream().use { input -\u003e\n                Files.copy(input, outputPath.toPath(), StandardCopyOption.REPLACE_EXISTING)\n                println(\"$outputFileName downloaded to $outputPath\")\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nafterEvaluate {\n    val downloadGeoFilesTask = tasks[\"downloadGeoFiles\"]",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Trigger CMFA Update\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n  push:\n    paths-ignore:\n      - \"docs/**\"\n      - \"README.md\"\n      - \".github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/**\"\n    branches:\n      - Alpha\n    tags:\n      - \"v*\"\n      \njobs:\n  # Send \"core-updated\" to MetaCubeX/ClashMetaForAndroid to trigger update-dependencies\n  trigger-CMFA-update:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - uses: tibdex/github-app-token@v1\n        id: generate-token\n        with:\n          app_id: ${{ secrets.MAINTAINER_APPID }}\n          private_key: ${{ secrets.MAINTAINER_APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}\n      \n      - name: Trigger update-dependencies\n        run: |\n          curl -X POST https://api.github.com/repos/MetaCubeX/ClashMetaForAndroid/dispatches \\\n            -H \"Accept: application/vnd.github.everest-preview+json\" \\\n            -H \"Authorization: token ${{ steps.generate-token.outputs.token }}\" \\\n            -d '{\"event_type\": \"core-updated\"}'",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "name: Trigger CMFA Update"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "on:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "  workflow_dispatch:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "  push:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "    paths-ignore:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "      - \"docs/**\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "      - \"README.md\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "      - \".github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/**\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "    branches:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "      - Alpha"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    tags:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "      - \"v*\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "      "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "jobs:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "  # Send \"core-updated\" to MetaCubeX/ClashMetaForAndroid to trigger update-dependencies"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "  trigger-CMFA-update:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    runs-on: ubuntu-latest"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    steps:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "      - uses: tibdex/github-app-token@v1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        id: generate-token"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "          app_id: ${{ secrets.MAINTAINER_APPID }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "          private_key: ${{ secrets.MAINTAINER_APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "      "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "      - name: Trigger update-dependencies"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "        run: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "          curl -X POST https://api.github.com/repos/MetaCubeX/ClashMetaForAndroid/dispatches \\"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "            -H \"Accept: application/vnd.github.everest-preview+json\" \\"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "            -H \"Authorization: token ${{ steps.generate-token.outputs.token }}\" \\"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "            -d '{\"event_type\": \"core-updated\"}'"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 30
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\core\\src\\foss\\golang\\clash\\.github\\workflows\\trigger-cmfa-update.yml",

        "contents": "@file:Suppress(\"UNUSED_VARIABLE\")\n\nimport com.android.build.gradle.AppExtension\nimport com.android.build.gradle.BaseExtension\nimport java.net.URL\nimport java.util.*\n\nbuildscript {\n    repositories {\n        mavenCentral()\n        google()\n        maven(\"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MetaCubeX/maven-backup/main/releases\")\n    }\n    dependencies {\n        classpath(libs.build.android)\n        classpath(libs.build.kotlin.common)\n        classpath(libs.build.kotlin.serialization)\n        classpath(libs.build.ksp)\n        classpath(libs.build.golang)\n    }\n}\n\nsubprojects {\n    repositories {\n        mavenCentral()\n        google()\n        maven(\"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MetaCubeX/maven-backup/main/releases\")\n    }\n\n    val isApp = name == \"app\"\n\n    apply(plugin = if (isApp) \"com.android.application\" else \"com.android.library\")\n\n    fun queryConfigProperty(key: String): Any? {\n        val localProperties = Properties()\n        val localPropertiesFile = rootProject.file(\"local.properties\")\n        if (localPropertiesFile.exists()) {\n            localProperties.load(localPropertiesFile.inputStream())\n        } else {\n            return null\n        }\n        return localProperties.getProperty(key)\n    }\n\n    extensions.configure\u003cBaseExtension\u003e {\n        buildFeatures.buildConfig = true\n        defaultConfig {\n            ",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    extensions.configure\u003cBaseExtension\u003e {\n        buildFeatures.buildConfig = true\n        defaultConfig {\n            if (isApp) {\n                val customApplicationId = queryConfigProperty(\"custom.application.id\") as? String?\n                applicationId = customApplicationId.takeIf { it?.isNotBlank() == true } ?: \"com.github.metacubex.clash\"\n            }\n\n            project.name.let { name -\u003e\n                namespace = if (name == \"app\") \"com.github.kr328.clash\"\n                else \"com.github.kr328.clash.$name\"\n            }\n\n            minSdk = 21\n            targetSdk = 35\n\n            versionName = \"2.11.22\"\n            versionCode = 211022\n\n            resValue(\"string\", \"release_name\", \"v$versionName\")\n            resValue(\"integer\", \"release_code\", \"$versionCode\")\n\n            externalNativeBuild {\n                cmake {\n                    abiFilters(\"arm64-v8a\")\n                }\n            }\n\n            if (!isApp) {\n                consumerProguardFiles(\"consumer-rules.pro\")\n            } else {\n                setProperty(\"archivesBaseName\", \"cmfa-$versionName\")\n            }\n        }\n\n        ndkVersion = \"27.2.12479018\"\n\n        compileSdkVersion(defaultConfig.targetSdk!!)\n\n        if (isApp) {\n            packagingOptions {\n                resources {\n                    excludes.add(\"DebugProbesKt.bin\")\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        productFlavors {\n            flavorDimensions(\"feature\")",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "{\n  description = \"Another Mihomo Kernel\";\n\n  inputs.nixpkgs.url = \"github:NixOS/nixpkgs/master\";\n\n  inputs.utils.url = \"github:numtide/flake-utils\";\n\n  outputs = { self, nixpkgs, utils }:\n    utils.lib.eachDefaultSystem\n      (system:\n        let\n          pkgs = import nixpkgs {\n            inherit system;\n            overlays = [ self.overlay ];\n          };\n        in\n        rec {\n          packages.default = pkgs.mihomo-meta;\n        }\n      ) //\n    (\n      let version = nixpkgs.lib.substring 0 8 self.lastModifiedDate or self.lastModified or \"19700101\"; in\n      {\n        overlay = final: prev: {\n\n          mihomo-meta = final.buildGo119Module {\n            pname = \"mihomo-meta\";\n            inherit version;\n            src = ./.;\n\n            vendorSha256 = \"sha256-W5oiPtTRin0731QQWr98xZ2Vpk97HYcBtKoi1OKZz+w=\";\n\n            # Do not build testing suit\n            excludedPackages = [ \"./test\" ];\n\n            CGO_ENABLED = 0;\n\n            ldflags = [\n              \"-s\"\n              \"-w\"\n              \"-X github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant.Version=dev-${version}\"\n              \"-X github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant.BuildTime=${version}\"\n            ];\n            \n            tags = [\n              \"with_gvisor\"\n            ];\n\n            # Network required \n            doCheck = false;\n\n            postInstall = ''\n              mv $out/bin/mihomo $out/bin/mihomo-meta\n            '';\n\n          };\n        };\n      }\n    );\n}",
        "detailedLines": [

{
  "codeResults": [
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Build Pre-Release\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n  push:\n    branches:\n      - main\n\njobs:\n  BuildPreRelease:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n      \n      - name: Checkout submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --remote --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Gradle\n        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n\n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n\n      - name: Cache debug keystore\n        id: cache-keystore\n        uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: ~/.android/debug.keystore\n          key: debug-keystore-${{ runner.os }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            debug-keystore-${{ runner.os }}\n\n      - name: Generate debug keystore if not exists\n        if: steps.cache-keystore.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'\n        run: |\n          mkdir -p ~/.android\n          keytool -genkey -v -keystore ~/.android/debug.keystore -storepass android -alias androiddebugkey -keypass android -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000 -dname \"CN=Android Debug,O=Android,C=US\"\n\n      - name: Update CA\n        run: |\n          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n          sudo update-ca-certificates\n          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n      - name: Signing properties\n        env:\n          SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        uses: actions/checkout@v4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "      "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "      - name: Checkout submodules"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --remote --force"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "      - name: Setup Java"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        uses: actions/setup-java@v4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "          distribution: \"temurin\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "          java-version: 21"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "      - name: Setup Gradle"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "      - name: Setup Go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "        uses: actions/setup-go@v6"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "          go-version: \"1.25\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "      - uses: actions/cache@v4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "          path: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "            ~/.cache/go-build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "            ~/go/pkg/mod"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "          restore-keys: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "            ${{ runner.os }}-go-"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "      - name: Cache debug keystore"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "        id: cache-keystore"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "        uses: actions/cache@v4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "          path: ~/.android/debug.keystore"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "          key: debug-keystore-${{ runner.os }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "          restore-keys: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "            debug-keystore-${{ runner.os }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "      - name: Generate debug keystore if not exists"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "        if: steps.cache-keystore.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "        run: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "          mkdir -p ~/.android"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "          keytool -genkey -v -keystore ~/.android/debug.keystore -storepass android -alias androiddebugkey -keypass android -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000 -dname \"CN=Android Debug,O=Android,C=US\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "      - name: Update CA"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "        run: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "          sudo update-ca-certificates"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "      - name: Signing properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "        env:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "          SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "          SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "          SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 67
          },
          "startPosition": {}

      "score": 0.4708487093448639
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "      # If any change found, commit it and push\n      - name: Commit and push if changes\n        run: |\n          changes=$(git diff --name-only origin/main | wc -l)\n          if [ $changes -gt 0 ]\n          then\n            newVersionName=${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonName }}\n            newVersionCode=${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonCode }}\n            git config --global user.name 'GitHub Action'\n            git config --global user.email 'action@github.com'\n            git add build.gradle.kts\n            git commit -am \"Bump version to $newVersionName ($newVersionCode)\"\n            git tag \"v$newVersionName\"\n            git push --follow-tags\n          fi\n\n      - name: Update CA\n        run: |\n          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n          sudo update-ca-certificates\n          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n      - name: Signing properties\n        env:\n          SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}\n        run: |\n          touch signing.properties\n          echo keystore.password=\"$SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD\" \u003e signing.properties\n          echo key.alias=\"$SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n          echo key.password=\"$SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n            \n          echo \"cat signing.properties\"\n          cat signing.properties\n\n      - name: Release Build\n        if: success()\n        run: ./gradlew --no-daemon app:assembleMetaRelease\n\n      - name: Tag Repo\n        uses: richardsimko/update-tag@v1",
        "detailedLines": [
