    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "          SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}\n        run: |\n          touch signing.properties\n          echo keystore.password=\"$SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD\" \u003e signing.properties\n          echo key.alias=\"$SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n          echo key.password=\"$SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n              \n          echo \"cat signing.properties\"\n          cat signing.properties\n\n      - name: Pre-release Build\n        if: success()\n        run: ./gradlew --no-daemon app:assembleAlphaRelease\n\n      # Delete old Prerelease-alpha\n      - uses: dev-drprasad/delete-tag-and-release@v1.1\n        with:\n          tag_name: Prerelease-alpha\n          github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n          delete_release: true\n\n      - name: Tag Repo\n        uses: richardsimko/update-tag@v1\n        with:\n          tag_name: Prerelease-alpha\n        env:\n          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n      - name: Upload Alpha\n        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2\n        if: ${{  success() }}\n        with:\n          tag_name: Prerelease-alpha\n          files: app/build/outputs/apk/alpha/release/*\n          prerelease: true\n          generate_release_notes: true\n\n      - name: Release Changelog Builder\n        uses: mikepenz/release-changelog-builder-action@v4\n        continue-on-error: true",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Build Release\n\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      release-tag:\n        description: 'Release Tag (v2.x.x)'\n        required: true\n\njobs:\n  BuildRelease:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n        with:\n          fetch-depth: 0\n      \n      - name: Checkout submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Gradle\n        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n\n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n      \n      - name: Convert and set version env\n        id: process-version\n        run: |\n          VERSION_TAG=${{ inputs.release-tag }}\n          VERSION_TAG=${VERSION_TAG#v}                              # remove the 'v' prefix\n          IFS='.' read -ra VERSION_PARTS \u003c\u003c\u003c \"$VERSION_TAG\"         # split into array\n          VERSION_CODE=$(printf \"%1d%02d%03d\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[0]}\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[1]}\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[2]}\")\n          \n          echo \"versonName=$VERSION_TAG\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_OUTPUT          # \"1.2.3\"\n          echo \"versonCode=$VERSION_CODE\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_OUTPUT         # \"102003\"\n      \n      # Re-write version in build.gradle.kts\n      - name: Re-write version\n        uses: Devofure/advance-android-version-actions@v1.5\n        with:\n          gradlePath: build.gradle.kts\n          versionCode: ${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonCode }}\n          versionName: ${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonName }}\n      \n      # If any change found, commit it and push\n      - name: Commit and push if changes\n        ",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "text": "            ${{ runner.os }}-go-"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "      "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "      - name: Convert and set version env"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "        id: process-version"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "        run: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "          VERSION_TAG=${{ inputs.release-tag }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "          VERSION_TAG=${VERSION_TAG#v}                              # remove the 'v' prefix"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "          IFS='.' read -ra VERSION_PARTS \u003c\u003c\u003c \"$VERSION_TAG\"         # split into array"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "          VERSION_CODE=$(printf \"%1d%02d%03d\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[0]}\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[1]}\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[2]}\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "          "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "          echo \"versonName=$VERSION_TAG\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_OUTPUT          # \"1.2.3\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "          echo \"versonCode=$VERSION_CODE\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_OUTPUT         # \"102003\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "      "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "      # Re-write version in build.gradle.kts"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "      - name: Re-write version"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "        uses: Devofure/advance-android-version-actions@v1.5"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "          gradlePath: build.gradle.kts"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "          versionCode: ${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonCode }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "          versionName: ${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonName }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "      "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "      # If any change found, commit it and push"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "      - name: Commit and push if changes"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "        "
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 8,
            "line": 66
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\.github\\workflows\\build-release.yaml",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.3974258005619049
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "      - name: Tag Repo\n        uses: richardsimko/update-tag@v1\n        with:\n          tag_name: ${{ inputs.release-tag }}\n        env:\n          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n      - name: Upload Release\n        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1\n        if: ${{ success() }}\n        with:\n          tag_name: ${{ inputs.release-tag }}\n          files: app/build/outputs/apk/meta/release/*\n          generate_release_notes: true\n\n      - name: Release Changelog Builder\n        uses: mikepenz/release-changelog-builder-action@v4.1.1\n        with:\n          configurationJson: |\n            {\n              \"ignore_labels\": [\n                \"Update\"\n              ],\n            }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "      - name: Tag Repo"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "        uses: richardsimko/update-tag@v1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "          tag_name: ${{ inputs.release-tag }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "        env:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "      - name: Upload Release"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1"
          },

            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "        if: ${{ success() }}"

            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "        with:"

            "text": "          tag_name: ${{ inputs.release-tag }}"

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Build Debug\non:\n  pull_request:\n    types: [opened, reopened, synchronize]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\njobs:\n  BuildDebug:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n      \n      - name: Checkout submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Gradle\n        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n\n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n\n      - name: Update CA\n        run: |\n          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n          sudo update-ca-certificates\n          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n      # - name: Signing properties\n      #   env:\n      #     SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD }}\n      #     SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}\n      #     SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}\n      #   run: |\n      #     touch signing.properties\n      #     echo keystore.password=\"$SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD\" \u003e signing.properties\n      #     echo key.alias=\"$SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n      #     echo key.password=\"$SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n            \n      #     echo \"cat signing.properties\"\n      #     cat signing.properties\n\n      - name: Build\n        if: success()",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Update Clash-Core and Go Modules\non:\n  repository_dispatch:\n    types:\n      - core-updated\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\njobs:\n  update-dependencies:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n      \n      - name: Checkout and Update submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --remote --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n      \n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n\n      - name: Install update-go-mod-replace\n        run: |\n          go install github.com/metacubex/update-go-mod-replace@latest\n\n      - name: Update Foss Gomod\n        run: |\n          cd ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/foss/golang/\n          update-go-mod-replace ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/foss/golang/clash/go.mod $(pwd)/go.mod\n          go mod tidy\n\n      - name: Update Main Gomod\n        run: |\n          cd ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/main/golang/\n          update-go-mod-replace ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/foss/golang/clash/go.mod $(pwd)/go.mod\n          go mod tidy\n\n      - uses: tibdex/github-app-token@v2\n        id: generate-token\n        with:\n          app_id: ${{ secrets.MAINTAINER_APPID }}\n          private_key: ${{ secrets.MAINTAINER_APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}\n\n      - name: Create Pull Request\n        id: cpr\n        uses: peter-evans/create-pull-request@v6\n        with:\n          token: ${{ steps.generate-token.outputs.token }}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "      - name: Build\n        if: success()\n        run: ./gradlew --no-daemon app:assembleAlphaRelease\n          \n      - name: Upload Aritfact (arm64-v8a)\n        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4\n        if: ${{  success() }}\n        with:\n          name: CMFA Debug Unsigned APK (arm64-v8a)\n          path: |\n            app/build/outputs/apk/alpha/release/*-arm64-v8a-*.apk",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "      - name: Build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "        if: success()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "        run: ./gradlew --no-daemon app:assembleAlphaRelease"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "          "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "      - name: Upload Aritfact (arm64-v8a)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "        if: ${{  success() }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "        with:"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        with:\n          token: ${{ steps.generate-token.outputs.token }}\n          commit-message: Update Dependencies\n          branch: update-dependencies\n          delete-branch: true\n          title: 'Update Dependencies'\n          draft: false\n          body: |\n            - Update Clash-Meta Core\n            - Update Go Module Dependecies\n          labels: |\n            Update\n        \n      - name: PR result\n        if: ${{ steps.cpr.outputs.pull-request-number }}\n        run: |\n          echo \"Pull Request Number - ${{ steps.cpr.outputs.pull-request-number }}\"\n          echo \"Pull Request URL - ${{ steps.cpr.outputs.pull-request-url }}\"\n      ",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "        with:"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: \"[English] Bug Report\"\ndescription: \"Create a report to help us debug bugs\"\ntitle: \"[BUG] \"\nlabels: [\"bug\"]\nbody:\n  - type: markdown\n    attributes:\n      value: |\n        Thanks for taking the time to fill out this bug report!\n\n        NOTE: Be sure to put a clear and concise title **AFTER** &#96;[BUG]&#96; in the text box above.\n\n        NOTE: We do not provide any services such as proxies, DO NOT feedback any problems not caused by this application here.\n\n        \u003c!-- template --\u003e\n  - type: textarea\n    id: description\n    attributes:\n      label: \"Describe the bug\"\n      description: \"A clear and concise description of what the bug is.\"\n    validations:\n      required: true\n  - type: textarea\n    id: reproduce\n    attributes:\n      label: \"To Reproduce\"\n      description: \"Steps to reproduce the behavior:\"\n      value: |\n        Step 1: ...\n        Step 2: ...\n        Step 3: ...\n        ...\n    validations:\n      required: true\n  - type: textarea\n    id: device-info\n    attributes:\n      label: \"Device Info\"\n      description: |\n        Input your device information.\n\n        Example:\n        - Device: Pixel 4\n        - ROM: AOSP\n        - Android Version: 10\n      value: |\n        - Device:\n        - ROM:\n        - Android Version:\n    validations:\n      required: true\n  - type: textarea\n    id: app-info\n    attributes:\n      label: \"Application Info\"\n      description: |\n        Input application you are using information.\n\n        Example:\n        &#96;&#96;&#96;\n        - Version: 2.5.4-premium\n        - APK filename: cfa-2.5.4-premium-arm64-v8a-release.apk\n        - Distribution Channel: Google Play\n        &#96;&#96;&#96;\n      value: |\n        - Version:\n        - APK filename:\n        - Distribution Channel:\n    validations:\n      required: true\n  - type: textarea\n    id: configure\n    attributes:\n      render: yml",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "name: \"[English] Bug Report\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "description: \"Create a report to help us debug bugs\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "title: \"[BUG] \""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "labels: [\"bug\"]"

            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        NOTE: We do not provide any services such as proxies, DO NOT feedback any problems not caused by this application here."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "        \u003c!-- template --\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "  - type: textarea"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    id: description"
          },
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "      label: \"Describe the bug\""
          },

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "  - type: textarea\n    id: configure\n    attributes:\n      render: yml\n      label: \"Configure File\"\n      description: |\n        Please paste or upload the configuration file here.\n\n        TIPS: If you only have a subscription link, please use your browser to download it.\n\n        **NOTE: Please remove proxies from the configuration file before uploading it.**\n        **NOTE: Please remove proxies from the configuration file before uploading it.**\n        **NOTE: Please remove proxies from the configuration file before uploading it.**\n    validations:\n      required: true\n  - type: textarea\n    id: logs\n    attributes:\n      render: raw\n      label: \"Logs\"\n      description: |\n        Please paste or upload the log file here.\n\n        TIPS: Please use the &#96;Logcat&#96; in application or &#96;adb logcat&#96;. &#96;adb logcat&#96; would be better.\n    validations:\n      required: true\n  - type: textarea\n    id: screenshot\n    attributes:\n      label: \"Screenshot\"\n      description: \"If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.\"\n      placeholder: \"Optional\"\n  - type: textarea\n    id: additional\n    attributes:\n      label: \"Additional\"\n      description: \"Add any other context about the problem here.\"",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "  - type: textarea"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "    id: configure"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "    attributes:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "      render: yml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "      label: \"Configure File\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "      description: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "        Please paste or upload the configuration file here."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "        TIPS: If you only have a subscription link, please use your browser to download it."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "        **NOTE: Please remove proxies from the configuration file before uploading it.**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "        **NOTE: Please remove proxies from the configuration file before uploading it.**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "        **NOTE: Please remove proxies from the configuration file before uploading it.**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "    validations:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "      required: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "  - type: textarea"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "    id: logs"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "    attributes:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "      render: raw"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "      label: \"Logs\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "      description: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "        Please paste or upload the log file here."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "        TIPS: Please use the &#96;Logcat&#96; in application or &#96;adb logcat&#96;. &#96;adb logcat&#96; would be better."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "    validations:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "      required: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "  - type: textarea"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "    attributes:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "      label: \"Screenshot\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "      description: \"If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "      placeholder: \"Optional\""

          {
            "lineNumber": 103,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: \"[简体中文] 错误报告\"\ndescription: \"创建错误报告以帮助我们修正应用\"\ntitle: \"[BUG] \"\nlabels: [\"bug\"]\nbody:\n  - type: markdown\n    attributes:\n      value: |\n        感谢您在百忙之中填写此错误报告。\n\n        注意: 请务必在上方文本框的 &#96;[BUG]&#96; **之后**填写清晰明了的标题。\n\n        注意：这里不提供像是代理服务器之类的服务，请不要反馈非应用自身引起的问题。\n\n        \u003c!-- template --\u003e\n  - type: textarea\n    id: description\n    attributes:\n      label: \"描述此错误\"\n      description: \"请清晰简洁的描述你遇到的错误。\"\n    validations:\n      required: true\n  - type: textarea\n    id: reproduce\n    attributes:\n      label: \"如何复现该错误\"\n      description: \"复现步骤:\"\n      value: |\n        步骤 1: ...\n        步骤 2: ...\n        步骤 3: ...\n        ...\n    validations:\n      required: true\n  - type: textarea\n    id: device-info\n    attributes:\n      label: \"设备信息\"\n      description: |\n        输入您正在使用的设备信息。\n\n        例子:\n        - 机型: Pixel 4\n        - 系统类型: MIUI/AOSP\n        - Android 版本: 10\n      value: |\n        - 机型:\n        - 系统类型:\n        - Android 版本:\n    validations:\n      required: true\n  - type: textarea\n    id: app-info\n    attributes:\n      label: \"应用信息\"\n      description: |\n        输入您正在使用的应用信息。\n\n        例子:\n        &#96;&#96;&#96;\n        - 版本: 2.5.4-premium\n        - 安装包文件名: cfa-2.5.4-premium-arm64-v8a-release.apk\n        - 应用来源: Google Play\n        &#96;&#96;&#96;\n      value: |\n        - 版本:\n        - 安装包文件名:\n        - 应用来源:\n    validations:\n      required: true\n  - type: textarea\n    id: configure\n    attributes:\n      render: yml",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "name: \"[简体中文] 错误报告\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "description: \"创建错误报告以帮助我们修正应用\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "title: \"[BUG] \""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "labels: [\"bug\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "body:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "  - type: markdown"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "    attributes:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "      value: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "        感谢您在百忙之中填写此错误报告。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "        注意: 请务必在上方文本框的 &#96;[BUG]&#96; **之后**填写清晰明了的标题。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        注意：这里不提供像是代理服务器之类的服务，请不要反馈非应用自身引起的问题。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "        \u003c!-- template --\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "  - type: textarea"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    id: description"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    attributes:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "      label: \"描述此错误\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "      description: \"请清晰简洁的描述你遇到的错误。\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "    validations:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "      required: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "  - type: textarea"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "    id: reproduce"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "    attributes:"
          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 27,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,

            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "        步骤 1: ..."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "        步骤 2: ..."

          {

          },

两个 workflow 都缺少 `release.keystore` 的恢复步骤。添加从 GitHub Secrets 恢复 keystore 的步骤（标准做法）：


_**Agent (default)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file_v2">

<details><summary>Tool use: **edit_file_v2** • Edit file: C:\Users\Ken-Narmal\Desktop\ClashMetaForAndroid\.github\workflows\build-pre-release.yaml</summary>

</details>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file_v2"><details>

</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (default)**_


已更新 Build Pre-Release workflow。修改如下：

1. **启用了签名配置**：取消注释签名配置部分，使 Pre-Release 构建使用 release 签名（与 Release 构建一致）

2. **添加了 keystore 恢复步骤**：从 GitHub Secrets 恢复 `release.keystore` 文件（如果 `SIGNING_KEYSTORE_BASE64` secret 存在）

**现在需要做的：**

1. **设置 GitHub Secrets**（如果还没有）：
   - `SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD` - keystore 密码
   - `SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS` - key 别名
   - `SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD` - key 密码
   - `SIGNING_KEYSTORE_BASE64` - release.keystore 文件的 base64 编码（可选，如果 keystore 已通过其他方式存在）

2. **生成 base64 编码的 keystore**（如果需要）：
   ```bash
   base64 -i release.keystore -o keystore_base64.txt
   ```
   然后将内容添加到 GitHub Secrets 的 `SIGNING_KEYSTORE_BASE64`

这样，Build Pre-Release 和 Build Release 都会使用相同的 release 签名，避免签名不匹配问题。之后从 GitHub Actions 下载的 Pre-Release 版本可以正常升级，无需卸载。

---

之前 Build Pre-Release 使用 debug 签名，但 debug keystore 可能因缓存失效而重新生成，导致签名不一致。改为使用固定的 debug keystore（通过 GitHub Secrets），确保每次构建签名一致：


_**Agent (default)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file_v2">

_**Agent (default)**_


确保签名一致性：如果没有 release 签名配置，使用固定的 debug keystore（通过 GitHub Secrets），避免每次重新生成导致签名不一致：


_**Agent (default)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file_v2">

<details><summary>Tool use: **edit_file_v2** • Edit file: C:\Users\Ken-Narmal\Desktop\ClashMetaForAndroid\.github\workflows\build-pre-release.yaml</summary>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file_v2"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **edit_file_v2**</summary>

</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (default)**_


已更新配置，确保签名一致性。方案如下：

**签名优先级：**
1. **Release 签名**：如果所有 release 签名 secrets 都存在，使用 release 签名
2. **固定的 Debug keystore**：如果 `DEBUG_KEYSTORE_BASE64` secret 存在，使用固定的 debug keystore（推荐，确保一致性）
3. **回退**：使用默认 debug 签名（不推荐，可能导致签名不一致）

**解决方案：**

由于之前 Build Pre-Release 使用 debug 签名，建议设置固定的 debug keystore 以确保一致性：

1. **生成一个固定的 debug keystore**（如果还没有）：
   ```bash
   keytool -genkey -v -keystore debug.keystore -storepass android -alias androiddebugkey -keypass android -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000 -dname "CN=Android Debug,O=Android,C=US"
   ```

2. **将 keystore 编码为 base64**：
   ```bash
   base64 -i debug.keystore -o debug_keystore_base64.txt
   ```

3. **在 GitHub Secrets 中添加**：
   - Secret 名称：`DEBUG_KEYSTORE_BASE64`
   - Secret 值：`debug_keystore_base64.txt` 文件的内容

这样，每次 Build Pre-Release 都会使用相同的 debug keystore，确保签名一致，可以正常升级而无需卸载。

**或者**，如果想使用 release 签名，需要设置以下 secrets：
- `SIGNING_KEYSTORE_BASE64`
- `SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD`
- `SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS`
- `SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD`

建议使用固定的 debug keystore 方案，因为之前构建使用的是 debug 签名。

---

        "contents": "\u003c?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"utf-8\"?\u003e\n\u003clayout xmlns:android=\"http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android\"\u003e\n    \u003cdata\u003e\n        \u003cvariable\n            name=\"versionName\"\n            type=\"String\" /\u003e\n        \u003cvariable\n            name=\"coreVersion\"\n            type=\"String\" /\u003e\n    \u003c/data\u003e\n\n    \u003cLinearLayout\n        android:layout_width=\"match_parent\"\n        android:layout_height=\"wrap_content\"\n        android:gravity=\"center_vertical\"\n        android:orientation=\"horizontal\"\n        android:padding=\"@dimen/dialog_padding\"\u003e\n\n        \u003cView\n            android:layout_width=\"@dimen/about_icon_size\"\n            android:layout_height=\"@dimen/about_icon_size\"\n            android:background=\"@drawable/ic_clash\" /\u003e\n\n        \u003cLinearLayout\n            android:layout_width=\"match_parent\"\n            android:layout_height=\"wrap_content\"\n            android:layout_marginStart=\"@dimen/about_text_margin\"\n            android:orientation=\"vertical\"\u003e\n\n            \u003cTextView\n                android:layout_width=\"match_parent\"\n                android:layout_height=\"wrap_content\"\n                android:text=\"@string/application_name\"\n                android:textAppearance=\"@style/TextAppearance.MaterialComponents.Body1\" /\u003e\n\n            \u003cTextView\n                android:layout_width=\"match_parent\"\n                android:layout_height=\"wrap_content\"\n                android:layout_marginTop=\"@dimen/item_text_margin\"\n                android:text=\"@{versionName}\"\n                android:textAppearance=\"@style/TextAppearance.MaterialComponents.Body2\" /\u003e\n\n            \u003cTextView\n                android:layout_width=\"match_parent\"\n                android:layout_height=\"wrap_content\"\n                android:layout_marginTop=\"@dimen/item_text_margin\"\n                android:text=\"@{coreVersion}\"\n                android:textAppearance=\"@style/TextAppearance.MaterialComponents.Body2\" /\u003e\n        \u003c/LinearLayout\u003e\n    \u003c/LinearLayout\u003e\n\u003c/layout\u003e",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        }\n    }\n\n    private suspend fun queryAppVersionName(): String {\n        return withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {\n            packageManager.getPackageInfo(packageName, 0).versionName ?: \"\"\n        }\n    }\n\n    private suspend fun queryCoreVersion(): String {\n        return withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {\n            getString(com.github.kr328.clash.design.R.string.mihomo_core_version, Bridge.nativeCoreVersion().replace(\"_\", \"-\"))\n        }\n    }\n\n    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {\n        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)\n        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT \u003e= Build.VERSION_CODES.TIRAMISU) {\n            val requestPermissionLauncher =\n                registerForActivityResult(RequestPermission()\n                ) { isGranted: Boolean -\u003e\n                }\n            if (ContextCompat.checkSelfPermission(\n                    this,\n                    android.Manifest.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS\n                ) != PackageManager.PERMISSION_GRANTED) {\n                requestPermissionLauncher.launch(android.Manifest.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS)\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nval mainActivityAlias = \"${MainActivity::class.java.name}Alias\"",

        "contents": "#ifndef VERSION_H_IN\n#define VERSION_H_IN\n \n/**\n * 当前编译core版本号\n */\n \n#define GIT_VERSION @GIT_VERSION@\n#define make_Str(x) #x \n#define make_String(x) make_Str(x)\n\n#endif",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun setHasProviders(has: Boolean) {\n        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n            binding.hasProviders = has\n        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun showAbout(versionName: String, coreVersion: String) {\n        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n            val binding = DesignAboutBinding.inflate(context.layoutInflater).apply {\n                this.versionName = versionName\n                this.coreVersion = coreVersion\n            }\n\n            AlertDialog.Builder(context)\n                .setView(binding.root)\n                .show()\n        }\n    }\n\n    init {\n        binding.self = this\n\n        binding.colorClashStarted = context.resolveThemedColor(com.google.android.material.R.attr.colorPrimary)\n        binding.colorClashStopped = context.resolveThemedColor(R.attr.colorClashStopped)\n    }\n\n    fun request(request: Request) {\n        requests.trySend(request)\n    }\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.0)\n\n# 获取git hash\n\nmessage(STATUS \"CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR= ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}\")\nexecute_process(\n  COMMAND git submodule foreach git log -1 --format=%H   \n  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} \n  OUTPUT_VARIABLE COMMIT_HASH\n)\nstring(REPLACE \"\\n\" \";\" COMMIT_HASH \"${COMMIT_HASH}\")\nlist(GET COMMIT_HASH 1 COMMIT_HASH)\nstring (REGEX REPLACE \"[\\n\\t\\r]\" \"\" COMMIT_HASH ${COMMIT_HASH})\nstring(SUBSTRING ${COMMIT_HASH} 0 7 COMMIT_HASH)\nmessage(STATUS \"git hash= ${COMMIT_HASH}\")\n\n# 获取分支名称\nexecute_process(\n  COMMAND git submodule foreach git branch -r --contains ${COMMIT_HASH}\n  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} \n  OUTPUT_VARIABLE CURRENT_BRANCH\n)\nstring(REPLACE \"\\n\" \";\" CURRENT_BRANCH \"${CURRENT_BRANCH}\")\nlist(GET CURRENT_BRANCH 1 CURRENT_BRANCH)\nstring (REGEX REPLACE \"origin/\" \"\" CURRENT_BRANCH ${CURRENT_BRANCH})\nstring (REGEX REPLACE \"[\\n\\t\\r]\" \"\" CURRENT_BRANCH ${CURRENT_BRANCH})\n#string(SUBSTRING ${CURRENT_BRANCH} 0 8 CURRENT_BRANCH)\nmessage(STATUS \"git current branch = ${CURRENT_BRANCH}\")\n\n# 获取生成时间\nstring(TIMESTAMP COMPILE_TIME \"%y%m%d\")\nstring (REGEX REPLACE \"[\\n\\t\\r]\" \"\" COMPILE_TIME ${COMPILE_TIME})\nstring(REGEX REPLACE \"\\\"\" \"\" COMPILE_TIME ${COMPILE_TIME})\n\n# 生成版本信息\nset(GIT_VERSION \"${CURRENT_BRANCH}_${COMMIT_HASH}_${COMPILE_TIME}\")\nmessage(STATUS \"version info = ${GIT_VERSION}\")\n\n# 去除空格\nstring(REGEX REPLACE \"[ ]+\" \"\" GIT_VERSION \"${GIT_VERSION}\")\n\n# 保存变量到文件\nconfigure_file(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/version.h.in ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/version.h @ONLY)\n\nproject(clash-bridge C)\n\n\nset(CMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE on)\nset(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE \"${CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE} -O3\")\n\nset(GO_OUTPUT_BASE ${GO_OUTPUT}/${FLAVOR_NAME})\n\nif (\"${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\" STREQUAL \"Debug\")\n    set(GO_OUTPUT_BASE \"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}Debug\")\nelseif (\"${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\" STREQUAL \"Release\")\n    set(GO_OUTPUT_BASE \"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}Release\")\nelseif (\"${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\" STREQUAL \"RelWithDebInfo\")\n    set(GO_OUTPUT_BASE \"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}Release\")",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (u *CoreUpdater) Update(currentExePath string, channel string, force bool) (err error) {\n\tu.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer u.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tinfo, err := os.Stat(currentExePath)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"check currentExePath %q: %w\", currentExePath, err)\n\t}\n\n\tbaseURL := baseAlphaURL\n\tversionURL := versionAlphaURL\n\tswitch strings.ToLower(channel) {\n\tcase ReleaseChannel:\n\t\tbaseURL = baseReleaseURL\n\t\tversionURL = versionReleaseURL\n\tcase AlphaChannel:\n\t\tbreak\n\tdefault: // auto\n\t\tif !strings.HasPrefix(C.Version, \"alpha\") {\n\t\t\tbaseURL = baseReleaseURL\n\t\t\tversionURL = versionReleaseURL\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tlatestVersion, err := u.getLatestVersion(versionURL)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"get latest version: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\tlog.Infoln(\"current version %s, latest version %s\", C.Version, latestVersion)\n\n\tif latestVersion == C.Version \u0026\u0026 !force {\n\t\t// don't change this output, some downstream dependencies on the upgrader's output fields\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"update error: already using latest version %s\", C.Version)\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Errorln(\"updater: failed: %v\", err)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tlog.Infoln(\"updater: finished\")\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\t// ---- prepare ----\n\tmihomoBaseName := u.CoreBaseName()\n\tpackageName := mihomoBaseName + \"-\" + latestVersion\n\tif runtime.GOOS == \"windows\" {\n\t\tpackageName = packageName + \".zip\"\n\t} else {\n\t\tpackageName = packageName + \".gz\"\n\t}\n\tpackageURL := baseURL + packageName\n\tlog.Infoln(\"updater: updating using url: %s\", packageURL)\n\n\tworkDir := filepath.Dir(currentExePath)\n\tbackupDir := filepath.Join(workDir, \"meta-backup\")\n\tupdateDir := filepath.Join(workDir, \"meta-update\")\n\tpackagePath := filepath.Join(updateDir, packageName)\n\t//log.Infoln(packagePath)\n\n\tupdateExeName := mihomoBaseName\n\tif runtime.GOOS == \"windows\" {\n\t\tupdateExeName = updateExeName + \".exe\"\n\t}\n\tlog.Infoln(\"updateExeName: %s\", updateExeName)\n\tupdateExePath := filepath.Join(updateDir, updateExeName)\n\tbackupExePath := filepath.Join(backupDir, filepath.Base(currentExePath))\n\n\tdefer u.clean(updateDir)\n\n\terr = u.download(updateDir, packagePath, packageURL)",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "func (u *CoreUpdater) Update(currentExePath string, channel string, force bool) (err error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "\tu.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "\tdefer u.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "\tinfo, err := os.Stat(currentExePath)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"check currentExePath %q: %w\", currentExePath, err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "\tbaseURL := baseAlphaURL"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "\tversionURL := versionAlphaURL"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "\tswitch strings.ToLower(channel) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "\tcase ReleaseChannel:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "\t\tbaseURL = baseReleaseURL"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "\t\tversionURL = versionReleaseURL"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "\tcase AlphaChannel:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "\t\tbreak"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "\tdefault: // auto"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "\t\tif !strings.HasPrefix(C.Version, \"alpha\") {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "\t\t\tbaseURL = baseReleaseURL"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "\t\t\tversionURL = versionReleaseURL"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "\tlatestVersion, err := u.getLatestVersion(versionURL)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"get latest version: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "\tlog.Infoln(\"current version %s, latest version %s\", C.Version, latestVersion)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "\tif latestVersion == C.Version \u0026\u0026 !force {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "\t\t// don't change this output, some downstream dependencies on the upgrader's output fields"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"update error: already using latest version %s\", C.Version)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "\tdefer func() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "\t\t\tlog.Errorln(\"updater: failed: %v\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "\t\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "\t\t\tlog.Infoln(\"updater: finished\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "\t}()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "\t// ---- prepare ----"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "\tmihomoBaseName := u.CoreBaseName()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "\tpackageName := mihomoBaseName + \"-\" + latestVersion"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "\tif runtime.GOOS == \"windows\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "\t\tpackageName = packageName + \".zip\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "\t\tpackageName = packageName + \".gz\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "\tpackageURL := baseURL + packageName"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "\tlog.Infoln(\"updater: updating using url: %s\", packageURL)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "\tworkDir := filepath.Dir(currentExePath)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "\tbackupDir := filepath.Join(workDir, \"meta-backup\")"
          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "\tif runtime.GOOS == \"windows\" {"
          },
          {

            "text": "\t\tupdateExeName = updateExeName + \".exe\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

\"libclash.h\"\n#include \"jni_helper.h\"\n#include \"trace.h\"\n\n#include \"version.h\" // 添加当前编译core版本号变量\n\n\nJNIEXPORT void JNICALL\nJava_com_github_kr328_clash_core_bridge_Bridge_nativeInit(JNIEnv *env, jobject thiz,\n                                                          jstring home,\n                                                          jstring version_name, jint sdk_version) {\n    TRACE_METHOD();\n\n    scoped_string _home = get_string(home);\n    scoped_string _version_name = get_string(version_name);\n    char* _git_version = make_String(GIT_VERSION);\n\n    coreInit(_home, _version_name, _git_version, sdk_version);\n}\n\nJNIEXPORT void JNICALL\nJava_com_github_kr328_clash_core_bridge_Bridge_nativeReset(JNIEnv *env, jobject thiz) {\n    TRACE_METHOD();\n\n    reset();\n}\n\nJNIEXPORT void JNICALL\nJava_com_github_kr328_clash_core_bridge_Bridge_nativeForceGc(JNIEnv *env, jobject thiz) {\n    TRACE_METHOD();\n\n    forceGc();\n}\n\nJNIEXPORT void JNICALL\nJava_com_github_kr328_clash_core_bridge_Bridge_nativeSuspend(JNIEnv *env, jobject thiz,\n                                                             jboolean suspended) {\n    TRACE_METHOD();\n\n    suspend((int) suspended);\n}\n\n\nJNIEXPORT jstring JNICALL\nJava_com_github_kr328_clash_core_bridge_Bridge_nativeQueryTunnelState(JNIEnv *env, jobject thiz) {\n    TRACE_METHOD();\n\n    scoped_string response = queryTunnelState();\n\n    return new_string(response);\n}\n\nJNIEXPORT jlong JNICALL\nJava_com_github_kr328_clash_core_bridge_Bridge_nativeQueryTrafficNow(JNIEnv *env, jobject thiz) {\n    TRACE_METHOD();\n\n    uint64_t upload = 0l, download = 0l;\n\n    queryNow(\u0026upload, \u0026download);\n\n    return (jlong) (down_scale_traffic(upload) \u003c\u003c 32u | down_scale_traffic(download));\n}\n\nJNIEXPORT jlong JNICALL\nJava_com_github_kr328_clash_core_bridge_Bridge_nativeQueryTrafficTotal(JNIEnv *env, jobject thiz) {\n    TRACE_METHOD();",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package delegate\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"syscall\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/process\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\"\n\n\t\"cfa/native/app\"\n\t\"cfa/native/platform\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/dialer\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\"\n)\n\nvar errBlocked = errors.New(\"blocked\")\n\nvar healthCheckNotifyFunc func(groupName string)\n\nfunc SetHealthCheckNotifyFunc(fn func(groupName string)) {\n\thealthCheckNotifyFunc = fn\n}\n\nfunc NotifyHealthCheckTriggered(groupName string) {\n\tif healthCheckNotifyFunc != nil {\n\t\thealthCheckNotifyFunc(groupName)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc Init(home, versionName, gitVersion string, platformVersion int) {\n\tlog.Infoln(\"Init core, home: %s, versionName: %s, gitVersion: %s, platformVersion: %d\", home, versionName, gitVersion, platformVersion)\n\tconstant.SetHomeDir(home)\n\t// gitVersion = ${CURRENT_BRANCH}_${COMMIT_HASH}_${COMPILE_TIME}\n\tif versions := strings.Split(gitVersion, \"_\"); len(versions) == 3 {\n\t\tconstant.Version = fmt.Sprintf(\"%s-%s-CMFA-%s\", strings.ToLower(versions[0]), versions[1], strings.ToLower(versionName))\n\t\tconstant.BuildTime = versions[2]\n\t} else {\n\t\tconstant.Version = gitVersion\n\t}\n\tconstant.Version = strings.ToLower(constant.Version)\n\tapp.ApplyVersionName(versionName)\n\tapp.ApplyPlatformVersion(platformVersion)\n\n\tprocess.DefaultPackageNameResolver = func(metadata *constant.Metadata) (string, error) {\n\t\tsrc, dst := metadata.RawSrcAddr, metadata.RawDstAddr\n\n\t\tif src == nil || dst == nil {\n\t\t\treturn \"\", process.ErrInvalidNetwork\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tuid := app.QuerySocketUid(metadata.RawSrcAddr, metadata.RawDstAddr)\n\t\tpkg := app.QueryAppByUid(uid)\n\n\t\tlog.Debugln(\"[PKG] %s --\u003e %s by %d[%s]\", metadata.SourceAddress(), metadata.RemoteAddress(), uid, pkg)\n\n\t\treturn pkg, nil\n\t}\n\n\tdialer.DefaultSocketHook = func(network, address string, conn syscall.RawConn) error {\n\t\tif platform.ShouldBlockConnection() {\n\t\t\treturn errBlocked\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn conn.Control(func(fd uintptr) {\n\t\t\tapp.MarkSocket(int(fd))\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}",

        "contents": "package updater\n\nimport (\n\t\"archive/zip\"\n\t\"compress/gzip\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"os/exec\"\n\t\"path/filepath\"\n\t\"runtime\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/ca\"\n\tmihomoHttp \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/http\"\n\tC \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant/features\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/http\"\n)\n\nconst (\n\tbaseReleaseURL    = \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/releases/latest/download/\"\n\tversionReleaseURL = \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/releases/latest/download/version.txt\"\n\n\tbaseAlphaURL    = \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/releases/download/Prerelease-Alpha/\"\n\tversionAlphaURL = \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/releases/download/Prerelease-Alpha/version.txt\"\n\n\t// MaxPackageFileSize is a maximum package file length in bytes. The largest\n\t// package whose size is limited by this constant currently has the size of\n\t// approximately 32 MiB.\n\tMaxPackageFileSize = 32 * 1024 * 1024\n)\n\nconst (\n\tReleaseChannel = \"release\"\n\tAlphaChannel   = \"alpha\"\n)\n\n// CoreUpdater is the mihomo updater.\n// modify from https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdGuardHome/blob/595484e0b3fb4c457f9bb727a6b94faa78a66c5f/internal/updater/updater.go\ntype CoreUpdater struct {\n\tmu sync.Mutex\n}\n\nvar DefaultCoreUpdater = CoreUpdater{}\n\nfunc (u *CoreUpdater) CoreBaseName()",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package main\n\n/*\n#cgo LDFLAGS: -llog\n\n#include \"bridge.h\"\n*/\nimport \"C\"\n\nimport (\n\t\"runtime\"\n\t\"runtime/debug\"\n\n\t\"cfa/native/config\"\n\t\"cfa/native/delegate\"\n\t\"cfa/native/tunnel\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\"\n)\n\nfunc main() {\n\tpanic(\"Stub!\")\n}\n\n//export coreInit\nfunc coreInit(home, versionName, gitVersion C.c_string, sdkVersion C.int) {\n\th := C.GoString(home)\n\tv := C.GoString(versionName)\n\tg := C.GoString(gitVersion)\n\ts := int(sdkVersion)\n\n\tdelegate.Init(h, v, g, s)\n\n\treset()\n}\n\n//export reset\nfunc reset() {\n\tconfig.LoadDefault()\n\ttunnel.ResetStatistic()\n\ttunnel.CloseAllConnections()\n\n\truntime.GC()\n\tdebug.FreeOSMemory()\n}\n\n//export forceGc\nfunc forceGc() {\n\tgo func() {\n\t\tlog.Infoln(\"[APP] request force GC\")\n\n\t\truntime.GC()\n\t\tdebug.FreeOSMemory()\n\t}()\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    external fun nativeQueryConfiguration(): String\n    external fun nativeSubscribeLogcat(callback: LogcatInterface)\n    external fun nativeSubscribeHealthCheck(callback: HealthCheckCallback)\n    external fun nativeCoreVersion(): String\n\n    private external fun nativeInit(home: String, versionName: String, sdkVersion: Int)\n\n    init {\n        System.loadLibrary(\"bridge\")\n\n        val ctx = Global.application\n\n        ParcelFileDescriptor.open(File(ctx.packageCodePath), ParcelFileDescriptor.MODE_READ_ONLY)\n            .detachFd()\n\n        val home = ctx.filesDir.resolve(\"clash\").apply { mkdirs() }.absolutePath\n        val versionName = ctx.packageManager.getPackageInfo(ctx.packageName, 0).versionName ?: \"unknown\"\n        val sdkVersion = Build.VERSION.SDK_INT\n\n        Log.d(\"Home = $home\")\n\n        nativeInit(home, versionName, sdkVersion)\n    }\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

          },

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "var DefaultCoreUpdater = CoreUpdater{}\n\nfunc (u *CoreUpdater) CoreBaseName() string {\n\tswitch runtime.GOARCH {\n\tcase \"arm\":\n\t\t// mihomo-linux-armv5\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"mihomo-%s-%sv%s\", runtime.GOOS, runtime.GOARCH, features.GOARM)\n\tcase \"arm64\":\n\t\tif runtime.GOOS == \"android\" {\n\t\t\t// mihomo-android-arm64-v8\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"mihomo-%s-%s-v8\", runtime.GOOS, runtime.GOARCH)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t// mihomo-linux-arm64\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"mihomo-%s-%s\", runtime.GOOS, runtime.GOARCH)\n\t\t}\n\tcase \"mips\", \"mipsle\":\n\t\t// mihomo-linux-mips-hardfloat\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"mihomo-%s-%s-%s\", runtime.GOOS, runtime.GOARCH, features.GOMIPS)\n\tcase \"amd64\":\n\t\t// mihomo-linux-amd64-v1\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"mihomo-%s-%s-%s\", runtime.GOOS, runtime.GOARCH, features.GOAMD64)\n\tdefault:\n\t\t// mihomo-linux-386\n\t\t// mihomo-linux-mips64\n\t\t// mihomo-linux-riscv64\n\t\t// mihomo-linux-s390x\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"mihomo-%s-%s\", runtime.GOOS, runtime.GOARCH)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (u *CoreUpdater) Update(currentExePath string, channel string, force bool",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "lineNumber": 51
          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"\n          required: true\n  - type: input\n    attributes:\n      label: Mihomo version\n      description: \"use &#96;mihomo -v&#96;\"\n    validations:\n      required: true\n  - type: dropdown\n    id: os\n    attributes:\n      label: What OS are you seeing the problem on?\n      multiple: true\n      options:\n        - macOS\n        - Windows\n        - Linux\n        - OpenBSD/FreeBSD\n  - type: textarea\n    attributes:\n      render: yaml\n      label: \"Mihomo config\"\n      description: \"\n在下方附上 Mihomo core 配置文件，请确保配置文件中没有敏感信息（比如：服务器地址，密码，端口等）\nPaste the Mihomo core configuration file below, please make sure that there is no sensitive information in the configuration file (e.g., server address/url, password, port)\n\"\n    validations:\n      required: true\n  - type: textarea\n    attributes:\n      render: shell\n      label: Mihomo log\n      description: \"\n在下方附上 Mihomo Core 的日志，log level 使用 DEBUG\nPaste the Mihomo core log below with the log level set to &#96;DEBUG&#96;.\n\"\n  - type: textarea\n    attributes:\n      label: Description\n    validations:\n      required: true",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "      with:\n        go-version: '1.25'\n        check-latest: true\n\n    - name: Set variables\n      run: |\n        # Generate version with date and build time (YYMMDD-HHMM) using Asia/Shanghai timezone\n        BUILD_DATE=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date +%y%m%d)\n        BUILD_TIME=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date +%H%M)\n        \n        if [ -n \"${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\" ]; then\n          # Manual release: use provided version\n          VERSION=${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\n          PackageVersion=\"${VERSION#v}\"\n        elif [[ \"${{ github.ref }}\" == refs/tags/* ]]; then\n          # Tag build: use tag name\n          VERSION=\"${GITHUB_REF_NAME}\"\n          PackageVersion=\"${VERSION#v}\"\n        else\n          # Branch build: use date-time format (YYYYMMDD-HHMM)\n          VERSION=\"${BUILD_DATE}-${BUILD_TIME}\"\n          PackageVersion=\"$(curl -s \"https://api.github.com/repos/MetaCubeX/mihomo/releases/latest\" | jq -r '.tag_name' | sed 's/v//g' | awk -F '.' '{$NF = $NF + 1; print}' OFS='.').${VERSION/-/.}\"\n        fi\n        \n        echo \"VERSION=${VERSION}\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"PackageVersion=${PackageVersion}\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n      \n        echo \"BUILDTIME=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date)\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"CGO_ENABLED=0\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"BUILDTAG=-extldflags --static\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"GOTOOLCHAIN=local\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n\n    - name: Update CA\n      run: |\n        sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n        sudo update-ca-certificates\n        cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n    - name: Build core\n      env:\n        GOOS: ${{matrix.jobs.goos}}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "      with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "        go-version: '1.25'"

          {

            "text": "      run: |"
          },

            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "        # Generate version with date and build time (YYMMDD-HHMM) using Asia/Shanghai timezone"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "        BUILD_DATE=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date +%y%m%d)"

            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "        BUILD_TIME=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date +%H%M)"

            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "        if [ -n \"${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\" ]; then"

          {
            "lineNumber": 52,

            "text": "          PackageVersion=\"${VERSION#v}\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "          VERSION=\"${GITHUB_REF_NAME}\""

            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "        else"

          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "          VERSION=\"${BUILD_DATE}-${BUILD_TIME}\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "          PackageVersion=\"$(curl -s \"https://api.github.com/repos/MetaCubeX/mihomo/releases/latest\" | jq -r '.tag_name' | sed 's/v//g' | awk -F '.' '{$NF = $NF + 1; print}' OFS='.').${VERSION/-/.}\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "        fi"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "        "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "        echo \"VERSION=${VERSION}\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV"

            "lineNumber": 65,

          },

            "lineNumber": 69,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.design\n\nimport android.content.Context\nimport android.view.View\nimport androidx.appcompat.app.AlertDialog\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.model.TunnelState\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.util.trafficTotal\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.databinding.DesignAboutBinding\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.databinding.DesignMainBinding\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.layoutInflater\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.resolveThemedColor\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.util.root\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.withContext\n\nclass MainDesign(context: Context) : Design\u003cMainDesign.Request\u003e(context) {\n    enum class Request {\n        ToggleStatus,\n        OpenProxy,\n        OpenProfiles,\n        OpenProviders,\n        OpenLogs,\n        OpenSettings,\n        OpenHelp,\n        OpenAbout,\n    }\n\n    private val binding = DesignMainBinding\n        .inflate(context.layoutInflater, context.root, false)\n\n    override val root: View\n        get() = binding.root\n\n    suspend fun setProfileName(name: String?) {\n        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n            binding.profileName = name\n        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun setClashRunning(running: Boolean) {\n        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n            binding.clashRunning = running\n        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun setForwarded(value: Long) {\n        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n            binding.forwarded = value.trafficTotal()\n        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun setMode(mode: TunnelState.Mode) {\n        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n            binding.mode = when (mode) {\n                TunnelState.Mode.Direct -\u003e context.getString(R.string.direct_mode)\n                TunnelState.Mode.Global -\u003e context.getString(R.string.global_mode)\n                TunnelState.Mode.Rule -\u003e context.getString(R.string.rule_mode)\n                else -\u003e context.getString(R.string.rule_mode)\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun setHasProviders(has: Boolean) {\n        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n            binding.hasProviders = has\n        ",

        "contents": "NAME=mihomo\nBINDIR=bin\nBRANCH=$(shell git branch --show-current)\nifeq ($(BRANCH),Alpha)\nVERSION=alpha-$(shell git rev-parse --short HEAD)\nelse ifeq ($(BRANCH),Beta)\nVERSION=beta-$(shell git rev-parse --short HEAD)\nelse ifeq ($(BRANCH),)\nVERSION=$(shell git describe --tags)\nelse\nVERSION=$(shell git rev-parse --short HEAD)\nendif\n\nBUILDTIME=$(shell date -u)\nGOBUILD=CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -tags with_gvisor -trimpath -ldflags '-X \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant.Version=$(VERSION)\" \\\n\t\t-X \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant.BuildTime=$(BUILDTIME)\" \\\n\t\t-w -s -buildid='\n\nPLATFORM_LIST = \\\n\tdarwin-386 \\\n\tdarwin-amd64-compatible \\\n\tdarwin-amd64 \\\n\tdarwin-amd64-v1 \\\n\tdarwin-amd64-v2 \\\n\tdarwin-amd64-v3 \\\n\tdarwin-arm64 \\\n\tlinux-386 \\\n\tlinux-amd64-compatible \\\n\tlinux-amd64 \\\n\tlinux-amd64-v1 \\\n\tlinux-amd64-v2 \\\n\tlinux-amd64-v3 \\\n\tlinux-armv5 \\\n\tlinux-armv6 \\\n\tlinux-armv7 \\\n\tlinux-arm64 \\\n\tlinux-mips64 \\\n\tlinux-mips64le \\\n\tlinux-mips-softfloat \\\n\tlinux-mips-hardfloat \\\n\tlinux-mipsle-softfloat \\\n\tlinux-mipsle-hardfloat \\\n\tlinux-riscv64 \\\n\tlinux-loong64 \\\n\tandroid-arm64 \\\n\tfreebsd-386 \\\n\tfreebsd-amd64 \\\n\tfreebsd-arm64\n\nWINDOWS_ARCH_LIST = \\\n\twindows-386 \\\n\twindows-amd64-compatible \\\n\twindows-amd64 \\\n\twindows-amd64-v1 \\\n\twindows-amd64-v2 \\\n\twindows-amd64-v3 \\\n\twindows-arm64 \\\n    windows-arm32v7\n\nall:linux-amd64-v3 linux-arm64\\\n\tdarwin-amd64-v3 darwin-arm64\\\n \twindows-amd64-v3 windows-arm64\\\n\n\ndarwin-all: darwin-amd64-v3 darwin-arm64\n\ndocker:\n\tGOAMD64=v1 $(GOBUILD) -o $(BINDIR)/$(NAME)-$@\n\ndarwin-386:\n\tGOARCH=386 GOOS=darwin $(GOBUILD) -o $(BINDIR)/$(NAME)-$@\n\ndarwin-amd64-compatible:\n\tGOARCH=amd64 GOOS=darwin GOAMD64=v1 $(GOBUILD) -o $(BINDIR)/$(NAME)-$@\n\ndarwin-amd64:\n\tGOARCH=amd64 GOOS=darwin GOAMD64=v3 $(GOBUILD) -o $(BINDIR)/$(NAME)-$@\n\ndarwin-amd64-v1:\n\tGOARCH=amd64 GOOS=darwin GOAMD64=v1 $(GOBUILD) -o $(BINDIR)/$(NAME)-$@\n\ndarwin-amd64-v2:\n\tGOARCH=amd64 GOOS=darwin GOAMD64=v2 $(GOBUILD) -o $(BINDIR)/$(NAME)-$@",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\tflag.Parse()\n}\n\nfunc main() {\n\t// Defensive programming: panic when code mistakenly calls net.DefaultResolver\n\tnet.DefaultResolver.PreferGo = true\n\tnet.DefaultResolver.Dial = func(ctx context.Context, network, address string) (net.Conn, error) {\n\t\t//panic(\"should never be called\")\n\t\tbuf := make([]byte, 1024)\n\t\tfor {\n\t\t\tn := runtime.Stack(buf, true)\n\t\t\tif n \u003c len(buf) {\n\t\t\t\tbuf = buf[:n]\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbuf = make([]byte, 2*len(buf))\n\t\t}\n\t\tfmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, \"panic: should never be called\\n\\n%s\", buf) // always print all goroutine stack\n\t\tos.Exit(2)\n\t\treturn nil, nil\n\t}\n\n\t_, _ = maxprocs.Set(maxprocs.Logger(func(string, ...any) {}))\n\n\tif len(os.Args) \u003e 1 \u0026\u0026 os.Args[1] == \"convert-ruleset\" {\n\t\tprovider.ConvertMain(os.Args[2:])\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif len(os.Args) \u003e 1 \u0026\u0026 os.Args[1] == \"generate\" {\n\t\tgenerator.Main(os.Args[2:])\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif version {\n\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Mihomo Meta %s %s %s with %s %s\\n\",\n\t\t\tC.Version, runtime.GOOS, runtime.GOARCH, runtime.Version(), C.BuildTime)\n\t\tif tags := features.Tags(); len(tags) != 0 {\n\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Use tags: %s\\n\", strings.Join(tags, \", \"))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif homeDir != \"\" {\n\t\tif !filepath.IsAbs(homeDir) {\n\t\t\tcurrentDir, _ := os.Getwd()\n\t\t\thomeDir = filepath.Join(currentDir, homeDir)\n\t\t}\n\t\tC.SetHomeDir(homeDir)\n\t}\n\n\tif geodataMode {\n\t\tgeodata.SetGeodataMode(true)\n\t}\n\n\tif configString != \"\"",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\tbackupExePath := filepath.Join(backupDir, filepath.Base(currentExePath))\n\n\tdefer u.clean(updateDir)\n\n\terr = u.download(updateDir, packagePath, packageURL)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"downloading: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\terr = u.unpack(updateDir, packagePath, info.Mode())\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"unpacking: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\terr = u.backup(currentExePath, backupExePath, backupDir)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"backuping: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\terr = u.copyFile(updateExePath, currentExePath)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"replacing: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (u *CoreUpdater) getLatestVersion(versionURL string) (version string, err error) {\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Second*5)\n\tdefer cancel()\n\tresp, err := mihomoHttp.HttpRequest(ctx, versionURL, http.MethodGet, nil, nil, mihomoHttp.WithCAOption(ca.Option{ZeroTrust: true}))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn \"\", err\n\t}\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tcloseErr := resp.Body.Close()\n\t\tif closeErr != nil \u0026\u0026 err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = closeErr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\tbody, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn \"\", err\n\t}\n\tcontent := strings.TrimRight(string(body), \"\\n\")\n\treturn content, nil\n}\n\n// download package file and save it to disk\nfunc (u *CoreUpdater) download(updateDir, packagePath, packageURL string) (err error) {\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    - name: Build core\n      env:\n        GOOS: ${{matrix.jobs.goos}}\n        GOARCH: ${{matrix.jobs.goarch}}\n        GOAMD64: ${{matrix.jobs.goamd64}}\n        GO386: ${{matrix.jobs.go386}}\n        GOARM: ${{matrix.jobs.goarm}}\n        GOMIPS: ${{matrix.jobs.gomips}}\n      run: |\n        go env\n        go build -v -tags \"with_gvisor\" -trimpath -ldflags \"${BUILDTAG} -X 'github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant.Version=${VERSION}' -X 'github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant.BuildTime=${BUILDTIME}' -w -s -buildid=\"\n        if [ \"${{matrix.jobs.goos}}\" = \"windows\" ]; then\n          cp mihomo.exe mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}.exe\n          zip -r mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}-${VERSION}.zip mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}.exe\n        else\n          cp mihomo mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}\n          gzip -c mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}} \u003e mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}-${VERSION}.gz\n          rm mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}\n        fi\n\n    - name: Save version\n      run: |\n        echo ${VERSION} \u003e version.txt\n      shell: bash\n\n    - name: Archive production artifacts\n      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4\n      with:\n        name: \"${{ matrix.jobs.goos }}-${{ matrix.jobs.output }}\"\n        path: |\n          mihomo*.gz\n          mihomo*.zip\n          version.txt\n\n  Upload-Prerelease:\n    permissions: write-all\n    if: ${{ github.event_name != 'workflow_dispatch' \u0026\u0026 github.ref_type == 'branch' \u0026\u0026 !startsWith(github.event_name, 'pull_request') }}\n    needs: [build]\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n    - name: Download all workflow run artifacts\n      uses: actions/download-artifact@v4\n      with:\n        path: bin/\n        merge-multiple: true\n\n    - name: Calculate checksums",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package main\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/base64\"\n\t\"flag\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"net\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"os/signal\"\n\t\"path/filepath\"\n\t\"runtime\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"syscall\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/generator\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/geodata\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/updater\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/config\"\n\tC \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant/features\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/hub\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/hub/executor\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/rules/provider\"\n\n\t\"go.uber.org/automaxprocs/maxprocs\"\n)\n\nvar (\n\tversion                bool\n\ttestConfig             bool\n\tgeodataMode            bool\n\thomeDir                string\n\tconfigFile             string\n\tconfigString           string\n\tconfigBytes            []byte\n\texternalUI             string\n\texternalController     string\n\texternalControllerUnix string\n\texternalControllerPipe string\n\tsecret                 string\n)\n\nfunc init() {\n\tflag.StringVar(\u0026homeDir, \"d\", os.Getenv(\"CLASH_HOME_DIR\"),",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package main"
          },

</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (default)**_


mihomo 版本号的获取流程如下：

## 版本号获取流程

1. **在 `MainActivity.kt` 中调用**（第146-150行）：
```kotlin
private suspend fun queryCoreVersion(): String {
    return withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
        getString(com.github.kr328.clash.design.R.string.mihomo_core_version, 
                  Bridge.nativeCoreVersion().replace("_", "-"))
    }
}
```

2. **JNI 桥接**（`Bridge.kt` 第52行）：
   - `Bridge.nativeCoreVersion()` 是一个 JNI 函数，调用 C 代码

3. **C 代码实现**（`main.c` 第551-556行）：
```c
JNIEXPORT jstring JNICALL
Java_com_github_kr328_clash_core_bridge_Bridge_nativeCoreVersion(JNIEnv *env, jobject thiz) {
    char* Version = make_String(GIT_VERSION);
    return new_string(Version);
}
```

4. **版本号生成**（`CMakeLists.txt` 第36行）：
   - 在编译时通过 CMake 生成版本字符串：
   ```cmake
   set(GIT_VERSION "${CURRENT_BRANCH}_${COMMIT_HASH}_${COMPILE_TIME}")
   ```
   - 格式：`分支名_提交hash(7位)_编译日期(yymmdd)`
   - 例如：`master_abc1234_250127`

5. **显示**（`strings.xml` 第224行）：
   - 通过字符串资源格式化：`"Mihomo Core: %s"`
   - 在关于对话框中显示

**总结**：版本号在编译时由 CMake 生成，包含分支名、Git commit hash（7位）和编译日期，通过 JNI 从 C 代码返回，在 Kotlin 中将下划线替换为连字符后显示。

---

_**User**_

和 mihomo 远端版本号无关是吗

---

_**Agent (default)**_

_**Agent (default)**_

        "contents": "func (u *CoreUpdater) Update(currentExePath string, channel string, force bool) (err error) {\n\tu.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer u.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tinfo, err := os.Stat(currentExePath)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"check currentExePath %q: %w\", currentExePath, err)\n\t}\n\n\tbaseURL := baseAlphaURL\n\tversionURL := versionAlphaURL\n\tswitch strings.ToLower(channel) {\n\tcase ReleaseChannel:\n\t\tbaseURL = baseReleaseURL\n\t\tversionURL = versionReleaseURL\n\tcase AlphaChannel:\n\t\tbreak\n\tdefault: // auto\n\t\tif !strings.HasPrefix(C.Version, \"alpha\") {\n\t\t\tbaseURL = baseReleaseURL\n\t\t\tversionURL = versionReleaseURL\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tlatestVersion, err := u.getLatestVersion(versionURL)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"get latest version: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\tlog.Infoln(\"current version %s, latest version %s\", C.Version, latestVersion)\n\n\tif latestVersion == C.Version \u0026\u0026 !force {\n\t\t// don't change this output, some downstream dependencies on the upgrader's output fields\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"update error: already using latest version %s\", C.Version)\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Errorln(\"updater: failed: %v\", err)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tlog.Infoln(\"updater: finished\")\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\t// ---- prepare ----\n\tmihomoBaseName := u.CoreBaseName()\n\tpackageName := mihomoBaseName + \"-\" + latestVersion\n\tif runtime.GOOS == \"windows\" {\n\t\tpackageName = packageName + \".zip\"\n\t} else {\n\t\tpackageName = packageName + \".gz\"\n\t}\n\tpackageURL := baseURL + packageName\n\tlog.Infoln(\"updater: updating using url: %s\", packageURL)\n\n\tworkDir := filepath.Dir(currentExePath)\n\tbackupDir := filepath.Join(workDir, \"meta-backup\")\n\tupdateDir := filepath.Join(workDir, \"meta-update\")\n\tpackagePath := filepath.Join(updateDir, packageName)\n\t//log.Infoln(packagePath)\n\n\tupdateExeName := mihomoBaseName\n\tif runtime.GOOS == \"windows\" {\n\t\tupdateExeName = updateExeName + \".exe\"\n\t}\n\tlog.Infoln(\"updateExeName: %s\", updateExeName)\n\tupdateExePath := filepath.Join(updateDir, updateExeName)\n\tbackupExePath := filepath.Join(backupDir, filepath.Base(currentExePath))\n\n\tdefer u.clean(updateDir)\n\n\terr = u.download(updateDir, packagePath, packageURL)",

          },
