            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"check currentExePath %q: %w\", currentExePath, err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "\tbaseURL := baseAlphaURL"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "\tversionURL := versionAlphaURL"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "\tswitch strings.ToLower(channel) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "\tcase ReleaseChannel:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "\t\tbaseURL = baseReleaseURL"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "\t\tversionURL = versionReleaseURL"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "\tcase AlphaChannel:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "\t\tbreak"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "\tdefault: // auto"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "\t\tif !strings.HasPrefix(C.Version, \"alpha\") {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "\t\t\tbaseURL = baseReleaseURL"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "\t\t\tversionURL = versionReleaseURL"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "\tlatestVersion, err := u.getLatestVersion(versionURL)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"get latest version: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "\tlog.Infoln(\"current version %s, latest version %s\", C.Version, latestVersion)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "\tif latestVersion == C.Version \u0026\u0026 !force {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "\t\t// don't change this output, some downstream dependencies on the upgrader's output fields"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"update error: already using latest version %s\", C.Version)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "\tdefer func() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "\t\t\tlog.Errorln(\"updater: failed: %v\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "\t\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "\t\t\tlog.Infoln(\"updater: finished\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "\t}()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "\t// ---- prepare ----"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "\tmihomoBaseName := u.CoreBaseName()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "\tpackageName := mihomoBaseName + \"-\" + latestVersion"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "\tif runtime.GOOS == \"windows\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "\t\tpackageName = packageName + \".zip\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "\t\tpackageName = packageName + \".gz\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "\tpackageURL := baseURL + packageName"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "\tlog.Infoln(\"updater: updating using url: %s\", packageURL)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "\tworkDir := filepath.Dir(currentExePath)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "\tbackupDir := filepath.Join(workDir, \"meta-backup\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "\tupdateDir := filepath.Join(workDir, \"meta-update\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "\tpackagePath := filepath.Join(updateDir, packageName)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "\t//log.Infoln(packagePath)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "\tupdateExeName := mihomoBaseName"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "\tif runtime.GOOS == \"windows\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "\t\tupdateExeName = updateExeName + \".exe\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "\tlog.Infoln(\"updateExeName: %s\", updateExeName)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "\tupdateExePath := filepath.Join(updateDir, updateExeName)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "\tbackupExePath := filepath.Join(backupDir, filepath.Base(currentExePath))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "\tdefer u.clean(updateDir)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "\terr = u.download(updateDir, packagePath, packageURL)"
          }
        ],

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package updater\n\nimport (\n\t\"archive/zip\"\n\t\"compress/gzip\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"os/exec\"\n\t\"path/filepath\"\n\t\"runtime\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/ca\"\n\tmihomoHttp \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/http\"\n\tC \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant/features\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/http\"\n)\n\nconst (\n\tbaseReleaseURL    = \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/releases/latest/download/\"\n\tversionReleaseURL = \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/releases/latest/download/version.txt\"\n\n\tbaseAlphaURL    = \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/releases/download/Prerelease-Alpha/\"\n\tversionAlphaURL = \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/releases/download/Prerelease-Alpha/version.txt\"\n\n\t// MaxPackageFileSize is a maximum package file length in bytes. The largest\n\t// package whose size is limited by this constant currently has the size of\n\t// approximately 32 MiB.\n\tMaxPackageFileSize = 32 * 1024 * 1024\n)\n\nconst (\n\tReleaseChannel = \"release\"\n\tAlphaChannel   = \"alpha\"\n)\n\n// CoreUpdater is the mihomo updater.\n// modify from https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdGuardHome/blob/595484e0b3fb4c457f9bb727a6b94faa78a66c5f/internal/updater/updater.go\ntype CoreUpdater struct {\n\tmu sync.Mutex\n}\n\nvar DefaultCoreUpdater = CoreUpdater{}\n\nfunc (u *CoreUpdater) CoreBaseName()",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Build Release\n\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      release-tag:\n        description: 'Release Tag (v2.x.x)'\n        required: true\n\njobs:\n  BuildRelease:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n        with:\n          fetch-depth: 0\n      \n      - name: Checkout submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Gradle\n        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n\n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n      \n      - name: Convert and set version env\n        id: process-version\n        run: |\n          VERSION_TAG=${{ inputs.release-tag }}\n          VERSION_TAG=${VERSION_TAG#v}                              # remove the 'v' prefix\n          IFS='.' read -ra VERSION_PARTS \u003c\u003c\u003c \"$VERSION_TAG\"         # split into array\n          VERSION_CODE=$(printf \"%1d%02d%03d\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[0]}\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[1]}\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[2]}\")\n          \n          echo \"versonName=$VERSION_TAG\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_OUTPUT          # \"1.2.3\"\n          echo \"versonCode=$VERSION_CODE\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_OUTPUT         # \"102003\"\n      \n      # Re-write version in build.gradle.kts\n      - name: Re-write version\n        uses: Devofure/advance-android-version-actions@v1.5\n        with:\n          gradlePath: build.gradle.kts\n          versionCode: ${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonCode }}\n          versionName: ${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonName }}\n      \n      # If any change found, commit it and push\n      - name: Commit and push if changes\n        ",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "name: Build Release"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "on:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "  workflow_dispatch:"
          },

            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "    inputs:"
          },

            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "      release-tag:"
          },

            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "        required: true"

          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "jobs:"
          },

            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "  BuildRelease:"
          },

            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    runs-on: ubuntu-latest"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "    steps:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "      - name: Checkout Repository"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "        uses: actions/checkout@v4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "          fetch-depth: 0"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "      "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "      - name: Checkout submodules"

            "text": "        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --force"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "      - name: Setup Java"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "        uses: actions/setup-java@v4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "          distribution: \"temurin\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "          java-version: 21"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "      - name: Setup Gradle"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "      - name: Setup Go"
          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 33,

            "lineNumber": 34,

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "          path: |"

          {
            "lineNumber": 43,

            "text": "          VERSION_CODE=$(printf \"%1d%02d%03d\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[0]}\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[1]}\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[2]}\")"

          },

          },

          },

            "text": "          gradlePath: build.gradle.kts"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "      with:\n        go-version: '1.25'\n        check-latest: true\n\n    - name: Set variables\n      run: |\n        # Generate version with date and build time (YYMMDD-HHMM) using Asia/Shanghai timezone\n        BUILD_DATE=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date +%y%m%d)\n        BUILD_TIME=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date +%H%M)\n        \n        if [ -n \"${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\" ]; then\n          # Manual release: use provided version\n          VERSION=${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\n          PackageVersion=\"${VERSION#v}\"\n        elif [[ \"${{ github.ref }}\" == refs/tags/* ]]; then\n          # Tag build: use tag name\n          VERSION=\"${GITHUB_REF_NAME}\"\n          PackageVersion=\"${VERSION#v}\"\n        else\n          # Branch build: use date-time format (YYYYMMDD-HHMM)\n          VERSION=\"${BUILD_DATE}-${BUILD_TIME}\"\n          PackageVersion=\"$(curl -s \"https://api.github.com/repos/MetaCubeX/mihomo/releases/latest\" | jq -r '.tag_name' | sed 's/v//g' | awk -F '.' '{$NF = $NF + 1; print}' OFS='.').${VERSION/-/.}\"\n        fi\n        \n        echo \"VERSION=${VERSION}\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"PackageVersion=${PackageVersion}\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n      \n        echo \"BUILDTIME=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date)\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"CGO_ENABLED=0\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"BUILDTAG=-extldflags --static\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"GOTOOLCHAIN=local\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n\n    - name: Update CA\n      run: |\n        sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n        sudo update-ca-certificates\n        cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n    - name: Build core\n      env:\n        GOOS: ${{matrix.jobs.goos}}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "text": "      with:"

            "lineNumber": 41,

            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "        BUILD_DATE=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date +%y%m%d)"

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Update Clash-Core and Go Modules\non:\n  repository_dispatch:\n    types:\n      - core-updated\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\njobs:\n  update-dependencies:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n      \n      - name: Checkout and Update submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --remote --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n      \n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n\n      - name: Install update-go-mod-replace\n        run: |\n          go install github.com/metacubex/update-go-mod-replace@latest\n\n      - name: Update Foss Gomod\n        run: |\n          cd ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/foss/golang/\n          update-go-mod-replace ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/foss/golang/clash/go.mod $(pwd)/go.mod\n          go mod tidy\n\n      - name: Update Main Gomod\n        run: |\n          cd ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/main/golang/\n          update-go-mod-replace ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/foss/golang/clash/go.mod $(pwd)/go.mod\n          go mod tidy\n\n      - uses: tibdex/github-app-token@v2\n        id: generate-token\n        with:\n          app_id: ${{ secrets.MAINTAINER_APPID }}\n          private_key: ${{ secrets.MAINTAINER_APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}\n\n      - name: Create Pull Request\n        id: cpr\n        uses: peter-evans/create-pull-request@v6\n        with:\n          token: ${{ steps.generate-token.outputs.token }}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "name: Update Clash-Core and Go Modules"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package config\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"net/http\"\n\tU \"net/url\"\n\t\"os\"\n\tP \"path\"\n\t\"runtime\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"cfa/native/app\"\n\n\tclashHttp \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/http\"\n)\n\ntype Status struct {\n\tAction      string   &#96;json:\"action\"&#96;\n\tArgs        []string &#96;json:\"args\"&#96;\n\tProgress    int      &#96;json:\"progress\"&#96;\n\tMaxProgress int      &#96;json:\"max\"&#96;\n}\n\nfunc openUrl(ctx context.Context, url string) (io.ReadCloser, error) {\n\tresponse, err := clashHttp.HttpRequest(ctx, url, http.MethodGet, http.Header{\"User-Agent\": {\"ClashMetaForAndroid/\" + app.VersionName()}}, nil)\n\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn response.Body, nil\n}\n\nfunc openContent(url string) (io.ReadCloser, error) {\n\treturn app.OpenContent(url)\n}\n\nfunc fetch(url *U.URL, file string) error {\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 60*time.Second)\n\tdefer cancel()\n\n\tvar reader io.ReadCloser\n\tvar err error\n\n\tswitch url.Scheme {\n\tcase \"http\", \"https\":\n\t\treader, err = openUrl(ctx, url.String())\n\tcase \"content\":\n\t\treader, err = openContent(url.String())\n\tdefault:\n\t\terr = fmt.Errorf(\"unsupported scheme %s of %s\", url.Scheme, url)\n\t}\n\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tdefer reader.Close()\n\n\t_ = os.MkdirAll(P.Dir(file), 0700)\n\n\tf, err := os.OpenFile(file, os.O_WRONLY|os.O_TRUNC|os.O_CREATE, 0600)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tdefer f.Close()\n\n\t_, err = io.Copy(f, reader)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\t_ = os.Remove(file)\n\t}\n\n\treturn err\n}\n\nfunc FetchAndValid(\n\tpath string,\n\turl string,\n\tforce bool,",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.0)\n\n# 获取git hash\n\nmessage(STATUS \"CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR= ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}\")\nexecute_process(\n  COMMAND git submodule foreach git log -1 --format=%H   \n  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} \n  OUTPUT_VARIABLE COMMIT_HASH\n)\nstring(REPLACE \"\\n\" \";\" COMMIT_HASH \"${COMMIT_HASH}\")\nlist(GET COMMIT_HASH 1 COMMIT_HASH)\nstring (REGEX REPLACE \"[\\n\\t\\r]\" \"\" COMMIT_HASH ${COMMIT_HASH})\nstring(SUBSTRING ${COMMIT_HASH} 0 7 COMMIT_HASH)\nmessage(STATUS \"git hash= ${COMMIT_HASH}\")\n\n# 获取分支名称\nexecute_process(\n  COMMAND git submodule foreach git branch -r --contains ${COMMIT_HASH}\n  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} \n  OUTPUT_VARIABLE CURRENT_BRANCH\n)\nstring(REPLACE \"\\n\" \";\" CURRENT_BRANCH \"${CURRENT_BRANCH}\")\nlist(GET CURRENT_BRANCH 1 CURRENT_BRANCH)\nstring (REGEX REPLACE \"origin/\" \"\" CURRENT_BRANCH ${CURRENT_BRANCH})\nstring (REGEX REPLACE \"[\\n\\t\\r]\" \"\" CURRENT_BRANCH ${CURRENT_BRANCH})\n#string(SUBSTRING ${CURRENT_BRANCH} 0 8 CURRENT_BRANCH)\nmessage(STATUS \"git current branch = ${CURRENT_BRANCH}\")\n\n# 获取生成时间\nstring(TIMESTAMP COMPILE_TIME \"%y%m%d\")\nstring (REGEX REPLACE \"[\\n\\t\\r]\" \"\" COMPILE_TIME ${COMPILE_TIME})\nstring(REGEX REPLACE \"\\\"\" \"\" COMPILE_TIME ${COMPILE_TIME})\n\n# 生成版本信息\nset(GIT_VERSION \"${CURRENT_BRANCH}_${COMMIT_HASH}_${COMPILE_TIME}\")\nmessage(STATUS \"version info = ${GIT_VERSION}\")\n\n# 去除空格\nstring(REGEX REPLACE \"[ ]+\" \"\" GIT_VERSION \"${GIT_VERSION}\")\n\n# 保存变量到文件\nconfigure_file(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/version.h.in ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/version.h @ONLY)\n\nproject(clash-bridge C)\n\n\nset(CMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE on)\nset(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE \"${CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE} -O3\")\n\nset(GO_OUTPUT_BASE ${GO_OUTPUT}/${FLAVOR_NAME})\n\nif (\"${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\" STREQUAL \"Debug\")\n    set(GO_OUTPUT_BASE \"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}Debug\")\nelseif (\"${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\" STREQUAL \"Release\")\n    set(GO_OUTPUT_BASE \"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}Release\")\nelseif (\"${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\" STREQUAL \"RelWithDebInfo\")\n    set(GO_OUTPUT_BASE \"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}Release\")",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "          fetch-tags: 'true'\n\n      - name: Get tags\n        run: |\n          echo \"CURRENTVERSION=${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n          git fetch --tags\n          echo \"PREVERSION=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 HEAD)\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n\n      - name: Force push Alpha branch to Meta\n        run: |\n          git config --global user.email \"github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com\"\n          git config --global user.name \"github-actions[bot]\"\n          git fetch origin Alpha:Alpha\n          git push origin Alpha:Meta --force\n        env:\n          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n      - name: Tag the commit on Alpha\n        run: |\n          git checkout Alpha \n          git tag ${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\n          git push origin ${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\n        env:\n          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n      - name: Generate release notes\n        run: |\n            cp ./.github/genReleaseNote.sh ./\n            bash ./genReleaseNote.sh -v ${PREVERSION}...${CURRENTVERSION}\n            rm ./genReleaseNote.sh\n  \n      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v4\n        with:\n          path: bin/\n          merge-multiple: true\n  \n      - name: Display structure of downloaded files\n        run: ls -R\n        working-directory: bin\n  \n      - name: Upload Release\n        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2\n        if: ${{ success() }}\n        with:\n          tag_name: ${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\n          files: bin/*\n          body_path: release.md",
        "detailedLines": [

            "text": "          fetch-tags: 'true'"

            "lineNumber": 182

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package resource\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/utils\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/slowdown\"\n\tP \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant/provider\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/fswatch\"\n\t\"github.com/samber/lo\"\n)\n\ntype Parser[V any] func([]byte) (V, error)\n\ntype Fetcher[V any] struct {\n\tctx          context.Context\n\tctxCancel    context.CancelFunc\n\tresourceType string\n\tname         string\n\tvehicle      P.Vehicle\n\tupdatedAt    time.Time\n\thash         utils.HashType\n\tparser       Parser[V]\n\tinterval     time.Duration\n\tonUpdate     func(V)\n\twatcher      *fswatch.Watcher\n\tloadBufMutex sync.Mutex\n\tbackoff      slowdown.Backoff\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fetcher[V]) Name() string {\n\treturn f.name\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fetcher[V]) Vehicle() P.Vehicle {\n\treturn f.vehicle\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fetcher[V]) VehicleType() P.VehicleType {\n\treturn f.vehicle.Type()\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fetcher[V]) UpdatedAt() time.Time {\n\treturn f.updatedAt\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fetcher[V]) Initial() (V, error) {\n\tif stat, fErr := os.Stat(f.vehicle.Path()); fErr == nil {\n\t\t// local file exists, use it first\n\t\tbuf, err := os.ReadFile(f.vehicle.Path())\n\t\tmodTime := stat.ModTime()\n\t\tcontents, _, err := f.loadBuf(buf, utils.MakeHash(buf), false)\n\t\tf.updatedAt = modTime // reset updatedAt to file's modTime\n\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = f.startPullLoop(time.Since(modTime) \u003e f.interval)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn lo.Empty[V](), err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\treturn contents, nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// parse local file error, fallback to remote\n\tcontents, _, updateErr := f.Update()\n\n\t// start the pull loop even if f.Update() failed\n\terr := f.startPullLoop(false)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn lo.Empty[V](), err\n\t}\n\n\tif updateErr != nil {\n\t\treturn lo.Empty[V](), updateErr\n\t}\n\n\treturn contents, nil\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fetcher[V]) Update() (V, bool, error)",
        "detailedLines": [

            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "\t\tf.updatedAt = modTime // reset updatedAt to file's modTime"
          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "\t\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,

          },

            "lineNumber": 62,

          },

          },

          },

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Build Pre-Release\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n  push:\n    branches:\n      - main\n\njobs:\n  BuildPreRelease:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n      \n      - name: Checkout submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --remote --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Gradle\n        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n\n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n\n      - name: Update CA\n        run: |\n          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n          sudo update-ca-certificates\n          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n      - name: Setup signing\n        env:\n          SIGNING_KEYSTORE_BASE64: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEYSTORE_BASE64 }}\n          SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}\n          DEBUG_KEYSTORE_BASE64: ${{ secrets.DEBUG_KEYSTORE_BASE64 }}\n        run: |\n          # 优先使用 release 签名，如果配置完整\n          if [ -n \"$SIGNING_KEYSTORE_BASE64\" ] \u0026\u0026 [ -n \"$SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD\" ] \u0026\u0026 [ -n \"$SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS\" ] \u0026\u0026 [ -n \"$SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD\" ]; then\n            echo \"Using release signing\"\n            echo \"$SIGNING_KEYSTORE_BASE64\" | base64 -d \u003e release.keystore\n            touch signing.properties\n            echo keystore.password=\"$SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD\" \u003e signing.properties\n            echo key.alias=\"$SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n            echo key.password=\"$SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n            cat signing.properties\n          # 否则使用固定的 debug keystore（通过 secrets 存储，确保一致性）\n          elif [ -n \"$DEBUG_KEYSTORE_BASE64\" ]; then\n            echo \"Using fixed debug keystore from secrets\"\n            mkdir -p ~/.android",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package delegate\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"syscall\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/process\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\"\n\n\t\"cfa/native/app\"\n\t\"cfa/native/platform\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/dialer\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\"\n)\n\nvar errBlocked = errors.New(\"blocked\")\n\nvar healthCheckNotifyFunc func(groupName string)\n\nfunc SetHealthCheckNotifyFunc(fn func(groupName string)) {\n\thealthCheckNotifyFunc = fn\n}\n\nfunc NotifyHealthCheckTriggered(groupName string) {\n\tif healthCheckNotifyFunc != nil {\n\t\thealthCheckNotifyFunc(groupName)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc Init(home, versionName, gitVersion string, platformVersion int) {\n\tlog.Infoln(\"Init core, home: %s, versionName: %s, gitVersion: %s, platformVersion: %d\", home, versionName, gitVersion, platformVersion)\n\tconstant.SetHomeDir(home)\n\t// gitVersion = ${CURRENT_BRANCH}_${COMMIT_HASH}_${COMPILE_TIME}\n\tif versions := strings.Split(gitVersion, \"_\"); len(versions) == 3 {\n\t\tconstant.Version = fmt.Sprintf(\"%s-%s-CMFA-%s\", strings.ToLower(versions[0]), versions[1], strings.ToLower(versionName))\n\t\tconstant.BuildTime = versions[2]\n\t} else {\n\t\tconstant.Version = gitVersion\n\t}\n\tconstant.Version = strings.ToLower(constant.Version)\n\tapp.ApplyVersionName(versionName)\n\tapp.ApplyPlatformVersion(platformVersion)\n\n\tprocess.DefaultPackageNameResolver = func(metadata *constant.Metadata) (string, error) {\n\t\tsrc, dst := metadata.RawSrcAddr, metadata.RawDstAddr\n\n\t\tif src == nil || dst == nil {\n\t\t\treturn \"\", process.ErrInvalidNetwork\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tuid := app.QuerySocketUid(metadata.RawSrcAddr, metadata.RawDstAddr)\n\t\tpkg := app.QueryAppByUid(uid)\n\n\t\tlog.Debugln(\"[PKG] %s --\u003e %s by %d[%s]\", metadata.SourceAddress(), metadata.RemoteAddress(), uid, pkg)\n\n\t\treturn pkg, nil\n\t}\n\n\tdialer.DefaultSocketHook = func(network, address string, conn syscall.RawConn) error {\n\t\tif platform.ShouldBlockConnection() {\n\t\t\treturn errBlocked\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn conn.Control(func(fd uintptr) {\n\t\t\tapp.MarkSocket(int(fd))\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package route\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"os\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/updater\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/chi\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/chi/render\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/http\"\n)\n\nfunc upgradeRouter() http.Handler {\n\tr := chi.NewRouter()\n\tr.Post(\"/ui\", updateUI)\n\tif !embedMode { // disallow upgrade core/geo in embed mode\n\t\tr.Post(\"/\", upgradeCore)\n\t\tr.Post(\"/geo\", updateGeoDatabases)\n\t}\n\treturn r\n}\n\nfunc upgradeCore(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\t// modify from https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdGuardHome/blob/595484e0b3fb4c457f9bb727a6b94faa78a66c5f/internal/home/controlupdate.go#L108\n\tlog.Infoln(\"start update\")\n\texecPath, err := os.Executable()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\trender.Status(r, http.StatusInternalServerError)\n\t\trender.JSON(w, r, newError(fmt.Sprintf(\"getting path: %s\", err)))\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tquery := r.URL.Query()\n\tchannel := query.Get(\"channel\")\n\tforce := query.Get(\"force\") == \"true\"\n\n\terr = updater.DefaultCoreUpdater.Update(execPath, channel, force)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"%s\", err)\n\t\trender.Status(r, http.StatusInternalServerError)\n\t\trender.JSON(w, r, newError(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s\", err)))\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\trender.JSON(w, r, render.M{\"status\": \"ok\"})\n\tif f, ok := w.(http.Flusher); ok {\n\t\tf.Flush()\n\t}\n\n\tgo restartExecutable(execPath)\n}\n\nfunc updateUI(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\terr := updater.DefaultUiUpdater.DownloadUI()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"%s\", err)\n\t\trender.Status(r, http.StatusInternalServerError)\n\t\trender.JSON(w, r, newError(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s\", err)))\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\trender.JSON(w, r, render.M{\"status\": \"ok\"})\n\tif f, ok := w.(http.Flusher); ok {\n\t\tf.Flush()\n\t}\n}",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "[submodule \"clash-foss\"]\n\tpath = core/src/foss/golang/clash\n\turl = https://github.com/MikeKen-Ken/mihomo\n\tbranch = Alpha",

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "{\n  description = \"Another Mihomo Kernel\";\n\n  inputs.nixpkgs.url = \"github:NixOS/nixpkgs/master\";\n\n  inputs.utils.url = \"github:numtide/flake-utils\";\n\n  outputs = { self, nixpkgs, utils }:\n    utils.lib.eachDefaultSystem\n      (system:\n        let\n          pkgs = import nixpkgs {\n            inherit system;\n            overlays = [ self.overlay ];\n          };\n        in\n        rec {\n          packages.default = pkgs.mihomo-meta;\n        }\n      ) //\n    (\n      let version = nixpkgs.lib.substring 0 8 self.lastModifiedDate or self.lastModified or \"19700101\"; in\n      {\n        overlay = final: prev: {\n\n          mihomo-meta = final.buildGo119Module {\n            pname = \"mihomo-meta\";\n            inherit version;\n            src = ./.;\n\n            vendorSha256 = \"sha256-W5oiPtTRin0731QQWr98xZ2Vpk97HYcBtKoi1OKZz+w=\";\n\n            # Do not build testing suit\n            excludedPackages = [ \"./test\" ];\n\n            CGO_ENABLED = 0;\n\n            ldflags = [\n              \"-s\"\n              \"-w\"\n              \"-X github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant.Version=dev-${version}\"\n              \"-X github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant.BuildTime=${version}\"\n            ];\n            \n            tags = [\n              \"with_gvisor\"\n            ];\n\n            # Network required \n            doCheck = false;\n\n            postInstall = ''\n              mv $out/bin/mihomo $out/bin/mihomo-meta\n            '';\n\n          };\n        };\n      }\n    );\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package constant\n\nvar (\n\tMeta       = true\n\tVersion    = \"1.10.0\"\n\tBuildTime  = \"unknown time\"\n\tMihomoName = \"mihomo\"\n)",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (u *CoreUpdater) download(updateDir, packagePath, packageURL string) (err error) {\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Second*90)\n\tdefer cancel()\n\tresp, err := mihomoHttp.HttpRequest(ctx, packageURL, http.MethodGet, nil, nil, mihomoHttp.WithCAOption(ca.Option{ZeroTrust: true}))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"http request failed: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tcloseErr := resp.Body.Close()\n\t\tif closeErr != nil \u0026\u0026 err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = closeErr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\tlog.Debugln(\"updateDir %s\", updateDir)\n\terr = os.Mkdir(updateDir, 0o755)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"mkdir error: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\tlog.Debugln(\"updater: saving package to file %s\", packagePath)\n\t// Create the output file\n\twc, err := os.OpenFile(packagePath, os.O_WRONLY|os.O_CREATE|os.O_TRUNC, 0o755)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"os.OpenFile(%s): %w\", packagePath, err)\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tcloseErr := wc.Close()\n\t\tif closeErr != nil \u0026\u0026 err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = closeErr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\tlog.Debugln(\"updater: reading http body\")\n\t// This use of io.Copy is now safe, because we limited body's Reader.\n\tn, err := io.Copy(wc, io.LimitReader(resp.Body, MaxPackageFileSize))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"io.Copy(): %w\", err)\n\t}\n\tif n == MaxPackageFileSize {\n\t\t// Use whether n is equal to MaxPackageFileSize to determine whether the limit has been reached.\n\t\t// It is also possible that the size of the downloaded file is exactly the same as the maximum limit,\n\t\t// but we should not consider this too rare situation.\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"attempted to read more than %d bytes\", MaxPackageFileSize)\n\t}\n\tlog.Debugln(\"updater: downloaded package to file %s\", packagePath)\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// unpack extracts the files from the downloaded archive.\nfunc (u *CoreUpdater) unpack(updateDir, packagePath string, fileMode os.FileMode) error {\n\tlog.Infoln(\"updater: unpacking package\")",

          },

            "text": "\t// This use of io.Copy is now safe, because we limited body's Reader."
          },

            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "\tn, err := io.Copy(wc, io.LimitReader(resp.Body, MaxPackageFileSize))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,

          },

            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "\tif n == MaxPackageFileSize {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238,
            "text": "\t\t// Use whether n is equal to MaxPackageFileSize to determine whether the limit has been reached."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "\t\t// It is also possible that the size of the downloaded file is exactly the same as the maximum limit,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "text": "\t\t// but we should not consider this too rare situation."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,

        "contents": "    suspend fun updateFlow(old: Imported) {\n        val client = OkHttpClient()\n        try {\n            val versionName = context.packageManager.getPackageInfo(context.packageName, 0).versionName\n            val request = Request.Builder()\n                .url(old.source)\n                .header(\"User-Agent\", \"ClashMetaForAndroid/$versionName\")\n                .build()\n\n            client.newCall(request).execute().use { response -\u003e\n                if (!response.isSuccessful || response.headers[\"subscription-userinfo\"] == null) return\n\n                var upload: Long = 0\n                var download: Long = 0\n                var total: Long = 0\n                var expire: Long = 0\n\n                val userinfo = response.headers[\"subscription-userinfo\"]\n                if (response.isSuccessful \u0026\u0026 userinfo != null) {\n\n                    val flags = userinfo.split(\";\")\n                    for (flag in flags) {\n                        val info = flag.split(\"=\")\n                        when {\n                            info[0].contains(\"upload\") \u0026\u0026 info[1].isNotEmpty() -\u003e upload =\n                                BigDecimal(info[1].split('.').first()).longValueExact()\n\n                            info[0].contains(\"download\") \u0026\u0026 info[1].isNotEmpty() -\u003e download =\n                                BigDecimal(info[1].split('.').first()).longValueExact()\n\n                            info[0].contains(\"total\") \u0026\u0026 info[1].isNotEmpty() -\u003e  total =\n                                BigDecimal(info[1].split('.').first()).longValueExact()\n\n                            info[0].contains(\"expire\") \u0026\u0026 info[1].isNotEmpty() -\u003e {\n                                if (info[1].isNotEmpty()) {\n                                    expire = (info[1].toDouble()*1000).toLong()\n                                }\n                            }\n                        }\n                    }\n                }\n\n                val new = Imported(\n                    old.uuid,\n                    old.name,\n                    old.type,",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Build Debug\non:\n  pull_request:\n    types: [opened, reopened, synchronize]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\njobs:\n  BuildDebug:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n      \n      - name: Checkout submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Gradle\n        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n\n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n\n      - name: Update CA\n        run: |\n          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n          sudo update-ca-certificates\n          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n      # - name: Signing properties\n      #   env:\n      #     SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD }}\n      #     SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}\n      #     SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}\n      #   run: |\n      #     touch signing.properties\n      #     echo keystore.password=\"$SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD\" \u003e signing.properties\n      #     echo key.alias=\"$SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n      #     echo key.password=\"$SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n            \n      #     echo \"cat signing.properties\"\n      #     cat signing.properties\n\n      - name: Build\n        if: success()",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        merge-multiple: true\n\n    - name: Calculate checksums\n      run: |\n        cd bin/\n        find . -type f -not -name \"checksums.*\" -not -name \"version.txt\" | sort | xargs sha256sum \u003e checksums.txt\n        cat checksums.txt\n      shell: bash\n\n    - name: Delete current release assets\n      uses: 8Mi-Tech/delete-release-assets-action@main\n      with:\n        github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n        tag: Prerelease-${{ github.ref_name }}\n        deleteOnlyFromDrafts: false\n    - name: Set Env\n      run: |\n        echo \"BUILDTIME=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date)\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n      shell: bash\n\n    - name: Tag Repo\n      uses: richardsimko/update-tag@v1\n      with:\n        tag_name: Prerelease-${{ github.ref_name }}\n      env:\n        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n      \n    - run: |\n        cat \u003e release.txt \u003c\u003c 'EOF'\n        Release created at  ${{ env.BUILDTIME }}\n        Synchronize ${{ github.ref_name }} branch code updates, keeping only the latest version\n        \u003cbr\u003e\n        [我应该下载哪个文件? / Which file should I download?](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/wiki/FAQ)\n        [二进制文件筛选 / Binary file selector](https://metacubex.github.io/Meta-Docs/startup/#_1)\n        [查看文档 / Docs](https://metacubex.github.io/Meta-Docs/)\n        EOF\n\n    - name: Upload Prerelease\n      uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1\n      if: ${{  success() }}\n      with:\n        tag_name: Prerelease-${{ github.ref_name }}\n        files: |\n          bin/*\n        prerelease: true\n        generate_release_notes: true\n        body_path: release.txt\n\n  Upload-Release:\n    permissions: write-all\n    if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' \u0026\u0026 github.event.inputs.version != '' }}\n    needs: [build]\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout\n        uses: actions/checkout@v5\n        with:\n          ref: Meta\n          fetch-depth: '0'\n          fetch-tags: 'true'\n\n      - name: Get tags",
        "detailedLines": [

            "text": "      uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1"

            "text": "      if: ${{  success() }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "      with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "        tag_name: Prerelease-${{ github.ref_name }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "        files: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "          bin/*"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "        prerelease: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "        generate_release_notes: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "        body_path: release.txt"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "  Upload-Release:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "    permissions: write-all"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "    if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' \u0026\u0026 github.event.inputs.version != '' }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "    needs: [build]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "    runs-on: ubuntu-latest"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "    steps:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "      - name: Checkout"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "        uses: actions/checkout@v5"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "          ref: Meta"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "          fetch-depth: '0'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "          fetch-tags: 'true'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "      - name: Get tags"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 183

      "score": 0.2770982086658478

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "      # If any change found, commit it and push\n      - name: Commit and push if changes\n        run: |\n          changes=$(git diff --name-only origin/main | wc -l)\n          if [ $changes -gt 0 ]\n          then\n            newVersionName=${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonName }}\n            newVersionCode=${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonCode }}\n            git config --global user.name 'GitHub Action'\n            git config --global user.email 'action@github.com'\n            git add build.gradle.kts\n            git commit -am \"Bump version to $newVersionName ($newVersionCode)\"\n            git tag \"v$newVersionName\"\n            git push --follow-tags\n          fi\n\n      - name: Update CA\n        run: |\n          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n          sudo update-ca-certificates\n          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n      - name: Signing properties\n        env:\n          SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}\n        run: |\n          touch signing.properties\n          echo keystore.password=\"$SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD\" \u003e signing.properties\n          echo key.alias=\"$SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n          echo key.password=\"$SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n            \n          echo \"cat signing.properties\"\n          cat signing.properties\n\n      - name: Release Build\n        if: success()\n        run: ./gradlew --no-daemon app:assembleMetaRelease\n\n      - name: Tag Repo\n        uses: richardsimko/update-tag@v1",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    private suspend fun verifyApp() {\n        val context = Global.application\n        val store = AppStore(context)\n        val updatedAt = getLastUpdated(context)\n\n        if (store.updatedAt != updatedAt) {\n            if (!context.verifyApk()) {\n                ApplicationObserver.createdActivities.forEach { it.finish() }\n\n                val intent = ApkBrokenActivity::class.intent\n                    .addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK)\n\n                return context.startActivity(intent)\n            } else {\n                store.updatedAt = updatedAt\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private fun getLastUpdated(context: Context): Long {\n        return context.packageManager.getPackageInfo(context.packageName, 0).lastUpdateTime\n    }\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func FetchAndValid(\n\tpath string,\n\turl string,\n\tforce bool,\n\treportStatus func(string),\n) error {\n\tconfigPath := P.Join(path, \"config.yaml\")\n\n\tif _, err := os.Stat(configPath); os.IsNotExist(err) || force {\n\t\turl, err := U.Parse(url)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tbytes, _ := json.Marshal(\u0026Status{\n\t\t\tAction:      \"FetchConfiguration\",\n\t\t\tArgs:        []string{url.Host},\n\t\t\tProgress:    -1,\n\t\t\tMaxProgress: -1,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\treportStatus(string(bytes))\n\n\t\tif err := fetch(url, configPath); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tdefer runtime.GC()\n\n\trawCfg, err := UnmarshalAndPatch(path)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tforEachProviders(rawCfg, func(index int, total int, name string, provider map[string]any, prefix string) {\n\t\tbytes, _ := json.Marshal(\u0026Status{\n\t\t\tAction:      \"FetchProviders\",\n\t\t\tArgs:        []string{name},\n\t\t\tProgress:    index,\n\t\t\tMaxProgress: total,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\treportStatus(string(bytes))\n\n\t\tu, uok := provider[\"url\"]\n\t\tp, pok := provider[\"path\"]\n\n\t\tif !uok || !pok {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tus, uok := u.(string)\n\t\tps, pok := p.(string)\n\n\t\tif !uok || !pok {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif _, err := os.Stat(ps); err == nil {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\turl, err := U.Parse(us)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_ = fetch(url, ps)\n\t})\n\n\tbytes, _ := json.Marshal(\u0026Status{\n\t\tAction:      \"Verifying\",\n\t\tArgs:        []string{},\n\t\tProgress:    0xffff,\n\t\tMaxProgress: 0xffff,\n\t})\n\n\treportStatus(string(bytes))\n\n\tcfg, err := Parse(rawCfg)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tdestroyProviders(cfg)\n\n\treturn nil\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package updater\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\tmihomoHttp \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/http\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/http\"\n)\n\nconst defaultHttpTimeout = time.Second * 90\n\nfunc downloadForBytes(url string) ([]byte, error) {\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), defaultHttpTimeout)\n\tdefer cancel()\n\tresp, err := mihomoHttp.HttpRequest(ctx, url, http.MethodGet, nil, nil)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\tdefer resp.Body.Close()\n\n\treturn io.ReadAll(resp.Body)\n}\n\nfunc saveFile(bytes []byte, path string) error {\n\treturn os.WriteFile(path, bytes, 0o644)\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package updater"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,

          },

            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\t\"time\""
          },

            "lineNumber": 8
          },

            "lineNumber": 9,

            "text": "\t\"github.com/metacubex/http\""

          },

_**Agent (default)**_


是的，**关于对话框中显示的 mihomo 版本号与远端版本号无关**。

## 关于对话框中的版本号

**来源**：编译时通过 CMake 生成，基于本地 git submodule 的 commit hash

**生成逻辑**（`CMakeLists.txt` 第6-36行）：
```cmake
# 获取本地 git submodule 的 commit hash（7位）
git submodule foreach git log -1 --format=%H

# 获取分支名称
git submodule foreach git branch -r --contains ${COMMIT_HASH}

# 生成版本字符串：分支名_commit_hash_编译日期
set(GIT_VERSION "${CURRENT_BRANCH}_${COMMIT_HASH}_${COMPILE_TIME}")
```

**特点**：
- 基于本地 git submodule 的 commit hash
- 编译时生成，静态值
- 不查询远端仓库
- 格式：`分支名_7位hash_日期`（如：`master_abc1234_250127`）

## 远端版本号（用于更新）

在 `update_core.go` 中有从远端获取最新版本号的逻辑（第173-193行），用于检查更新，但不用于关于对话框的显示。

**总结**：关于对话框显示的版本号是编译时基于本地代码生成的，与远端版本号无关。

---

_**User**_

https://github.com/MikeKen-Ken/mihomo/releases/download/Prerelease-Alpha/version.txt 能否使用这个版本号？ 也就是编译的时候动态的从这里获取

---

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package config\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"net/http\"\n\tU \"net/url\"\n\t\"os\"\n\tP \"path\"\n\t\"runtime\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"cfa/native/app\"\n\n\tclashHttp \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/http\"\n)\n\ntype Status struct {\n\tAction      string   &#96;json:\"action\"&#96;\n\tArgs        []string &#96;json:\"args\"&#96;\n\tProgress    int      &#96;json:\"progress\"&#96;\n\tMaxProgress int      &#96;json:\"max\"&#96;\n}\n\nfunc openUrl(ctx context.Context, url string) (io.ReadCloser, error) {\n\tresponse, err := clashHttp.HttpRequest(ctx, url, http.MethodGet, http.Header{\"User-Agent\": {\"ClashMetaForAndroid/\" + app.VersionName()}}, nil)\n\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn response.Body, nil\n}\n\nfunc openContent(url string) (io.ReadCloser, error) {\n\treturn app.OpenContent(url)\n}\n\nfunc fetch(url *U.URL, file string) error {\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 60*time.Second)\n\tdefer cancel()\n\n\tvar reader io.ReadCloser\n\tvar err error\n\n\tswitch url.Scheme {\n\tcase \"http\", \"https\":\n\t\treader, err = openUrl(ctx, url.String())\n\tcase \"content\":\n\t\treader, err = openContent(url.String())\n\tdefault:\n\t\terr = fmt.Errorf(\"unsupported scheme %s of %s\", url.Scheme, url)\n\t}\n\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tdefer reader.Close()\n\n\t_ = os.MkdirAll(P.Dir(file), 0700)\n\n\tf, err := os.OpenFile(file, os.O_WRONLY|os.O_TRUNC|os.O_CREATE, 0600)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tdefer f.Close()\n\n\t_, err = io.Copy(f, reader)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\t_ = os.Remove(file)\n\t}\n\n\treturn err\n}\n\nfunc FetchAndValid(\n\tpath string,\n\turl string,\n\tforce bool,",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (u *CoreUpdater) download(updateDir, packagePath, packageURL string) (err error) {\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Second*90)\n\tdefer cancel()\n\tresp, err := mihomoHttp.HttpRequest(ctx, packageURL, http.MethodGet, nil, nil, mihomoHttp.WithCAOption(ca.Option{ZeroTrust: true}))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"http request failed: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tcloseErr := resp.Body.Close()\n\t\tif closeErr != nil \u0026\u0026 err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = closeErr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\tlog.Debugln(\"updateDir %s\", updateDir)\n\terr = os.Mkdir(updateDir, 0o755)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"mkdir error: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\tlog.Debugln(\"updater: saving package to file %s\", packagePath)\n\t// Create the output file\n\twc, err := os.OpenFile(packagePath, os.O_WRONLY|os.O_CREATE|os.O_TRUNC, 0o755)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"os.OpenFile(%s): %w\", packagePath, err)\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tcloseErr := wc.Close()\n\t\tif closeErr != nil \u0026\u0026 err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = closeErr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\tlog.Debugln(\"updater: reading http body\")\n\t// This use of io.Copy is now safe, because we limited body's Reader.\n\tn, err := io.Copy(wc, io.LimitReader(resp.Body, MaxPackageFileSize))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"io.Copy(): %w\", err)\n\t}\n\tif n == MaxPackageFileSize {\n\t\t// Use whether n is equal to MaxPackageFileSize to determine whether the limit has been reached.\n\t\t// It is also possible that the size of the downloaded file is exactly the same as the maximum limit,\n\t\t// but we should not consider this too rare situation.\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"attempted to read more than %d bytes\", MaxPackageFileSize)\n\t}\n\tlog.Debugln(\"updater: downloaded package to file %s\", packagePath)\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// unpack extracts the files from the downloaded archive.\nfunc (u *CoreUpdater) unpack(updateDir, packagePath string, fileMode os.FileMode) error {\n\tlog.Infoln(\"updater: unpacking package\")",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func FetchAndValid(\n\tpath string,\n\turl string,\n\tforce bool,\n\treportStatus func(string),\n) error {\n\tconfigPath := P.Join(path, \"config.yaml\")\n\n\tif _, err := os.Stat(configPath); os.IsNotExist(err) || force {\n\t\turl, err := U.Parse(url)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tbytes, _ := json.Marshal(\u0026Status{\n\t\t\tAction:      \"FetchConfiguration\",\n\t\t\tArgs:        []string{url.Host},\n\t\t\tProgress:    -1,\n\t\t\tMaxProgress: -1,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\treportStatus(string(bytes))\n\n\t\tif err := fetch(url, configPath); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tdefer runtime.GC()\n\n\trawCfg, err := UnmarshalAndPatch(path)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tforEachProviders(rawCfg, func(index int, total int, name string, provider map[string]any, prefix string) {\n\t\tbytes, _ := json.Marshal(\u0026Status{\n\t\t\tAction:      \"FetchProviders\",\n\t\t\tArgs:        []string{name},\n\t\t\tProgress:    index,\n\t\t\tMaxProgress: total,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\treportStatus(string(bytes))\n\n\t\tu, uok := provider[\"url\"]\n\t\tp, pok := provider[\"path\"]\n\n\t\tif !uok || !pok {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tus, uok := u.(string)\n\t\tps, pok := p.(string)\n\n\t\tif !uok || !pok {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif _, err := os.Stat(ps); err == nil {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\turl, err := U.Parse(us)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_ = fetch(url, ps)\n\t})\n\n\tbytes, _ := json.Marshal(\u0026Status{\n\t\tAction:      \"Verifying\",\n\t\tArgs:        []string{},\n\t\tProgress:    0xffff,\n\t\tMaxProgress: 0xffff,\n\t})\n\n\treportStatus(string(bytes))\n\n\tcfg, err := Parse(rawCfg)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tdestroyProviders(cfg)\n\n\treturn nil\n}",
        "detailedLines": [

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Build Debug\non:\n  pull_request:\n    types: [opened, reopened, synchronize]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\njobs:\n  BuildDebug:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n      \n      - name: Checkout submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Gradle\n        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n\n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n\n      - name: Update CA\n        run: |\n          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n          sudo update-ca-certificates\n          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n      # - name: Signing properties\n      #   env:\n      #     SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD }}\n      #     SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}\n      #     SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}\n      #   run: |\n      #     touch signing.properties\n      #     echo keystore.password=\"$SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD\" \u003e signing.properties\n      #     echo key.alias=\"$SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n      #     echo key.password=\"$SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n            \n      #     echo \"cat signing.properties\"\n      #     cat signing.properties\n\n      - name: Build\n        if: success()",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\tbackupExePath := filepath.Join(backupDir, filepath.Base(currentExePath))\n\n\tdefer u.clean(updateDir)\n\n\terr = u.download(updateDir, packagePath, packageURL)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"downloading: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\terr = u.unpack(updateDir, packagePath, info.Mode())\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"unpacking: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\terr = u.backup(currentExePath, backupExePath, backupDir)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"backuping: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\terr = u.copyFile(updateExePath, currentExePath)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"replacing: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (u *CoreUpdater) getLatestVersion(versionURL string) (version string, err error) {\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Second*5)\n\tdefer cancel()\n\tresp, err := mihomoHttp.HttpRequest(ctx, versionURL, http.MethodGet, nil, nil, mihomoHttp.WithCAOption(ca.Option{ZeroTrust: true}))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn \"\", err\n\t}\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tcloseErr := resp.Body.Close()\n\t\tif closeErr != nil \u0026\u0026 err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = closeErr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\tbody, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn \"\", err\n\t}\n\tcontent := strings.TrimRight(string(body), \"\\n\")\n\treturn content, nil\n}\n\n// download package file and save it to disk\nfunc (u *CoreUpdater) download(updateDir, packagePath, packageURL string) (err error) {\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Build Pre-Release\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n  push:\n    branches:\n      - main\n\njobs:\n  BuildPreRelease:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n      \n      - name: Checkout submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --remote --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Gradle\n        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n\n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n\n      - name: Update CA\n        run: |\n          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n          sudo update-ca-certificates\n          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n      - name: Setup signing\n        env:\n          SIGNING_KEYSTORE_BASE64: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEYSTORE_BASE64 }}\n          SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}\n          DEBUG_KEYSTORE_BASE64: ${{ secrets.DEBUG_KEYSTORE_BASE64 }}\n        run: |\n          # 优先使用 release 签名，如果配置完整\n          if [ -n \"$SIGNING_KEYSTORE_BASE64\" ] \u0026\u0026 [ -n \"$SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD\" ] \u0026\u0026 [ -n \"$SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS\" ] \u0026\u0026 [ -n \"$SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD\" ]; then\n            echo \"Using release signing\"\n            echo \"$SIGNING_KEYSTORE_BASE64\" | base64 -d \u003e release.keystore\n            touch signing.properties\n            echo keystore.password=\"$SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD\" \u003e signing.properties\n            echo key.alias=\"$SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n            echo key.password=\"$SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n            cat signing.properties\n          # 否则使用固定的 debug keystore（通过 secrets 存储，确保一致性）\n          elif [ -n \"$DEBUG_KEYSTORE_BASE64\" ]; then\n            echo \"Using fixed debug keystore from secrets\"\n            mkdir -p ~/.android",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "text": "      - name: Setup Java"

            "text": "        with:"

            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "          distribution: \"temurin\""

          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "          java-version: 21"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "      - name: Setup Gradle"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "      - name: Setup Go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "        uses: actions/setup-go@v6"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "          go-version: \"1.25\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "      - uses: actions/cache@v4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "          path: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "            ~/.cache/go-build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "            ~/go/pkg/mod"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "          restore-keys: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "            ${{ runner.os }}-go-"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "      - name: Update CA"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "        run: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "          sudo update-ca-certificates"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "      - name: Setup signing"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "        env:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "          SIGNING_KEYSTORE_BASE64: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEYSTORE_BASE64 }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "          SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "          SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "          SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "          DEBUG_KEYSTORE_BASE64: ${{ secrets.DEBUG_KEYSTORE_BASE64 }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "        run: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "          # 优先使用 release 签名，如果配置完整"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "          if [ -n \"$SIGNING_KEYSTORE_BASE64\" ] \u0026\u0026 [ -n \"$SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD\" ] \u0026\u0026 [ -n \"$SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS\" ] \u0026\u0026 [ -n \"$SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD\" ]; then"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "            echo \"Using release signing\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "            echo \"$SIGNING_KEYSTORE_BASE64\" | base64 -d \u003e release.keystore"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "            touch signing.properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "            echo keystore.password=\"$SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD\" \u003e signing.properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "            echo key.alias=\"$SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "            echo key.password=\"$SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "            cat signing.properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "          # 否则使用固定的 debug keystore（通过 secrets 存储，确保一致性）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "          elif [ -n \"$DEBUG_KEYSTORE_BASE64\" ]; then"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "            echo \"Using fixed debug keystore from secrets\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "            mkdir -p ~/.android"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 68
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\.github\\workflows\\build-pre-release.yaml",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.32209664583206177
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package updater\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\tmihomoHttp \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/component/http\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/http\"\n)\n\nconst defaultHttpTimeout = time.Second * 90\n\nfunc downloadForBytes(url string) ([]byte, error) {\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), defaultHttpTimeout)\n\tdefer cancel()\n\tresp, err := mihomoHttp.HttpRequest(ctx, url, http.MethodGet, nil, nil)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\tdefer resp.Body.Close()\n\n\treturn io.ReadAll(resp.Body)\n}\n\nfunc saveFile(bytes []byte, path string) error {\n\treturn os.WriteFile(path, bytes, 0o644)\n}",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "      with:\n        go-version: '1.25'\n        check-latest: true\n\n    - name: Set variables\n      run: |\n        # Generate version with date and build time (YYMMDD-HHMM) using Asia/Shanghai timezone\n        BUILD_DATE=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date +%y%m%d)\n        BUILD_TIME=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date +%H%M)\n        \n        if [ -n \"${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\" ]; then\n          # Manual release: use provided version\n          VERSION=${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\n          PackageVersion=\"${VERSION#v}\"\n        elif [[ \"${{ github.ref }}\" == refs/tags/* ]]; then\n          # Tag build: use tag name\n          VERSION=\"${GITHUB_REF_NAME}\"\n          PackageVersion=\"${VERSION#v}\"\n        else\n          # Branch build: use date-time format (YYYYMMDD-HHMM)\n          VERSION=\"${BUILD_DATE}-${BUILD_TIME}\"\n          PackageVersion=\"$(curl -s \"https://api.github.com/repos/MetaCubeX/mihomo/releases/latest\" | jq -r '.tag_name' | sed 's/v//g' | awk -F '.' '{$NF = $NF + 1; print}' OFS='.').${VERSION/-/.}\"\n        fi\n        \n        echo \"VERSION=${VERSION}\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"PackageVersion=${PackageVersion}\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n      \n        echo \"BUILDTIME=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date)\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"CGO_ENABLED=0\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"BUILDTAG=-extldflags --static\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"GOTOOLCHAIN=local\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n\n    - name: Update CA\n      run: |\n        sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n        sudo update-ca-certificates\n        cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n    - name: Build core\n      env:\n        GOOS: ${{matrix.jobs.goos}}",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.0)\n\n# 获取git hash\n\nmessage(STATUS \"CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR= ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}\")\nexecute_process(\n  COMMAND git submodule foreach git log -1 --format=%H   \n  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} \n  OUTPUT_VARIABLE COMMIT_HASH\n)\nstring(REPLACE \"\\n\" \";\" COMMIT_HASH \"${COMMIT_HASH}\")\nlist(GET COMMIT_HASH 1 COMMIT_HASH)\nstring (REGEX REPLACE \"[\\n\\t\\r]\" \"\" COMMIT_HASH ${COMMIT_HASH})\nstring(SUBSTRING ${COMMIT_HASH} 0 7 COMMIT_HASH)\nmessage(STATUS \"git hash= ${COMMIT_HASH}\")\n\n# 获取分支名称\nexecute_process(\n  COMMAND git submodule foreach git branch -r --contains ${COMMIT_HASH}\n  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} \n  OUTPUT_VARIABLE CURRENT_BRANCH\n)\nstring(REPLACE \"\\n\" \";\" CURRENT_BRANCH \"${CURRENT_BRANCH}\")\nlist(GET CURRENT_BRANCH 1 CURRENT_BRANCH)\nstring (REGEX REPLACE \"origin/\" \"\" CURRENT_BRANCH ${CURRENT_BRANCH})\nstring (REGEX REPLACE \"[\\n\\t\\r]\" \"\" CURRENT_BRANCH ${CURRENT_BRANCH})\n#string(SUBSTRING ${CURRENT_BRANCH} 0 8 CURRENT_BRANCH)\nmessage(STATUS \"git current branch = ${CURRENT_BRANCH}\")\n\n# 获取生成时间\nstring(TIMESTAMP COMPILE_TIME \"%y%m%d\")\nstring (REGEX REPLACE \"[\\n\\t\\r]\" \"\" COMPILE_TIME ${COMPILE_TIME})\nstring(REGEX REPLACE \"\\\"\" \"\" COMPILE_TIME ${COMPILE_TIME})\n\n# 生成版本信息\nset(GIT_VERSION \"${CURRENT_BRANCH}_${COMMIT_HASH}_${COMPILE_TIME}\")\nmessage(STATUS \"version info = ${GIT_VERSION}\")\n\n# 去除空格\nstring(REGEX REPLACE \"[ ]+\" \"\" GIT_VERSION \"${GIT_VERSION}\")\n\n# 保存变量到文件\nconfigure_file(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/version.h.in ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/version.h @ONLY)\n\nproject(clash-bridge C)\n\n\nset(CMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE on)\nset(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE \"${CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE} -O3\")\n\nset(GO_OUTPUT_BASE ${GO_OUTPUT}/${FLAVOR_NAME})\n\nif (\"${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\" STREQUAL \"Debug\")\n    set(GO_OUTPUT_BASE \"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}Debug\")\nelseif (\"${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\" STREQUAL \"Release\")\n    set(GO_OUTPUT_BASE \"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}Release\")\nelseif (\"${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\" STREQUAL \"RelWithDebInfo\")\n    set(GO_OUTPUT_BASE \"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}Release\")",
        "detailedLines": [

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import java.net.URL\nimport java.nio.file.Files\nimport java.nio.file.StandardCopyOption\n\nplugins {\n    kotlin(\"android\")\n    kotlin(\"kapt\")\n    id(\"com.android.application\")\n}\n\ndependencies {\n    compileOnly(project(\":hideapi\"))\n\n    implementation(project(\":core\"))\n    implementation(project(\":service\"))\n    implementation(project(\":design\"))\n    implementation(project(\":common\"))\n\n    implementation(libs.kotlin.coroutine)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.core)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.activity)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.fragment)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.appcompat)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.coordinator)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.recyclerview)\n    implementation(libs.google.material)\n    implementation(libs.quickie.bundled)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.activity.ktx)\n}\n\ntasks.getByName(\"clean\", type = Delete::class) {\n    delete(file(\"release\"))\n}\n\nval geoFilesDownloadDir = \"src/main/assets\"\n\ntask(\"downloadGeoFiles\") {\n\n    val geoFilesUrls = mapOf(\n        \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/meta-rules-dat/releases/download/latest/geoip.metadb\" to \"geoip.metadb\",\n        \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/meta-rules-dat/releases/download/latest/geosite.dat\" to \"geosite.dat\",\n        // \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/meta-rules-dat/releases/download/latest/country.mmdb\" to \"country.mmdb\",\n        \"https://github.com/MetaCubeX/meta-rules-dat/releases/download/latest/GeoLite2-ASN.mmdb\" to \"ASN.mmdb\",\n    )\n\n    doLast {\n        geoFilesUrls.forEach { (downloadUrl, outputFileName) -\u003e\n            val url = URL(downloadUrl)\n            val outputPath = file(\"$geoFilesDownloadDir/$outputFileName\")\n            outputPath.parentFile.mkdirs()\n            url.openStream().use { input -\u003e\n                Files.copy(input, outputPath.toPath(), StandardCopyOption.REPLACE_EXISTING)\n                println(\"$outputFileName downloaded to $outputPath\")\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nafterEvaluate {\n    val downloadGeoFilesTask = tasks[\"downloadGeoFiles\"]",
