    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    - name: Build core\n      env:\n        GOOS: ${{matrix.jobs.goos}}\n        GOARCH: ${{matrix.jobs.goarch}}\n        GOAMD64: ${{matrix.jobs.goamd64}}\n        GO386: ${{matrix.jobs.go386}}\n        GOARM: ${{matrix.jobs.goarm}}\n        GOMIPS: ${{matrix.jobs.gomips}}\n      run: |\n        go env\n        go build -v -tags \"with_gvisor\" -trimpath -ldflags \"${BUILDTAG} -X 'github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant.Version=${VERSION}' -X 'github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant.BuildTime=${BUILDTIME}' -w -s -buildid=\"\n        if [ \"${{matrix.jobs.goos}}\" = \"windows\" ]; then\n          cp mihomo.exe mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}.exe\n          zip -r mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}-${VERSION}.zip mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}.exe\n        else\n          cp mihomo mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}\n          gzip -c mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}} \u003e mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}-${VERSION}.gz\n          rm mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}\n        fi\n\n    - name: Save version\n      run: |\n        echo ${VERSION} \u003e version.txt\n      shell: bash\n\n    - name: Archive production artifacts\n      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4\n      with:\n        name: \"${{ matrix.jobs.goos }}-${{ matrix.jobs.output }}\"\n        path: |\n          mihomo*.gz\n          mihomo*.zip\n          version.txt\n\n  Upload-Prerelease:\n    permissions: write-all\n    if: ${{ github.event_name != 'workflow_dispatch' \u0026\u0026 github.ref_type == 'branch' \u0026\u0026 !startsWith(github.event_name, 'pull_request') }}\n    needs: [build]\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n    - name: Download all workflow run artifacts\n      uses: actions/download-artifact@v4\n      with:\n        path: bin/\n        merge-multiple: true\n\n    - name: Calculate checksums",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "    - name: Build core"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "      env:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "        GOOS: ${{matrix.jobs.goos}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "        GOARCH: ${{matrix.jobs.goarch}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "        GOAMD64: ${{matrix.jobs.goamd64}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "        GO386: ${{matrix.jobs.go386}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "        GOARM: ${{matrix.jobs.goarm}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "        GOMIPS: ${{matrix.jobs.gomips}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "      run: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "        go env"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "        go build -v -tags \"with_gvisor\" -trimpath -ldflags \"${BUILDTAG} -X 'github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant.Version=${VERSION}' -X 'github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant.BuildTime=${BUILDTIME}' -w -s -buildid=\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "        if [ \"${{matrix.jobs.goos}}\" = \"windows\" ]; then"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "          cp mihomo.exe mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}.exe"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "          zip -r mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}-${VERSION}.zip mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}.exe"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "        else"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "          cp mihomo mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "          gzip -c mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}} \u003e mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}-${VERSION}.gz"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "          rm mihomo-${{matrix.jobs.goos}}-${{matrix.jobs.output}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "        fi"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "    - name: Save version"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "      run: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "        echo ${VERSION} \u003e version.txt"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "      shell: bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "    - name: Archive production artifacts"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "      with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "        name: \"${{ matrix.jobs.goos }}-${{ matrix.jobs.output }}\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "        path: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "          mihomo*.gz"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "          mihomo*.zip"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "          version.txt"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "  Upload-Prerelease:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "    permissions: write-all"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "    if: ${{ github.event_name != 'workflow_dispatch' \u0026\u0026 github.ref_type == 'branch' \u0026\u0026 !startsWith(github.event_name, 'pull_request') }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "    needs: [build]"

          {
            "lineNumber": 116,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "    steps:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "    - name: Download all workflow run artifacts"

          {
            "lineNumber": 119,

          {
            "lineNumber": 120,

          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "        path: bin/"

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "plugins {\n    kotlin(\"android\")\n    id(\"kotlinx-serialization\")\n    id(\"com.android.library\")\n    id(\"com.google.devtools.ksp\")\n}\n\ndependencies {\n    implementation(project(\":core\"))\n    implementation(project(\":common\"))\n\n    ksp(libs.kaidl.compiler)\n    ksp(libs.androidx.room.compiler)\n\n    implementation(libs.kotlin.coroutine)\n    implementation(libs.kotlin.serialization.json)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.core)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.room.runtime)\n    implementation(libs.androidx.room.ktx)\n    implementation(libs.kaidl.runtime)\n    implementation(libs.rikkax.multiprocess)\n    implementation(platform(\"com.squareup.okhttp3:okhttp-bom:4.12.0\"))\n\n    // define any required OkHttp artifacts without version\n    implementation(\"com.squareup.okhttp3:okhttp\")\n    implementation(\"com.squareup.okhttp3:logging-interceptor\")\n}\n\nafterEvaluate {\n    android {\n        libraryVariants.forEach {\n            sourceSets[it.name].kotlin.srcDir(buildDir.resolve(\"generated/ksp/${it.name}/kotlin\"))\n            sourceSets[it.name].java.srcDir(buildDir.resolve(\"generated/ksp/${it.name}/java\"))\n        }\n    }\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        merge-multiple: true\n\n    - name: Calculate checksums\n      run: |\n        cd bin/\n        find . -type f -not -name \"checksums.*\" -not -name \"version.txt\" | sort | xargs sha256sum \u003e checksums.txt\n        cat checksums.txt\n      shell: bash\n\n    - name: Delete current release assets\n      uses: 8Mi-Tech/delete-release-assets-action@main\n      with:\n        github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n        tag: Prerelease-${{ github.ref_name }}\n        deleteOnlyFromDrafts: false\n    - name: Set Env\n      run: |\n        echo \"BUILDTIME=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date)\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n      shell: bash\n\n    - name: Tag Repo\n      uses: richardsimko/update-tag@v1\n      with:\n        tag_name: Prerelease-${{ github.ref_name }}\n      env:\n        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n      \n    - run: |\n        cat \u003e release.txt \u003c\u003c 'EOF'\n        Release created at  ${{ env.BUILDTIME }}\n        Synchronize ${{ github.ref_name }} branch code updates, keeping only the latest version\n        \u003cbr\u003e\n        [我应该下载哪个文件? / Which file should I download?](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/wiki/FAQ)\n        [二进制文件筛选 / Binary file selector](https://metacubex.github.io/Meta-Docs/startup/#_1)\n        [查看文档 / Docs](https://metacubex.github.io/Meta-Docs/)\n        EOF\n\n    - name: Upload Prerelease\n      uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1\n      if: ${{  success() }}\n      with:\n        tag_name: Prerelease-${{ github.ref_name }}\n        files: |\n          bin/*\n        prerelease: true\n        generate_release_notes: true\n        body_path: release.txt\n\n  Upload-Release:\n    permissions: write-all\n    if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' \u0026\u0026 github.event.inputs.version != '' }}\n    needs: [build]\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout\n        uses: actions/checkout@v5\n        with:\n          ref: Meta\n          fetch-depth: '0'\n          fetch-tags: 'true'\n\n      - name: Get tags",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "      - name: Tag Repo\n        uses: richardsimko/update-tag@v1\n        with:\n          tag_name: ${{ inputs.release-tag }}\n        env:\n          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n      - name: Upload Release\n        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1\n        if: ${{ success() }}\n        with:\n          tag_name: ${{ inputs.release-tag }}\n          files: app/build/outputs/apk/meta/release/*\n          generate_release_notes: true\n\n      - name: Release Changelog Builder\n        uses: mikepenz/release-changelog-builder-action@v4.1.1\n        with:\n          configurationJson: |\n            {\n              \"ignore_labels\": [\n                \"Update\"\n              ],\n            }",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "object ProfileProcessor {\n    private val profileLock = Mutex()\n    private val processLock = Mutex()\n\n    suspend fun apply(context: Context, uuid: UUID, callback: IFetchObserver? = null) {\n        withContext(NonCancellable) {\n            processLock.withLock {\n                val snapshot = profileLock.withLock {\n                    val pending = PendingDao().queryByUUID(uuid)\n                        ?: throw IllegalArgumentException(\"profile $uuid not found\")\n\n                    pending.enforceFieldValid()\n\n                    context.processingDir.deleteRecursively()\n                    context.processingDir.mkdirs()\n\n                    context.pendingDir.resolve(pending.uuid.toString())\n                        .copyRecursively(context.processingDir, overwrite = true)\n\n                    pending\n                }\n\n                val force = snapshot.type != Profile.Type.File\n                var cb = callback\n\n                Clash.fetchAndValid(context.processingDir, snapshot.source, force) {\n                    try {\n                        cb?.updateStatus(it)\n                    } catch (e: Exception) {\n                        cb = null\n\n                        Log.w(\"Report fetch status: $e\", e)\n                    }\n                }.await()\n\n                profileLock.withLock {\n                    if (PendingDao().queryByUUID(snapshot.uuid) == snapshot) {\n                        ",
        "detailedLines": [

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun update(context: Context, uuid: UUID, callback: IFetchObserver?) {\n        withContext(NonCancellable) {\n            processLock.withLock {\n                val snapshot = profileLock.withLock {\n                    val imported = ImportedDao().queryByUUID(uuid)\n                        ?: throw IllegalArgumentException(\"profile $uuid not found\")\n\n                    context.processingDir.deleteRecursively()\n                    context.processingDir.mkdirs()\n\n                    context.importedDir.resolve(imported.uuid.toString())\n                        .copyRecursively(context.processingDir, overwrite = true)\n\n                    imported\n                }\n\n                var cb = callback\n\n                Clash.fetchAndValid(context.processingDir, snapshot.source, true) {\n                    try {\n                        cb?.updateStatus(it)\n                    } catch (e: Exception) {\n                        cb = null\n\n                        Log.w(\"Report fetch status: $e\", e)\n                    }\n                }.await()\n\n                profileLock.withLock {\n                    if (ImportedDao().exists(snapshot.uuid)) {\n                        context.importedDir.resolve(snapshot.uuid.toString()).deleteRecursively()\n                        context.processingDir\n                            .copyRecursively(context.importedDir.resolve(snapshot.uuid.toString()))\n\n                        context.sendProfileChanged(snapshot.uuid)\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun delete(context: Context, uuid: UUID) {\n        withContext(NonCancellable) {\n            ",

_**Agent (default)**_


根据 workflow 配置，各构建流程的 submodule 更新方式不同：

## 当前情况

1. Build Pre-Release（第16行）：
   ```bash
   git submodule update --init --recursive --remote --force
   ```
   - 使用 `--remote`，会拉取 mihomo 的 Alpha 分支最新代码

2. Build Release（第20行）：
   ```bash
   git submodule update --init --recursive --force
   ```
   - 没有 `--remote`，只使用主仓库中记录的 submodule commit

3. Build Debug（第15行）：
   ```bash
   git submodule update --init --recursive --force
   ```
   - 没有 `--remote`，只使用主仓库中记录的 submodule commit

## 区别说明

- 有 `--remote`：从远程仓库拉取指定分支的最新 commit
- 无 `--remote`：使用主仓库 `.gitmodules` 中记录的 commit（需要手动更新）

## 建议

如果需要所有构建都使用最新的 mihomo 代码，建议统一添加 `--remote`。需要我帮你修改 Build Release 和 Build Debug 的 workflow 吗？

---

_**User**_

都加上吧

---

## 修改完成

1. **Build Pre-Release**：已有 `--remote`（无需修改）
2. **Build Release**：已添加 `--remote`
3. **Build Debug**：已添加 `--remote`

## 效果

所有构建流程都会：
- 从远程仓库拉取 mihomo 的 Alpha 分支最新代码
- 确保每次构建都使用最新的 mihomo commit
- 不再依赖主仓库中记录的旧 commit

这样每次构建都会自动使用最新的 mihomo 代码。

_**Agent (default)**_


已更新 CMakeLists.txt。版本号生成逻辑如下：

## 版本号格式

**成功获取远端版本号时**：
- 格式：`远端版本号_mihomo_commit_hash`
- 示例：`260127-1348_abc1234`
- 远端版本号来自：`https://github.com/MikeKen-Ken/mihomo/releases/download/Prerelease-Alpha/version.txt`
- commit hash 来自：当前使用的 mihomo Alpha 分支最新 commit（7位）

**获取远端版本失败时**：
- 回退到原来的本地 git hash 方式
- 格式：`分支名_commit_hash_编译日期`
- 示例：`Alpha_abc1234_250127`

## 效果

- 显示远端发布的版本号
- 同时显示实际使用的 mihomo commit hash
- 便于追踪具体使用的代码版本

这样版本号既包含远端版本信息，也包含实际使用的 commit hash，便于追踪和调试。

---

1. **移除了所有远端版本号相关代码**：

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "[submodule \"clash-foss\"]\n\tpath = core/src/foss/golang/clash\n\turl = https://github.com/MikeKen-Ken/mihomo\n\tbranch = Alpha",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "[submodule \"clash-foss\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\tpath = core/src/foss/golang/clash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "\turl = https://github.com/MikeKen-Ken/mihomo"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\tbranch = Alpha"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 4
          },

      "score": 0.4237164855003357
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.0)\n\nmessage(STATUS \"CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR= ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}\")\n\n# 获取 mihomo submodule 的完整 commit hash\nmessage(STATUS \"Getting mihomo commit hash\")\nexecute_process(\n    COMMAND git submodule foreach git log -1 --format=%H   \n    WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} \n    OUTPUT_VARIABLE COMMIT_HASH\n)\nstring(REPLACE \"\\n\" \";\" COMMIT_HASH \"${COMMIT_HASH}\")\nlist(GET COMMIT_HASH 1 COMMIT_HASH)\nstring(REGEX REPLACE \"[\\n\\t\\r]\" \"\" COMMIT_HASH ${COMMIT_HASH})\n# 使用完整的 commit hash，不截取\nset(GIT_VERSION \"${COMMIT_HASH}\")\nmessage(STATUS \"mihomo commit hash= ${GIT_VERSION}\")\n\nmessage(STATUS \"Final version info = ${GIT_VERSION}\")\n\n# 保存变量到文件\nconfigure_file(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/version.h.in ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/version.h @ONLY)\n\nproject(clash-bridge C)\n\n\nset(CMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE on)\nset(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE \"${CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE} -O3\")\n\nset(GO_OUTPUT_BASE ${GO_OUTPUT}/${FLAVOR_NAME})\n\nif (\"${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\" STREQUAL \"Debug\")\n    set(GO_OUTPUT_BASE \"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}Debug\")\nelseif (\"${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\" STREQUAL \"Release\")\n    set(GO_OUTPUT_BASE \"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}Release\")\nelseif (\"${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\" STREQUAL \"RelWithDebInfo\")\n    set(GO_OUTPUT_BASE \"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}Release\")\nelse ()\n    message(FATAL_ERROR \"Unknown build type ${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}\")\nendif ()\n\ninclude_directories(\"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}/${CMAKE_ANDROID_ARCH_ABI}\")\ninclude_directories(\"${GO_SOURCE}\")\n\nlink_directories(\"${GO_OUTPUT_BASE}/${CMAKE_ANDROID_ARCH_ABI}\")",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.0)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Update Clash-Core and Go Modules\non:\n  repository_dispatch:\n    types:\n      - core-updated\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\njobs:\n  update-dependencies:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n      \n      - name: Checkout and Update submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --remote --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n      \n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n\n      - name: Install update-go-mod-replace\n        run: |\n          go install github.com/metacubex/update-go-mod-replace@latest\n\n      - name: Update Foss Gomod\n        run: |\n          cd ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/foss/golang/\n          update-go-mod-replace ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/foss/golang/clash/go.mod $(pwd)/go.mod\n          go mod tidy\n\n      - name: Update Main Gomod\n        run: |\n          cd ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/main/golang/\n          update-go-mod-replace ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/foss/golang/clash/go.mod $(pwd)/go.mod\n          go mod tidy\n\n      - uses: tibdex/github-app-token@v2\n        id: generate-token\n        with:\n          app_id: ${{ secrets.MAINTAINER_APPID }}\n          private_key: ${{ secrets.MAINTAINER_APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}\n\n      - name: Create Pull Request\n        id: cpr\n        uses: peter-evans/create-pull-request@v6\n        with:\n          token: ${{ steps.generate-token.outputs.token }}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "name: Update Clash-Core and Go Modules"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "on:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "  repository_dispatch:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "    types:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "      - core-updated"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "  workflow_dispatch:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "jobs:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "  update-dependencies:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    runs-on: ubuntu-latest"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    steps:"

            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "      - name: Checkout Repository"

            "lineNumber": 13,

          },

            "lineNumber": 14,

            "lineNumber": 15,

            "text": "        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --remote --force"
          },

            "text": "      - name: Setup Java"

            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        with:"

            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "          update-go-mod-replace ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/foss/golang/clash/go.mod $(pwd)/go.mod"
          },
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 54

          },

          },

          {

            "lineNumber": 63,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,

          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "          token: ${{ steps.generate-token.outputs.token }}"
          }
        ],

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Build Debug\non:\n  pull_request:\n    types: [opened, reopened, synchronize]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\njobs:\n  BuildDebug:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n      \n      - name: Checkout submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --remote --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Gradle\n        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n\n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n\n      - name: Update CA\n        run: |\n          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n          sudo update-ca-certificates\n          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n      # - name: Signing properties\n      #   env:\n      #     SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD }}\n      #     SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}\n      #     SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}\n      #   run: |\n      #     touch signing.properties\n      #     echo keystore.password=\"$SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD\" \u003e signing.properties\n      #     echo key.alias=\"$SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n      #     echo key.password=\"$SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n            \n      #     echo \"cat signing.properties\"\n      #     cat signing.properties\n\n      - name: Build\n        if: success()",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Build Release\n\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      release-tag:\n        description: 'Release Tag (v2.x.x)'\n        required: true\n\njobs:\n  BuildRelease:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n        with:\n          fetch-depth: 0\n      \n      - name: Checkout submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --remote --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Gradle\n        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n\n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n      \n      - name: Convert and set version env\n        id: process-version\n        run: |\n          VERSION_TAG=${{ inputs.release-tag }}\n          VERSION_TAG=${VERSION_TAG#v}                              # remove the 'v' prefix\n          IFS='.' read -ra VERSION_PARTS \u003c\u003c\u003c \"$VERSION_TAG\"         # split into array\n          VERSION_CODE=$(printf \"%1d%02d%03d\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[0]}\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[1]}\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[2]}\")\n          \n          echo \"versonName=$VERSION_TAG\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_OUTPUT          # \"1.2.3\"\n          echo \"versonCode=$VERSION_CODE\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_OUTPUT         # \"102003\"\n      \n      # Re-write version in build.gradle.kts\n      - name: Re-write version\n        uses: Devofure/advance-android-version-actions@v1.5",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Build Pre-Release\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n  push:\n    branches:\n      - main\n\njobs:\n  BuildPreRelease:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n      \n      - name: Checkout submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --remote --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Gradle\n        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n\n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n\n      - name: Update CA\n        run: |\n          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n          sudo update-ca-certificates\n          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n      - name: Setup signing\n        env:\n          SIGNING_KEYSTORE_BASE64: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEYSTORE_BASE64 }}\n          SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}\n          DEBUG_KEYSTORE_BASE64: ${{ secrets.DEBUG_KEYSTORE_BASE64 }}\n        run: |\n          # 优先使用 release 签名，如果配置完整",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        with:\n          token: ${{ steps.generate-token.outputs.token }}\n          commit-message: Update Dependencies\n          branch: update-dependencies\n          delete-branch: true\n          title: 'Update Dependencies'\n          draft: false\n          body: |\n            - Update Clash-Meta Core\n            - Update Go Module Dependecies\n          labels: |\n            Update\n        \n      - name: PR result\n        if: ${{ steps.cpr.outputs.pull-request-number }}\n        run: |\n          echo \"Pull Request Number - ${{ steps.cpr.outputs.pull-request-number }}\"\n          echo \"Pull Request URL - ${{ steps.cpr.outputs.pull-request-url }}\"\n      ",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

          },

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "- Stop Clash.Meta service\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.STOP_CLASH&#96;\n- Import a profile\n  - URL Scheme &#96;clash://install-config?url=\u003cencoded URI\u003e&#96; or &#96;clashmeta://install-config?url=\u003cencoded URI\u003e&#96;\n\n### Contribution and Project Maintenance\n\n#### Meta Kernel\n\n- CMFA uses the kernel from &#96;android-real&#96; branch under &#96;MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta&#96;, which is a merge of the main &#96;Alpha&#96; branch and &#96;android-open&#96;.\n  - If you want to contribute to the kernel, make PRs to &#96;Alpha&#96; branch of the Meta kernel repository.\n  - If you want to contribute Android-specific patches to the kernel, make PRs to  &#96;android-open&#96; branch of the Meta kernel repository.\n\n#### Maintenance\n\n- When &#96;MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta&#96; kernel is updated to a new version, the &#96;Update Dependencies&#96; actions in this repo will be triggered automatically.\n  - It will pull the new version of the meta kernel, update all the golang dependencies, and create a PR without manual intervention.\n  - If there is any compile error in PR, you need to fix it before merging. Alternatively, you may merge the PR directly.\n- Manually triggering &#96;Build Pre-Release&#96; actions will compile and publish a &#96;PreRelease&#96; version.\n- Manually triggering &#96;Build Release&#96; actions will compile, tag and publish a &#96;Release&#96; version.\n  - You must fill the blank &#96;Release Tag&#96; with the tag you want to release in the format of &#96;v1.2.3&#96;.\n  - &#96;versionName&#96; and &#96;versionCode&#96; in &#96;build.gradle.kts&#96; will be automatically bumped to the tag you filled above.",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "- Stop Clash.Meta service"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.STOP_CLASH&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "- Import a profile"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "  - URL Scheme &#96;clash://install-config?url=\u003cencoded URI\u003e&#96; or &#96;clashmeta://install-config?url=\u003cencoded URI\u003e&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "### Contribution and Project Maintenance"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "#### Meta Kernel"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "- CMFA uses the kernel from &#96;android-real&#96; branch under &#96;MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta&#96;, which is a merge of the main &#96;Alpha&#96; branch and &#96;android-open&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "  - If you want to contribute to the kernel, make PRs to &#96;Alpha&#96; branch of the Meta kernel repository."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "  - If you want to contribute Android-specific patches to the kernel, make PRs to  &#96;android-open&#96; branch of the Meta kernel repository."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "#### Maintenance"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "- When &#96;MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta&#96; kernel is updated to a new version, the &#96;Update Dependencies&#96; actions in this repo will be triggered automatically."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "  - It will pull the new version of the meta kernel, update all the golang dependencies, and create a PR without manual intervention."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "  - If there is any compile error in PR, you need to fix it before merging. Alternatively, you may merge the PR directly."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "- Manually triggering &#96;Build Pre-Release&#96; actions will compile and publish a &#96;PreRelease&#96; version."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "- Manually triggering &#96;Build Release&#96; actions will compile, tag and publish a &#96;Release&#96; version."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "  - You must fill the blank &#96;Release Tag&#96; with the tag you want to release in the format of &#96;v1.2.3&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "  - &#96;versionName&#96; and &#96;versionCode&#96; in &#96;build.gradle.kts&#96; will be automatically bumped to the tag you filled above."
          }
        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "          fetch-tags: 'true'\n\n      - name: Get tags\n        run: |\n          echo \"CURRENTVERSION=${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n          git fetch --tags\n          echo \"PREVERSION=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 HEAD)\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n\n      - name: Force push Alpha branch to Meta\n        run: |\n          git config --global user.email \"github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com\"\n          git config --global user.name \"github-actions[bot]\"\n          git fetch origin Alpha:Alpha\n          git push origin Alpha:Meta --force\n        env:\n          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n      - name: Tag the commit on Alpha\n        run: |\n          git checkout Alpha \n          git tag ${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\n          git push origin ${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\n        env:\n          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n      - name: Generate release notes\n        run: |\n            cp ./.github/genReleaseNote.sh ./\n            bash ./genReleaseNote.sh -v ${PREVERSION}...${CURRENTVERSION}\n            rm ./genReleaseNote.sh\n  \n      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v4\n        with:\n          path: bin/\n          merge-multiple: true\n  \n      - name: Display structure of downloaded files\n        run: ls -R\n        working-directory: bin\n  \n      - name: Upload Release\n        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2\n        if: ${{ success() }}\n        with:\n          tag_name: ${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\n          files: bin/*\n          body_path: release.md",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "      - name: Re-write version\n        uses: Devofure/advance-android-version-actions@v1.5\n        with:\n          gradlePath: build.gradle.kts\n          versionCode: ${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonCode }}\n          versionName: ${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonName }}\n      \n      # If any change found, commit it and push\n      - name: Commit and push if changes\n        run: |\n          changes=$(git diff --name-only origin/main | wc -l)\n          if [ $changes -gt 0 ]\n          then\n            newVersionName=${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonName }}\n            newVersionCode=${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonCode }}\n            git config --global user.name 'GitHub Action'\n            git config --global user.email 'action@github.com'\n            git add build.gradle.kts\n            git commit -am \"Bump version to $newVersionName ($newVersionCode)\"\n            git tag \"v$newVersionName\"\n            git push --follow-tags\n          fi\n\n      - name: Update CA\n        run: |\n          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n          sudo update-ca-certificates\n          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n      - name: Signing properties\n        env:\n          SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}\n        run: |\n          touch signing.properties\n          echo keystore.password=\"$SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD\" \u003e signing.properties\n          echo key.alias=\"$SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n          echo key.password=\"$SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n            \n          echo \"cat signing.properties\"\n          cat signing.properties\n\n      - name: Release Build\n        if: success()\n        run: ./gradlew --no-daemon app:assembleMetaRelease\n\n      - name: Tag Repo\n        uses: richardsimko/update-tag@v1",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (u *CoreUpdater) Update(currentExePath string, channel string, force bool) (err error) {\n\tu.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer u.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tinfo, err := os.Stat(currentExePath)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"check currentExePath %q: %w\", currentExePath, err)\n\t}\n\n\tbaseURL := baseAlphaURL\n\tversionURL := versionAlphaURL\n\tswitch strings.ToLower(channel) {\n\tcase ReleaseChannel:\n\t\tbaseURL = baseReleaseURL\n\t\tversionURL = versionReleaseURL\n\tcase AlphaChannel:\n\t\tbreak\n\tdefault: // auto\n\t\tif !strings.HasPrefix(C.Version, \"alpha\") {\n\t\t\tbaseURL = baseReleaseURL\n\t\t\tversionURL = versionReleaseURL\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tlatestVersion, err := u.getLatestVersion(versionURL)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"get latest version: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\tlog.Infoln(\"current version %s, latest version %s\", C.Version, latestVersion)\n\n\tif latestVersion == C.Version \u0026\u0026 !force {\n\t\t// don't change this output, some downstream dependencies on the upgrader's output fields\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"update error: already using latest version %s\", C.Version)\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Errorln(\"updater: failed: %v\", err)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tlog.Infoln(\"updater: finished\")\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\t// ---- prepare ----\n\tmihomoBaseName := u.CoreBaseName()\n\tpackageName := mihomoBaseName + \"-\" + latestVersion\n\tif runtime.GOOS == \"windows\" {\n\t\tpackageName = packageName + \".zip\"\n\t} else {\n\t\tpackageName = packageName + \".gz\"\n\t}\n\tpackageURL := baseURL + packageName\n\tlog.Infoln(\"updater: updating using url: %s\", packageURL)\n\n\tworkDir := filepath.Dir(currentExePath)\n\tbackupDir := filepath.Join(workDir, \"meta-backup\")\n\tupdateDir := filepath.Join(workDir, \"meta-update\")\n\tpackagePath := filepath.Join(updateDir, packageName)\n\t//log.Infoln(packagePath)\n\n\tupdateExeName := mihomoBaseName\n\tif runtime.GOOS == \"windows\" {\n\t\tupdateExeName = updateExeName + \".exe\"\n\t}\n\tlog.Infoln(\"updateExeName: %s\", updateExeName)\n\tupdateExePath := filepath.Join(updateDir, updateExeName)\n\tbackupExePath := filepath.Join(backupDir, filepath.Base(currentExePath))\n\n\tdefer u.clean(updateDir)\n\n\terr = u.download(updateDir, packagePath, packageURL)",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Trigger CMFA Update\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n  push:\n    paths-ignore:\n      - \"docs/**\"\n      - \"README.md\"\n      - \".github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/**\"\n    branches:\n      - Alpha\n    tags:\n      - \"v*\"\n      \njobs:\n  # Send \"core-updated\" to MetaCubeX/ClashMetaForAndroid to trigger update-dependencies\n  trigger-CMFA-update:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - uses: tibdex/github-app-token@v1\n        id: generate-token\n        with:\n          app_id: ${{ secrets.MAINTAINER_APPID }}\n          private_key: ${{ secrets.MAINTAINER_APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}\n      \n      - name: Trigger update-dependencies\n        run: |\n          curl -X POST https://api.github.com/repos/MetaCubeX/ClashMetaForAndroid/dispatches \\\n            -H \"Accept: application/vnd.github.everest-preview+json\" \\\n            -H \"Authorization: token ${{ steps.generate-token.outputs.token }}\" \\\n            -d '{\"event_type\": \"core-updated\"}'",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "name: Trigger CMFA Update"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "on:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "  workflow_dispatch:"
          },

            "text": "    paths-ignore:"

          },

            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "      - \"README.md\""
          },

            "lineNumber": 8,

          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "    branches:"

            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "      - Alpha"

          },

            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "      "
          },

            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "jobs:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "  # Send \"core-updated\" to MetaCubeX/ClashMetaForAndroid to trigger update-dependencies"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "  trigger-CMFA-update:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    runs-on: ubuntu-latest"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    steps:"
          },

            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "      - uses: tibdex/github-app-token@v1"

          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        id: generate-token"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        with:"

            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "          app_id: ${{ secrets.MAINTAINER_APPID }}"

            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "          private_key: ${{ secrets.MAINTAINER_APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "      "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "      - name: Trigger update-dependencies"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "        run: |"

            "lineNumber": 28,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "      with:\n        go-version: '1.25'\n        check-latest: true\n\n    - name: Set variables\n      run: |\n        # Generate version with date and build time (YYMMDD-HHMM) using Asia/Shanghai timezone\n        BUILD_DATE=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date +%y%m%d)\n        BUILD_TIME=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date +%H%M)\n        \n        if [ -n \"${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\" ]; then\n          # Manual release: use provided version\n          VERSION=${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\n          PackageVersion=\"${VERSION#v}\"\n        elif [[ \"${{ github.ref }}\" == refs/tags/* ]]; then\n          # Tag build: use tag name\n          VERSION=\"${GITHUB_REF_NAME}\"\n          PackageVersion=\"${VERSION#v}\"\n        else\n          # Branch build: use date-time format (YYYYMMDD-HHMM)\n          VERSION=\"${BUILD_DATE}-${BUILD_TIME}\"\n          PackageVersion=\"$(curl -s \"https://api.github.com/repos/MetaCubeX/mihomo/releases/latest\" | jq -r '.tag_name' | sed 's/v//g' | awk -F '.' '{$NF = $NF + 1; print}' OFS='.').${VERSION/-/.}\"\n        fi\n        \n        echo \"VERSION=${VERSION}\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"PackageVersion=${PackageVersion}\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n      \n        echo \"BUILDTIME=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date)\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"CGO_ENABLED=0\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"BUILDTAG=-extldflags --static\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n        echo \"GOTOOLCHAIN=local\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n\n    - name: Update CA\n      run: |\n        sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n        sudo update-ca-certificates\n        cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n    - name: Build core\n      env:\n        GOOS: ${{matrix.jobs.goos}}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func FetchAndValid(\n\tpath string,\n\turl string,\n\tforce bool,\n\treportStatus func(string),\n) error {\n\tconfigPath := P.Join(path, \"config.yaml\")\n\n\tif _, err := os.Stat(configPath); os.IsNotExist(err) || force {\n\t\turl, err := U.Parse(url)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tbytes, _ := json.Marshal(\u0026Status{\n\t\t\tAction:      \"FetchConfiguration\",\n\t\t\tArgs:        []string{url.Host},\n\t\t\tProgress:    -1,\n\t\t\tMaxProgress: -1,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\treportStatus(string(bytes))\n\n\t\tif err := fetch(url, configPath); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tdefer runtime.GC()\n\n\trawCfg, err := UnmarshalAndPatch(path)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tforEachProviders(rawCfg, func(index int, total int, name string, provider map[string]any, prefix string) {\n\t\tbytes, _ := json.Marshal(\u0026Status{\n\t\t\tAction:      \"FetchProviders\",\n\t\t\tArgs:        []string{name},\n\t\t\tProgress:    index,\n\t\t\tMaxProgress: total,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\treportStatus(string(bytes))\n\n\t\tu, uok := provider[\"url\"]\n\t\tp, pok := provider[\"path\"]\n\n\t\tif !uok || !pok {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tus, uok := u.(string)\n\t\tps, pok := p.(string)\n\n\t\tif !uok || !pok {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif _, err := os.Stat(ps); err == nil {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\turl, err := U.Parse(us)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_ = fetch(url, ps)\n\t})\n\n\tbytes, _ := json.Marshal(\u0026Status{\n\t\tAction:      \"Verifying\",\n\t\tArgs:        []string{},\n\t\tProgress:    0xffff,\n\t\tMaxProgress: 0xffff,\n\t})\n\n\treportStatus(string(bytes))\n\n\tcfg, err := Parse(rawCfg)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tdestroyProviders(cfg)\n\n\treturn nil\n}",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun update(context: Context, uuid: UUID, callback: IFetchObserver?) {\n        withContext(NonCancellable) {\n            processLock.withLock {\n                val snapshot = profileLock.withLock {\n                    val imported = ImportedDao().queryByUUID(uuid)\n                        ?: throw IllegalArgumentException(\"profile $uuid not found\")\n\n                    context.processingDir.deleteRecursively()\n                    context.processingDir.mkdirs()\n\n                    context.importedDir.resolve(imported.uuid.toString())\n                        .copyRecursively(context.processingDir, overwrite = true)\n\n                    imported\n                }\n\n                var cb = callback\n\n                Clash.fetchAndValid(context.processingDir, snapshot.source, true) {\n                    try {\n                        cb?.updateStatus(it)\n                    } catch (e: Exception) {\n                        cb = null\n\n                        Log.w(\"Report fetch status: $e\", e)\n                    }\n                }.await()\n\n                profileLock.withLock {\n                    if (ImportedDao().exists(snapshot.uuid)) {\n                        context.importedDir.resolve(snapshot.uuid.toString()).deleteRecursively()\n                        context.processingDir\n                            .copyRecursively(context.importedDir.resolve(snapshot.uuid.toString()))\n\n                        context.sendProfileChanged(snapshot.uuid)\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun delete(context: Context, uuid: UUID) {\n        withContext(NonCancellable) {\n            ",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\tbackupExePath := filepath.Join(backupDir, filepath.Base(currentExePath))\n\n\tdefer u.clean(updateDir)\n\n\terr = u.download(updateDir, packagePath, packageURL)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"downloading: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\terr = u.unpack(updateDir, packagePath, info.Mode())\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"unpacking: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\terr = u.backup(currentExePath, backupExePath, backupDir)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"backuping: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\terr = u.copyFile(updateExePath, currentExePath)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"replacing: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (u *CoreUpdater) getLatestVersion(versionURL string) (version string, err error) {\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Second*5)\n\tdefer cancel()\n\tresp, err := mihomoHttp.HttpRequest(ctx, versionURL, http.MethodGet, nil, nil, mihomoHttp.WithCAOption(ca.Option{ZeroTrust: true}))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn \"\", err\n\t}\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tcloseErr := resp.Body.Close()\n\t\tif closeErr != nil \u0026\u0026 err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = closeErr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\tbody, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn \"\", err\n\t}\n\tcontent := strings.TrimRight(string(body), \"\\n\")\n\treturn content, nil\n}\n\n// download package file and save it to disk\nfunc (u *CoreUpdater) download(updateDir, packagePath, packageURL string) (err error) {\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "## Clash Meta for Android\n\nA Graphical user interface of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta) for Android\n\n### Feature\n\nFeature of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta)\n\n[\u003cimg src=\"https://fdroid.gitlab.io/artwork/badge/get-it-on.png\"\n     alt=\"Get it on F-Droid\"\n     height=\"80\"\u003e](https://f-droid.org/packages/com.github.metacubex.clash.meta/)\n\n### Requirement\n\n- Android 5.0+ (minimum)\n- Android 7.0+ (recommend)\n- &#96;armeabi-v7a&#96; , &#96;arm64-v8a&#96;, &#96;x86&#96; or &#96;x86_64&#96; Architecture\n\n### Build\n\n1. Update submodules\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n   git submodule update --init --recursive\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n2. Install **OpenJDK 11**, **Android SDK**, **CMake** and **Golang**\n\n3. Create &#96;local.properties&#96; in project root with\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   sdk.dir=/path/to/android-sdk\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n4. (Optional) Custom app package name. Add the following configuration to &#96;local.properties&#96;.\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   # config your ownn applicationId, or it will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash'\n   custom.application.id=com.my.compile.clash\n   # remove application id suffix, or the applicaion id will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash.alpha'\n   remove.suffix=true\n\n5. Create &#96;signing.properties&#96; in project root with\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   keystore.path=/path/to/keystore/file\n   keystore.password=\u003ckey store password\u003e\n   key.alias=\u003ckey alias\u003e\n   key.password=\u003ckey password\u003e\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n6. Build\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n   ./gradlew app:assembleAlphaRelease\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Automation\n\nAPP package name is &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta&#96;\n\n- Toggle Clash.Meta service status\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.TOGGLE_CLASH&#96;\n- Start Clash.Meta service\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.START_CLASH&#96;\n- Stop Clash.Meta service\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.STOP_CLASH&#96;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "## Clash Meta for Android"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "A Graphical user interface of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta) for Android"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "### Feature"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "Feature of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "[\u003cimg src=\"https://fdroid.gitlab.io/artwork/badge/get-it-on.png\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "     alt=\"Get it on F-Droid\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "     height=\"80\"\u003e](https://f-droid.org/packages/com.github.metacubex.clash.meta/)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "### Requirement"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "- Android 5.0+ (minimum)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "- Android 7.0+ (recommend)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- &#96;armeabi-v7a&#96; , &#96;arm64-v8a&#96;, &#96;x86&#96; or &#96;x86_64&#96; Architecture"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "### Build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "1. Update submodules"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "   git submodule update --init --recursive"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "2. Install **OpenJDK 11**, **Android SDK**, **CMake** and **Golang**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "3. Create &#96;local.properties&#96; in project root with"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "   sdk.dir=/path/to/android-sdk"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "4. (Optional) Custom app package name. Add the following configuration to &#96;local.properties&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "   # config your ownn applicationId, or it will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "   custom.application.id=com.my.compile.clash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "   # remove application id suffix, or the applicaion id will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash.alpha'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "   remove.suffix=true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "5. Create &#96;signing.properties&#96; in project root with"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "   keystore.path=/path/to/keystore/file"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "   keystore.password=\u003ckey store password\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "   key.alias=\u003ckey alias\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "   key.password=\u003ckey password\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "6. Build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "   ./gradlew app:assembleAlphaRelease"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "### Automation"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "APP package name is &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "- Toggle Clash.Meta service status"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.TOGGLE_CLASH&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "- Start Clash.Meta service"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.START_CLASH&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "- Stop Clash.Meta service"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.STOP_CLASH&#96;"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 67
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\README.md",
        "signatures": {}

      "score": 0.2355748414993286

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Test\non:\n  push:\n    paths-ignore:\n      - \"docs/**\"\n      - \"README.md\"\n      - \".github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/**\"\n    branches:\n      - Alpha\n    tags:\n      - \"v*\"\n  pull_request:\n    branches:\n      - Alpha\n\njobs:\n  test:\n    runs-on: windows-latest\n    defaults:\n      run:\n        shell: bash\n    env:\n      CGO_ENABLED: 0\n      GOTOOLCHAIN: local\n      # Fix mingw trying to be smart and converting paths https://github.com/moby/moby/issues/24029#issuecomment-250412919\n      MSYS_NO_PATHCONV: true\n    steps:\n      - uses: actions/checkout@v5\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: '1.25'\n          check-latest: true\n\n      - name: Test\n        run: go test ./... -v -count=1\n\n      - name: Test with tag with_gvisor\n        run: go test ./... -v -count=1 -tags \"with_gvisor\"",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "name: Test"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "on:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "  push:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "    paths-ignore:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "      - \"docs/**\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "      - \"README.md\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "      - \".github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/**\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "    branches:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "      - Alpha"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    tags:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "      - \"v*\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "  pull_request:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "    branches:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "      - Alpha"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "jobs:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "  test:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    runs-on: windows-latest"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "    defaults:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "      run:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        shell: bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    env:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "      CGO_ENABLED: 0"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "      GOTOOLCHAIN: local"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "      # Fix mingw trying to be smart and converting paths https://github.com/moby/moby/issues/24029#issuecomment-250412919"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "      MSYS_NO_PATHCONV: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "    steps:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "      - uses: actions/checkout@v5"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "      - name: Setup Go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.util\n\nimport android.os.DeadObjectException\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.log.Log\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.remote.Remote\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.remote.IClashManager\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.remote.IProfileManager\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.withContext\nimport kotlin.coroutines.CoroutineContext\n\nsuspend fun \u003cT\u003e withClash(\n    context: CoroutineContext = Dispatchers.IO,\n    block: suspend IClashManager.() -\u003e T\n): T {\n    while (true) {\n        val remote = Remote.service.remote.get()\n        val client = remote.clash()\n\n        try {\n            return withContext(context) { client.block() }\n        } catch (e: DeadObjectException) {\n            Log.w(\"Remote services panic\")\n\n            Remote.service.remote.reset(remote)\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nsuspend fun \u003cT\u003e withProfile(\n    context: CoroutineContext = Dispatchers.IO,\n    block: suspend IProfileManager.() -\u003e T\n): T {\n    while (true) {\n        val remote = Remote.service.remote.get()\n        val client = remote.profile()\n\n        try {\n            return withContext(context) { client.block() }\n        } catch (e: DeadObjectException) {\n            Log.w(\"Remote services panic\")\n\n            Remote.service.remote.reset(remote)\n        }\n    }\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Build\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      version:\n        description: \"Tag version to release\"\n        required: true\n  push:\n    paths-ignore:\n      - \"docs/**\"\n      - \"README.md\"\n      - \".github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/**\"\n    branches:\n      - Alpha\n    tags:\n      - \"v*\"\n  pull_request:\n    branches:\n      - Alpha\nconcurrency:\n  group: \"${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}\"\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n  \nenv:\n  REGISTRY: docker.io\njobs:\n  build:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    strategy:\n      matrix:\n        jobs:\n          # Windows 11 等现代 PC：64 位、Go 1.25、AMD64 v3\n          - { goos: windows, goarch: amd64, goamd64: v3, output: amd64 }\n\n    steps:\n    - uses: actions/checkout@v5\n\n    - name: Set up Go\n      uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n      with:\n        go-version: '1.25'\n        check-latest: true\n\n    - name: Set variables\n      run: |\n        ",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        merge-multiple: true\n\n    - name: Calculate checksums\n      run: |\n        cd bin/\n        find . -type f -not -name \"checksums.*\" -not -name \"version.txt\" | sort | xargs sha256sum \u003e checksums.txt\n        cat checksums.txt\n      shell: bash\n\n    - name: Delete current release assets\n      uses: 8Mi-Tech/delete-release-assets-action@main\n      with:\n        github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n        tag: Prerelease-${{ github.ref_name }}\n        deleteOnlyFromDrafts: false\n    - name: Set Env\n      run: |\n        echo \"BUILDTIME=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date)\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n      shell: bash\n\n    - name: Tag Repo\n      uses: richardsimko/update-tag@v1\n      with:\n        tag_name: Prerelease-${{ github.ref_name }}\n      env:\n        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n      \n    - run: |\n        cat \u003e release.txt \u003c\u003c 'EOF'\n        Release created at  ${{ env.BUILDTIME }}\n        Synchronize ${{ github.ref_name }} branch code updates, keeping only the latest version\n        \u003cbr\u003e\n        [我应该下载哪个文件? / Which file should I download?](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/wiki/FAQ)\n        [二进制文件筛选 / Binary file selector](https://metacubex.github.io/Meta-Docs/startup/#_1)\n        [查看文档 / Docs](https://metacubex.github.io/Meta-Docs/)\n        EOF\n\n    - name: Upload Prerelease\n      uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1\n      if: ${{  success() }}\n      with:\n        tag_name: Prerelease-${{ github.ref_name }}\n        files: |\n          bin/*\n        prerelease: true\n        generate_release_notes: true\n        body_path: release.txt\n\n  Upload-Release:\n    permissions: write-all\n    if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' \u0026\u0026 github.event.inputs.version != '' }}\n    needs: [build]\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout\n        uses: actions/checkout@v5\n        with:\n          ref: Meta\n          fetch-depth: '0'\n          fetch-tags: 'true'\n\n      - name: Get tags",
        "detailedLines": [

          },

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.service.remote\n\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.model.Profile\nimport com.github.kr328.kaidl.BinderInterface\nimport java.util.*\n\n@BinderInterface\ninterface IProfileManager {\n    suspend fun create(type: Profile.Type, name: String, source: String = \"\"): UUID\n    suspend fun clone(uuid: UUID): UUID\n    suspend fun commit(uuid: UUID, callback: IFetchObserver? = null)\n    suspend fun release(uuid: UUID)\n    suspend fun delete(uuid: UUID)\n    suspend fun patch(uuid: UUID, name: String, source: String, interval: Long)\n    suspend fun update(uuid: UUID)\n    suspend fun queryByUUID(uuid: UUID): Profile?\n    suspend fun queryAll(): List\u003cProfile\u003e\n    suspend fun queryActive(): Profile?\n    suspend fun setActive(profile: Profile)\n}",
        "detailedLines": [

_**Agent (default)**_


以下是完整的运行逻辑：

## 完整运行逻辑

### 1. 配置阶段（`.gitmodules`）
```
[submodule "clash-foss"]
    path = core/src/foss/golang/clash
    url = https://github.com/MikeKen-Ken/mihomo
    branch = Alpha
```
- 指定 submodule 路径、远程 URL 和分支（Alpha）

### 2. 构建阶段（GitHub Actions Workflow）

#### Step 1: Checkout Repository
```yaml
- name: Checkout Repository
  uses: actions/checkout@v4
```
- 检出主仓库代码

#### Step 2: Checkout submodules（关键步骤）
```bash
git submodule update --init --recursive --remote --force
```
- `--init`：初始化 submodule
- `--recursive`：递归处理嵌套 submodule
- `--remote`：从远程拉取最新代码（不使用主仓库记录的 commit）
- `--force`：强制更新

由于 `.gitmodules` 中配置了 `branch = Alpha`，`--remote` 会：
1. 从 `https://github.com/MikeKen-Ken/mihomo` 拉取 Alpha 分支的最新 commit
2. 将 submodule checkout 到该 commit
3. 确保使用的是 Alpha 分支的最新代码

### 3. CMake 构建阶段（`CMakeLists.txt`）

#### Step 1: 获取 commit hash
```cmake
execute_process(
    COMMAND git submodule foreach git log -1 --format=%H   
    WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} 
    OUTPUT_VARIABLE COMMIT_HASH
)
```
- `git submodule foreach`：遍历所有 submodule
- `git log -1 --format=%H`：获取当前 checkout 的完整 commit hash（40位）

#### Step 2: 处理输出
```cmake
string(REPLACE "\n" ";" COMMIT_HASH "${COMMIT_HASH}")
list(GET COMMIT_HASH 1 COMMIT_HASH)
string(REGEX REPLACE "[\n\t\r]" "" COMMIT_HASH ${COMMIT_HASH})
set(GIT_VERSION "${COMMIT_HASH}")
```
- 将换行符替换为分号，转换为列表
- 取索引 1 的元素（第二个，因为 `git submodule foreach` 会输出 submodule 路径）
- 清理空白字符
- 设置为版本号（完整 40 位 hash）

### 4. 版本号使用

版本号通过 `version.h` 传递给 C 代码：
```c
#define GIT_VERSION <完整的 commit hash>
```

然后在 Kotlin 中通过 JNI 调用显示：
```kotlin
Bridge.nativeCoreVersion().replace("_", "-")
```

## 确认要点

- 使用的是 Alpha 分支的最新 commit：是
  - `.gitmodules` 配置了 `branch = Alpha`
  - `--remote` 会拉取该分支的最新 commit
- 版本号是完整的 commit hash：是
  - 使用 `%H` 格式（完整 40 位）
  - 没有截取操作

## 潜在问题

`git submodule foreach` 的输出格式是：
```
Entering 'core/src/foss/golang/clash'
<commit-hash>
```

`list(GET COMMIT_HASH 1 COMMIT_HASH)` 取的是第二个元素，应该是 commit hash。如果只有一个 submodule，这没问题；如果有多个，可能需要调整。

总结：流程会使用 mihomo Alpha 分支的最新 commit，版本号显示完整的 commit hash。

---

_**User**_

获取 commit hash 过去的事从远端强制获取的最新 alpha commit 吗

---

_**Agent (default)**_

检查获取 commit hash 的逻辑，确认是否使用远端最新 Alpha commit：

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Update Clash-Core and Go Modules\non:\n  repository_dispatch:\n    types:\n      - core-updated\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\njobs:\n  update-dependencies:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n      \n      - name: Checkout and Update submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --remote --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n      \n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n\n      - name: Install update-go-mod-replace\n        run: |\n          go install github.com/metacubex/update-go-mod-replace@latest\n\n      - name: Update Foss Gomod\n        run: |\n          cd ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/foss/golang/\n          update-go-mod-replace ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/foss/golang/clash/go.mod $(pwd)/go.mod\n          go mod tidy\n\n      - name: Update Main Gomod\n        run: |\n          cd ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/main/golang/\n          update-go-mod-replace ${{ github.workspace }}/core/src/foss/golang/clash/go.mod $(pwd)/go.mod\n          go mod tidy\n\n      - uses: tibdex/github-app-token@v2\n        id: generate-token\n        with:\n          app_id: ${{ secrets.MAINTAINER_APPID }}\n          private_key: ${{ secrets.MAINTAINER_APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}\n\n      - name: Create Pull Request\n        id: cpr\n        uses: peter-evans/create-pull-request@v6\n        with:\n          token: ${{ steps.generate-token.outputs.token }}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Build Release\n\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      release-tag:\n        description: 'Release Tag (v2.x.x)'\n        required: true\n\njobs:\n  BuildRelease:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n        with:\n          fetch-depth: 0\n      \n      - name: Checkout submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --remote --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Gradle\n        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n\n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n      \n      - name: Convert and set version env\n        id: process-version\n        run: |\n          VERSION_TAG=${{ inputs.release-tag }}\n          VERSION_TAG=${VERSION_TAG#v}                              # remove the 'v' prefix\n          IFS='.' read -ra VERSION_PARTS \u003c\u003c\u003c \"$VERSION_TAG\"         # split into array\n          VERSION_CODE=$(printf \"%1d%02d%03d\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[0]}\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[1]}\" \"${VERSION_PARTS[2]}\")\n          \n          echo \"versonName=$VERSION_TAG\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_OUTPUT          # \"1.2.3\"\n          echo \"versonCode=$VERSION_CODE\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_OUTPUT         # \"102003\"\n      \n      # Re-write version in build.gradle.kts\n      - name: Re-write version\n        uses: Devofure/advance-android-version-actions@v1.5",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,

          },

            "lineNumber": 2

        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "#!/bin/bash\n\nwhile getopts \"v:\" opt; do\n  case $opt in\n    v)\n      version_range=$OPTARG\n      ;;\n    \\?)\n      echo \"Invalid option: -$OPTARG\" \u003e\u00262\n      exit 1\n      ;;\n  esac\ndone\n\nif [ -z \"$version_range\" ]; then\n  echo \"Please provide the version range using -v option. Example: ./genReleashNote.sh -v v1.14.1...v1.14.2\"\n  exit 1\nfi\n\necho \"## What's Changed\" \u003e release.md\ngit log --pretty=format:\"* %h %s by @%an\" --grep=\"^feat\" -i $version_range | sort -f | uniq \u003e\u003e release.md\necho \"\" \u003e\u003e release.md\n\necho \"## BUG \u0026 Fix\" \u003e\u003e release.md\ngit log --pretty=format:\"* %h %s by @%an\" --grep=\"^fix\" -i $version_range | sort -f | uniq \u003e\u003e release.md\necho \"\" \u003e\u003e release.md\n\necho \"## Maintenance\" \u003e\u003e release.md\ngit log --pretty=format:\"* %h %s by @%an\" --grep=\"^chore\\|^docs\\|^refactor\" -i $version_range | sort -f | uniq \u003e\u003e release.md\necho \"\" \u003e\u003e release.md\n\necho \"**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/compare/$version_range\" \u003e\u003e release.md",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "#!/bin/bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "while getopts \"v:\" opt; do"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "  case $opt in"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "    v)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "      version_range=$OPTARG"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "      ;;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "    \\?)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "      echo \"Invalid option: -$OPTARG\" \u003e\u00262"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "      exit 1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "      ;;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "  esac"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "done"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "if [ -z \"$version_range\" ]; then"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "  echo \"Please provide the version range using -v option. Example: ./genReleashNote.sh -v v1.14.1...v1.14.2\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "  exit 1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "fi"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "echo \"## What's Changed\" \u003e release.md"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "git log --pretty=format:\"* %h %s by @%an\" --grep=\"^feat\" -i $version_range | sort -f | uniq \u003e\u003e release.md"
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 25,
