    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "name: Build Pre-Release\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n  push:\n    branches:\n      - main\n\njobs:\n  BuildPreRelease:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout Repository\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n      \n      - name: Checkout submodules\n        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --remote --force\n\n      - name: Setup Java\n        uses: actions/setup-java@v4\n        with:\n          distribution: \"temurin\"\n          java-version: 21\n\n      - name: Setup Gradle\n        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4\n\n      - name: Setup Go\n        uses: actions/setup-go@v6\n        with:\n          go-version: \"1.25\"\n          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release\n\n      - uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cache/go-build\n            ~/go/pkg/mod\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-go-\n\n      - name: Update CA\n        run: |\n          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n          sudo update-ca-certificates\n          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n      - name: Setup signing\n        env:\n          SIGNING_KEYSTORE_BASE64: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEYSTORE_BASE64 }}\n          SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}\n          DEBUG_KEYSTORE_BASE64: ${{ secrets.DEBUG_KEYSTORE_BASE64 }}\n        run: |\n          # 优先使用 release 签名，如果配置完整",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "name: Build Pre-Release"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "on:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "  workflow_dispatch:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "  push:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "    branches:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "      - main"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "jobs:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "  BuildPreRelease:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    runs-on: ubuntu-latest"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    steps:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "      - name: Checkout Repository"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        uses: actions/checkout@v4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "      "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "      - name: Checkout submodules"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "        run: git submodule update --init --recursive --remote --force"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "      - name: Setup Java"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        uses: actions/setup-java@v4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "          distribution: \"temurin\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "          java-version: 21"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "      - name: Setup Gradle"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "      - name: Setup Go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "        uses: actions/setup-go@v6"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "          go-version: \"1.25\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "          check-latest: true # Always check for the latest patch release"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "      - uses: actions/cache@v4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "          path: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "            ~/.cache/go-build"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "            ~/go/pkg/mod"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "          restore-keys: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "            ${{ runner.os }}-go-"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "      - name: Update CA"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "        run: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "          sudo update-ca-certificates"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "      - name: Setup signing"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "        env:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "          SIGNING_KEYSTORE_BASE64: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEYSTORE_BASE64 }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "          SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "          SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "          SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "          DEBUG_KEYSTORE_BASE64: ${{ secrets.DEBUG_KEYSTORE_BASE64 }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "        run: |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "          # 优先使用 release 签名，如果配置完整"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 56
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },

      "score": 0.22668829560279846

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "          fetch-tags: 'true'\n\n      - name: Get tags\n        run: |\n          echo \"CURRENTVERSION=${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n          git fetch --tags\n          echo \"PREVERSION=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 HEAD)\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n\n      - name: Force push Alpha branch to Meta\n        run: |\n          git config --global user.email \"github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com\"\n          git config --global user.name \"github-actions[bot]\"\n          git fetch origin Alpha:Alpha\n          git push origin Alpha:Meta --force\n        env:\n          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n      - name: Tag the commit on Alpha\n        run: |\n          git checkout Alpha \n          git tag ${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\n          git push origin ${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\n        env:\n          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n      - name: Generate release notes\n        run: |\n            cp ./.github/genReleaseNote.sh ./\n            bash ./genReleaseNote.sh -v ${PREVERSION}...${CURRENTVERSION}\n            rm ./genReleaseNote.sh\n  \n      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v4\n        with:\n          path: bin/\n          merge-multiple: true\n  \n      - name: Display structure of downloaded files\n        run: ls -R\n        working-directory: bin\n  \n      - name: Upload Release\n        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2\n        if: ${{ success() }}\n        with:\n          tag_name: ${{ github.event.inputs.version }}\n          files: bin/*\n          body_path: release.md",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "      - name: Re-write version\n        uses: Devofure/advance-android-version-actions@v1.5\n        with:\n          gradlePath: build.gradle.kts\n          versionCode: ${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonCode }}\n          versionName: ${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonName }}\n      \n      # If any change found, commit it and push\n      - name: Commit and push if changes\n        run: |\n          changes=$(git diff --name-only origin/main | wc -l)\n          if [ $changes -gt 0 ]\n          then\n            newVersionName=${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonName }}\n            newVersionCode=${{ steps.process-version.outputs.versonCode }}\n            git config --global user.name 'GitHub Action'\n            git config --global user.email 'action@github.com'\n            git add build.gradle.kts\n            git commit -am \"Bump version to $newVersionName ($newVersionCode)\"\n            git tag \"v$newVersionName\"\n            git push --follow-tags\n          fi\n\n      - name: Update CA\n        run: |\n          sudo apt-get update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt-get install ca-certificates\n          sudo update-ca-certificates\n          cp -f /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt core/src/foss/golang/clash/component/ca/ca-certificates.crt\n\n      - name: Signing properties\n        env:\n          SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS }}\n          SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD }}\n        run: |\n          touch signing.properties\n          echo keystore.password=\"$SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD\" \u003e signing.properties\n          echo key.alias=\"$SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n          echo key.password=\"$SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD\" \u003e\u003e signing.properties\n            \n          echo \"cat signing.properties\"\n          cat signing.properties\n\n      - name: Release Build\n        if: success()\n        run: ./gradlew --no-daemon app:assembleMetaRelease\n\n      - name: Tag Repo\n        uses: richardsimko/update-tag@v1",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.log\n\nimport android.content.Context\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.model.LogMessage\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.model.LogFile\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.util.logsDir\nimport java.io.BufferedReader\nimport java.io.FileReader\nimport java.util.*\n\nclass LogcatReader(context: Context, file: LogFile) : AutoCloseable {\n    private val reader = BufferedReader(FileReader(context.logsDir.resolve(file.fileName)))\n\n    override fun close() {\n        reader.close()\n    }\n\n    fun readAll(): List\u003cLogMessage\u003e {\n        var lastTime = Date(0)\n        return reader.lineSequence()\n            .map { it.trim() }\n            .filter { !it.startsWith(\"#\") }\n            .map { it.split(\":\", limit = 3) }\n            .map {\n                val time = it[0].toLongOrNull()?.let { Date(it) } ?: lastTime\n                val logMessage = if (it[0].toLongOrNull() != null) {\n                    LogMessage(\n                        time = time,\n                        level = LogMessage.Level.valueOf(it[1]),\n                        message = it[2]\n                    )\n                } else {\n                    LogMessage(\n                        time = time,\n                        level = LogMessage.Level.Warning, // or any default level\n                        message = it.joinToString(\":\")\n                    )\n                }\n                lastTime = time\n                logMessage\n            }\n            .toList()\n    }\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package com.github.kr328.clash.log"

            "lineNumber": 2

          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        return reader.lineSequence()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "            .map { it.trim() }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "            .filter { !it.startsWith(\"#\") }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "            .map { it.split(\":\", limit = 3) }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "            .map {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "                val time = it[0].toLongOrNull()?.let { Date(it) } ?: lastTime"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "                val logMessage = if (it[0].toLongOrNull() != null) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "                    LogMessage("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "                        time = time,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "                        level = LogMessage.Level.valueOf(it[1]),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "                        message = it[2]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "                    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "                } else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "                    LogMessage("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "                        time = time,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "                        level = LogMessage.Level.Warning, // or any default level"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "                        message = it.joinToString(\":\")"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package main\n\n//#include \"bridge.h\"\nimport \"C\"\n\nimport (\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\t\"unsafe\"\n\n\t\"cfa/native/delegate\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\"\n)\n\ntype message struct {\n\tLevel   string &#96;json:\"level\"&#96;\n\tMessage string &#96;json:\"message\"&#96;\n\tTime    int64  &#96;json:\"time\"&#96;\n}\n\nfunc init() {\n\tgo func() {\n\t\tsub := log.Subscribe()\n\t\tdefer log.UnSubscribe(sub)\n\n\t\tfor msg := range sub {\n\t\t\tcPayload := C.CString(msg.Payload)\n\n\t\t\tswitch msg.LogLevel {\n\t\t\tcase log.INFO:\n\t\t\t\tC.log_info(cPayload)\n\t\t\tcase log.ERROR:\n\t\t\t\tC.log_error(cPayload)\n\t\t\tcase log.WARNING:\n\t\t\t\tC.log_warn(cPayload)\n\t\t\tcase log.DEBUG:\n\t\t\t\tC.log_debug(cPayload)\n\t\t\tcase log.SILENT:\n\t\t\t\tC.log_verbose(cPayload)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n}\n\n//export subscribeLogcat\nfunc subscribeLogcat(remote unsafe.Pointer) {\n\tgo func(remote unsafe.Pointer) {\n\t\tsub := log.Subscribe()\n\t\tdefer log.UnSubscribe(sub)\n\n\t\tfor msg := range sub {\n\t\t\tif msg.LogLevel \u003c log.Level() \u0026\u0026 !strings.HasPrefix(msg.Payload, \"[APP]\") {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\trMsg := \u0026message{\n\t\t\t\tLevel:   msg.LogLevel.String(),\n\t\t\t\tMessage: msg.Payload,\n\t\t\t\tTime:    time.Now().UnixNano() / 1000 / 1000,\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif C.logcat_received(remote, marshalJson(rMsg)) != 0 {\n\t\t\t\tC.release_object(remote)\n\n\t\t\t\tlog.Debugln(\"Logcat subscriber closed\")\n\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}(remote)\n\n\tlog.Infoln(\"[APP] Logcat level: %s\", log.Level().String())\n}\n\nvar healthCheckCallback unsafe.Pointer\n\n//export subscribeHealthCheck\nfunc subscribeHealthCheck(remote unsafe.Pointer) {\n\thealthCheckCallback = remote\n\tlog.Infoln(\"[APP] Health check callback registered\")\n\t\n\t// Set the callback function in delegate package\n\tdelegate.SetHealthCheckNotifyFunc(func(groupName string) {\n\t\tif healthCheckCallback == nil {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t\tcGroupName := C.CString(groupName)\n\t\tC.health_check_triggered(healthCheckCallback, cGroupName)\n\t})\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.util\n\nimport android.os.DeadObjectException\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.common.log.Log\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.remote.Remote\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.remote.IClashManager\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.service.remote.IProfileManager\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.withContext\nimport kotlin.coroutines.CoroutineContext\n\nsuspend fun \u003cT\u003e withClash(\n    context: CoroutineContext = Dispatchers.IO,\n    block: suspend IClashManager.() -\u003e T\n): T {\n    while (true) {\n        val remote = Remote.service.remote.get()\n        val client = remote.clash()\n\n        try {\n            return withContext(context) { client.block() }\n        } catch (e: DeadObjectException) {\n            Log.w(\"Remote services panic\")\n\n            Remote.service.remote.reset(remote)\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nsuspend fun \u003cT\u003e withProfile(\n    context: CoroutineContext = Dispatchers.IO,\n    block: suspend IProfileManager.() -\u003e T\n): T {\n    while (true) {\n        val remote = Remote.service.remote.get()\n        val client = remote.profile()\n\n        try {\n            return withContext(context) { client.block() }\n        } catch (e: DeadObjectException) {\n            Log.w(\"Remote services panic\")\n\n            Remote.service.remote.reset(remote)\n        }\n    }\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.log\n\nobject SystemLogcat {\n    private val command = arrayOf(\n        \"logcat\",\n        \"-d\",\n        \"-s\",\n        \"Go\",\n        \"DEBUG\",\n        \"AndroidRuntime\",\n        \"ClashMetaForAndroid\",\n        \"LwIP\",\n    )\n\n    fun dumpCrash(): String {\n        return try {\n            val process = Runtime.getRuntime().exec(command)\n\n            val result = process.inputStream.use { stream -\u003e\n                stream.reader().readLines()\n                    .filterNot { it.startsWith(\"------\") }\n                    .joinToString(\"\\n\")\n            }\n\n            process.waitFor()\n\n            result.trim()\n        } catch (e: Exception) {\n            \"\"\n        }\n    }\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "## Clash Meta for Android\n\nA Graphical user interface of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta) for Android\n\n### Feature\n\nFeature of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta)\n\n[\u003cimg src=\"https://fdroid.gitlab.io/artwork/badge/get-it-on.png\"\n     alt=\"Get it on F-Droid\"\n     height=\"80\"\u003e](https://f-droid.org/packages/com.github.metacubex.clash.meta/)\n\n### Requirement\n\n- Android 5.0+ (minimum)\n- Android 7.0+ (recommend)\n- &#96;armeabi-v7a&#96; , &#96;arm64-v8a&#96;, &#96;x86&#96; or &#96;x86_64&#96; Architecture\n\n### Build\n\n1. Update submodules\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n   git submodule update --init --recursive\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n2. Install **OpenJDK 11**, **Android SDK**, **CMake** and **Golang**\n\n3. Create &#96;local.properties&#96; in project root with\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   sdk.dir=/path/to/android-sdk\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n4. (Optional) Custom app package name. Add the following configuration to &#96;local.properties&#96;.\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   # config your ownn applicationId, or it will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash'\n   custom.application.id=com.my.compile.clash\n   # remove application id suffix, or the applicaion id will be 'com.github.metacubex.clash.alpha'\n   remove.suffix=true\n\n5. Create &#96;signing.properties&#96; in project root with\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;properties\n   keystore.path=/path/to/keystore/file\n   keystore.password=\u003ckey store password\u003e\n   key.alias=\u003ckey alias\u003e\n   key.password=\u003ckey password\u003e\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n6. Build\n\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n   ./gradlew app:assembleAlphaRelease\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Automation\n\nAPP package name is &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta&#96;\n\n- Toggle Clash.Meta service status\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.TOGGLE_CLASH&#96;\n- Start Clash.Meta service\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.START_CLASH&#96;\n- Stop Clash.Meta service\n  - Send intent to activity &#96;com.github.kr328.clash.ExternalControlActivity&#96; with action &#96;com.github.metacubex.clash.meta.action.STOP_CLASH&#96;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "## Clash Meta for Android"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "A Graphical user interface of [Clash.Meta](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/Clash.Meta) for Android"

            "lineNumber": 4

            "text": "### Feature"

            "text": "     alt=\"Get it on F-Droid\""

            "text": "     height=\"80\"\u003e](https://f-droid.org/packages/com.github.metacubex.clash.meta/)"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (f *Fetcher[V]) pullLoop(forceUpdate bool) {\n\tinitialInterval := f.interval - time.Since(f.updatedAt)\n\tif initialInterval \u003e f.interval {\n\t\tinitialInterval = f.interval\n\t}\n\n\tif forceUpdate {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"[Provider] %s not updated for a long time, force refresh\", f.Name())\n\t\tf.updateWithLog()\n\t}\n\tif attempt := f.backoff.Attempt(); attempt \u003e 0 { // f.Update() was failed, decrease the interval from backoff to achieve fast retry\n\t\tif duration := f.backoff.ForAttempt(attempt); duration \u003c initialInterval {\n\t\t\tinitialInterval = duration\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\ttimer := time.NewTimer(initialInterval)\n\tdefer timer.Stop()\n\tfor {\n\t\tselect {\n\t\tcase \u003c-timer.C:\n\t\t\tf.updateWithLog()\n\t\t\tinterval := f.interval\n\t\t\tif attempt := f.backoff.Attempt(); attempt \u003e 0 { // f.Update() was failed, decrease the interval from backoff to achieve fast retry\n\t\t\t\tif duration := f.backoff.ForAttempt(attempt); duration \u003c interval {\n\t\t\t\t\tinterval = duration\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\ttimer.Reset(interval)\n\t\tcase \u003c-f.ctx.Done():\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fetcher[V]) startPullLoop(forceUpdate bool) (err error) {\n\t// pull contents automatically\n\tif f.vehicle.Type() == P.File {\n\t\tf.watcher, err = fswatch.NewWatcher(fswatch.Options{\n\t\t\tPath:     []string{f.vehicle.Path()},\n\t\t\tCallback: f.updateCallback,\n\t\t})\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\t\terr = f.watcher.Start()\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\t} else if f.interval \u003e 0 {\n\t\tgo f.pullLoop(forceUpdate)\n\t}\n\treturn\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fetcher[V]) updateCallback(path string) {\n\tf.updateWithLog()\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fetcher[V]) updateWithLog() {\n\t_, same, err := f.Update()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Errorln(\"[Provider] %s pull error: %s\", f.Name(), err.Error())\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif same {\n\t\tlog.Debugln(\"[Provider] %s's content doesn't change\", f.Name())\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tlog.Infoln(\"[Provider] %s's content update\", f.Name())\n\treturn\n}\n\nfunc NewFetcher[V any](name string, interval time.Duration, vehicle P.Vehicle",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        with:\n          token: ${{ steps.generate-token.outputs.token }}\n          commit-message: Update Dependencies\n          branch: update-dependencies\n          delete-branch: true\n          title: 'Update Dependencies'\n          draft: false\n          body: |\n            - Update Clash-Meta Core\n            - Update Go Module Dependecies\n          labels: |\n            Update\n        \n      - name: PR result\n        if: ${{ steps.cpr.outputs.pull-request-number }}\n        run: |\n          echo \"Pull Request Number - ${{ steps.cpr.outputs.pull-request-number }}\"\n          echo \"Pull Request URL - ${{ steps.cpr.outputs.pull-request-url }}\"\n      ",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "        with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,

            "lineNumber": 69,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "          draft: false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "          body: |"
          },

            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "            - Update Clash-Meta Core"

            "lineNumber": 73,

            "lineNumber": 74,

            "lineNumber": 77,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": ".gradle\nbuild/\n/app/foss/release\n/app/premium/release\n/captures\n\n# Ignore Gradle GUI config\ngradle-app.setting\n\n# Avoid ignoring Gradle wrapper jar targetFile (.jar files are usually ignored)\n!gradle-wrapper.jar\n\n# Cache of project\n.gradletasknamecache\n\n# # Work around https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/IDEA-116898\n# gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties\n\n# Ignore IDEA config\n*.iml\n/.idea/*\n!/.idea/codeStyles\n/core/src/main/golang/.idea/*\n!/core/src/main/golang/.idea/codeStyles\n/core/src/foss/golang/.idea/*\n!/core/src/foss/golang/.idea/codeStyles\n/core/src/premium/golang/.idea/*\n!/core/src/premium/golang/.idea/codeStyles\n\n# Ignore builtin geofiles\napp/src/main/assets\n\n# KeyStore\nsigning.properties\n*.keystore\n*.jks\n\n# clion cmake build\ncmake-build-*\n\n# local.properties\nlocal.properties\n\n\n# tracker\ntracker.properties\n\n# vscode\n.vscode\n\n# cxx\n.cxx\n\n*.hprof\n\n# firebase\ngoogle-services.json\n\n# Dolphin\n.directory\n\n# logs\n*.log\n\n# MacOS\n.DS_Store",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": ".gradle"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "build/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.log\n\nimport androidx.collection.CircularArray\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.model.LogMessage\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.sync.Mutex\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.sync.withLock\n\nclass LogcatCache {\n    data class Snapshot(val messages: List\u003cLogMessage\u003e, val removed: Int, val appended: Int)\n\n    private val array = CircularArray\u003cLogMessage\u003e(CAPACITY)\n    private val lock = Mutex()\n\n    private var removed: Int = 0\n    private var appended: Int = 0\n\n    suspend fun append(msg: LogMessage) {\n        lock.withLock {\n            if (array.size() \u003e= CAPACITY) {\n                array.removeFromStart(1)\n\n                removed++\n                appended--\n            }\n\n            array.addLast(msg)\n\n            appended++\n        }\n    }\n\n    suspend fun snapshot(full: Boolean): Snapshot? {\n        return lock.withLock {\n            if (!full \u0026\u0026 removed == 0 \u0026\u0026 appended == 0) {\n                return@withLock null\n            }\n\n            Snapshot(\n                List(array.size()) { array[it] },\n                removed,\n                if (full) array.size() + appended else appended\n            ).also {\n                removed = 0\n                appended = 0\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    companion object {\n        const val CAPACITY = 128\n    }\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        merge-multiple: true\n\n    - name: Calculate checksums\n      run: |\n        cd bin/\n        find . -type f -not -name \"checksums.*\" -not -name \"version.txt\" | sort | xargs sha256sum \u003e checksums.txt\n        cat checksums.txt\n      shell: bash\n\n    - name: Delete current release assets\n      uses: 8Mi-Tech/delete-release-assets-action@main\n      with:\n        github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n        tag: Prerelease-${{ github.ref_name }}\n        deleteOnlyFromDrafts: false\n    - name: Set Env\n      run: |\n        echo \"BUILDTIME=$(TZ=Asia/Shanghai date)\" \u003e\u003e $GITHUB_ENV\n      shell: bash\n\n    - name: Tag Repo\n      uses: richardsimko/update-tag@v1\n      with:\n        tag_name: Prerelease-${{ github.ref_name }}\n      env:\n        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n      \n    - run: |\n        cat \u003e release.txt \u003c\u003c 'EOF'\n        Release created at  ${{ env.BUILDTIME }}\n        Synchronize ${{ github.ref_name }} branch code updates, keeping only the latest version\n        \u003cbr\u003e\n        [我应该下载哪个文件? / Which file should I download?](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/wiki/FAQ)\n        [二进制文件筛选 / Binary file selector](https://metacubex.github.io/Meta-Docs/startup/#_1)\n        [查看文档 / Docs](https://metacubex.github.io/Meta-Docs/)\n        EOF\n\n    - name: Upload Prerelease\n      uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1\n      if: ${{  success() }}\n      with:\n        tag_name: Prerelease-${{ github.ref_name }}\n        files: |\n          bin/*\n        prerelease: true\n        generate_release_notes: true\n        body_path: release.txt\n\n  Upload-Release:\n    permissions: write-all\n    if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' \u0026\u0026 github.event.inputs.version != '' }}\n    needs: [build]\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout\n        uses: actions/checkout@v5\n        with:\n          ref: Meta\n          fetch-depth: '0'\n          fetch-tags: 'true'\n\n      - name: Get tags",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package main\n\n/*\n#cgo LDFLAGS: -llog\n\n#include \"bridge.h\"\n*/\nimport \"C\"\n\nimport (\n\t\"runtime\"\n\t\"runtime/debug\"\n\n\t\"cfa/native/config\"\n\t\"cfa/native/delegate\"\n\t\"cfa/native/tunnel\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\"\n)\n\nfunc main() {\n\tpanic(\"Stub!\")\n}\n\n//export coreInit\nfunc coreInit(home, versionName, gitVersion C.c_string, sdkVersion C.int) {\n\th := C.GoString(home)\n\tv := C.GoString(versionName)\n\tg := C.GoString(gitVersion)\n\ts := int(sdkVersion)\n\n\tdelegate.Init(h, v, g, s)\n\n\treset()\n}\n\n//export reset\nfunc reset() {\n\tconfig.LoadDefault()\n\ttunnel.ResetStatistic()\n\ttunnel.CloseAllConnections()\n\n\truntime.GC()\n\tdebug.FreeOSMemory()\n}\n\n//export forceGc\nfunc forceGc() {\n\tgo func() {\n\t\tlog.Infoln(\"[APP] request force GC\")\n\n\t\truntime.GC()\n\t\tdebug.FreeOSMemory()\n\t}()\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func FetchAndValid(\n\tpath string,\n\turl string,\n\tforce bool,\n\treportStatus func(string),\n) error {\n\tconfigPath := P.Join(path, \"config.yaml\")\n\n\tif _, err := os.Stat(configPath); os.IsNotExist(err) || force {\n\t\turl, err := U.Parse(url)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tbytes, _ := json.Marshal(\u0026Status{\n\t\t\tAction:      \"FetchConfiguration\",\n\t\t\tArgs:        []string{url.Host},\n\t\t\tProgress:    -1,\n\t\t\tMaxProgress: -1,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\treportStatus(string(bytes))\n\n\t\tif err := fetch(url, configPath); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tdefer runtime.GC()\n\n\trawCfg, err := UnmarshalAndPatch(path)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tforEachProviders(rawCfg, func(index int, total int, name string, provider map[string]any, prefix string) {\n\t\tbytes, _ := json.Marshal(\u0026Status{\n\t\t\tAction:      \"FetchProviders\",\n\t\t\tArgs:        []string{name},\n\t\t\tProgress:    index,\n\t\t\tMaxProgress: total,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\treportStatus(string(bytes))\n\n\t\tu, uok := provider[\"url\"]\n\t\tp, pok := provider[\"path\"]\n\n\t\tif !uok || !pok {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tus, uok := u.(string)\n\t\tps, pok := p.(string)\n\n\t\tif !uok || !pok {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif _, err := os.Stat(ps); err == nil {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\turl, err := U.Parse(us)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_ = fetch(url, ps)\n\t})\n\n\tbytes, _ := json.Marshal(\u0026Status{\n\t\tAction:      \"Verifying\",\n\t\tArgs:        []string{},\n\t\tProgress:    0xffff,\n\t\tMaxProgress: 0xffff,\n\t})\n\n\treportStatus(string(bytes))\n\n\tcfg, err := Parse(rawCfg)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tdestroyProviders(cfg)\n\n\treturn nil\n}",

_**Agent (default)**_

是的，获取的 commit hash 是从远端强制获取的最新 Alpha commit。执行顺序如下：

## 执行顺序和逻辑

### 1. Workflow 阶段（CMake 之前）

```bash
git submodule update --init --recursive --remote --force
```

这一步会：
- `--remote`：从远程仓库拉取最新代码
- `--force`：强制更新
- 由于 `.gitmodules` 中配置了 `branch = Alpha`，会拉取 Alpha 分支的最新 commit
- 将 submodule checkout 到该 commit

### 2. CMake 构建阶段（在 Workflow 之后）

```cmake
execute_process(
    COMMAND git submodule foreach git log -1 --format=%H   
    ...
)
```

这一步会：
- 在 submodule 目录中执行 `git log -1 --format=%H`
- 获取当前 checkout 的 commit hash
- 该 commit 就是步骤 1 中 `--remote` 拉取的最新 Alpha commit

## 确认

- 使用的是远端最新 Alpha commit：是
  - `git submodule update --remote` 会拉取 Alpha 分支的最新 commit
  - `git log -1` 获取的是当前 checkout 的 commit（即刚才拉取的最新 commit）
- 是强制获取：是
  - `--force` 参数确保强制更新

## 完整流程

```
1. Workflow: git submodule update --remote --force
   ↓
   从 https://github.com/MikeKen-Ken/mihomo 拉取 Alpha 分支最新 commit
   ↓
   将 submodule checkout 到该 commit
   ↓
2. CMake: git submodule foreach git log -1 --format=%H
   ↓
   获取当前 checkout 的 commit hash（即步骤1拉取的最新 commit）
   ↓
   显示为版本号
```

因此，获取的 commit hash 是从远端强制获取的最新 Alpha commit。
